title: Failure Modes of Deep Multi-Agent RL in Asynchronous Pricing: Reproducible Triggers, Trace Diagnostics, and a Partial Fix
summary: We study two reproducible failure modes of deep multi-agent reinforcement learning in continuous-time pricing markets: (i) tacit cartel formation between competing DDPG agents, and (ii) actor--critic instability at high event rates. We instantiate both inside a single CT-MARL benchmark (Poisson-clocked price updates, observation latency $δ$, interior-optimum logit demand), show that synchronous DDPG agents reliably trigger Failure Mode 1 with collusion index $Δ= 0.69 \pm 0.11$, and quantify a partial microstructure fix: asynchrony alone cuts collusion by 48\% and adding latency drives it to a minimum of $Δ= 0.28$. The fix has clearly documented costs: it is partial ($Δ$ remains supra-Bertrand), it is non-monotone in $δ$, and it does not survive Failure Mode 2, which emerges as DDPG critic divergence at $λ= 5$ and corrupts the phase-diagram cell at $(λ{=}5, δ{=}1)$. We accompany the scalar collusion index with trajectory-level trace diagnostics that expose the within-episode signalling collapse and the post-shock non-recovery.

AI.tldr: 研究深度多智能体强化学习在连续时间定价市场中的两种可重现故障模式：心照不宣的卡特尔形成和高事件率下的Actor-Critic不稳定，并提出部分修复方案。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习在金融市场中应用时出现稳定性问题，需要识别和理解这些失败模式以提高算法的可靠性。
AI.method: 在单一CT-MARL基准测试中实例化两种故障模式，使用泊松时钟价格更新和观察延迟等参数，通过同步DDPG代理测试卡特尔形成，通过高事件率测试Actor-Critic稳定性。
AI.result: 同步DDPG代理可靠触发故障模式1，卡特尔指数Δ=0.69±0.11；异步性单独减少48%卡特尔，加上延迟可降至Δ=0.28；但修复不完全（非单调且超过伯努利水平），且无法抵抗故障模式2（DDPG评论家在λ=5时出现分歧）。
AI.conclusion: 异步性和延迟的组合可部分减少卡特尔行为，但无法完全解决高事件率下的Actor-Critic不稳定问题，需要进一步研究更全面的修复方案。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about deep reinforcement learning for financial market pricing (quantitative finance), while the research profile is Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion generation. The methods (DDPG, Actor-Critic for pricing) are in finance/trading domain, not computer graphics or human motion synthesis.

title: Decoupling Thought from Speech: Knowledge-Grounded Counterfactual Reasoning for Resilient Multi-Agent Argumentation
comment: Accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the 30th International Conference on Knowledge-Based and Intelligent Information & Engineering Systems (KES 2026)
summary: Multi-agent debate frameworks have been shown to improve large language model performance in convergent tasks, but they are currently optimized in a way that heavily favors final output accuracy rather than stability of the process. During long-horizon exchanges reactive systems under sustained perturbations often experience logic degradation, argument repetition, and role drift. To structurally prevent the identity loss and maintain the process fidelity, we introduce Knowledge-Grounded Counterfactual Reasoning (KG-CFR), a dual-stage architecture that enforces a strict separation of concerns between a private, retrieval-augmented planning buffer, and a public execution layer. We assess this system in Dynamic Resource Allocation under Uncertainty (DRAU), a dedicated 1v1v1 environment, introducing diversity as distinct from standard debate settings. Over 270 completely factorial crisis simulation trajectories with stochastic environmental shocks, KG-CFR prevents judge-detected critical post-shock degradation (defined as a quality shift, $Δ\le -0.20$) in more than 95% of perturbed runs, increasing the overall argument quality from 0.694 to 0.822. Our primary contribution is the demonstration of architectural decoupling being an important factor of systemic resilience enhancement under sustained pressure without quality loss. Furthermore, we introduce custom vector metrics for discourse divergence and plan-execution alignment that provide strong, directionally consistent evidence of operational stability. Our ablation experiments suggest that the proper doctrinal grounding can be an equally important factor for argument quality, as the prospective planning. KG-CFR, according to our initial metric evaluations, reduces semantic looping, by preserving the agent's consistency with the original plan.

AI.tldr: 本文提出知识 grounded 反事实推理(KG-CFR)框架,通过双阶段架构分离私密规划缓冲区与公共执行层,以增强多智能体辩论系统在持续压力下的稳定性。实验表明该方法在资源分配不确定环境中,95%以上扰动运行中防止关键质量下降,argument质量从0.694提升至0.822。
AI.motivation: 现有多元智能体辩论框架虽能提升大语言模型性能,但过度优化最终输出准确性而忽视过程稳定性。长期交互中系统常出现逻辑退化、论点重复和角色漂移等问题,需要在架构层面解决身份保持与过程保真度问题。
AI.method: 提出KG-CFR双阶段架构:1)私密检索增强规划缓冲区 2)公共执行层,实现严格关注分离。引入动态资源分配不确定(DRAU)环境进行1v1v1评估,并设计 discourse divergence 和 plan-execution alignment 的向量度量指标。
AI.result: 270+完全因子化危机模拟轨迹配合随机环境冲击实验显示:KG-CFR在95%以上扰动运行中防止裁判检测的关键性冲击后质量下降(Δ≤-0.20),整体argument质量从0.694提升至0.822。消融实验表明适当 doctrine grounding 对argument质量的贡献与前瞻规划同等重要。
AI.conclusion: 架构解耦是提升持续压力下系统韧性而不损失质量的重要因素。自定义向量度量提供了方向一致的操作稳定性证据。KG-CFR通过保持智能体与原始规划的一致性来减少语义循环,为多元智能体辩论系统的稳定性增强提供了新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about multi-agent argumentation systems for LLMs, focusing on knowledge-grounded counterfactual reasoning for debate stability. It has NO relevance to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion: completely different application domain (LLM argumentation vs 3D motion generation), different methods (multi-agent systems vs video generation/motion models), and addresses entirely different pain points. The paper doesn't involve any motion generation, visual features, or cross-modal alignment between text-video-motion.

title: SkillAxe: Sharpening LLM-Authored Agent Skills Through Evaluation-Guided Self-Refinement
summary: Skill documents, structured natural-language instructions that guide Large Language Model (LLM) agents, are critical to modern agent frameworks, yet LLMs struggle to write skills that actually work. On SkillsBench, human-authored skills improve pass rates by 16.2 percentage points, while LLM-authored skills provide no measurable gain. We introduce SkillAxe, a fully unsupervised framework that enables LLMs to iteratively diagnose and refine their own skills. SkillAxe decomposes skill quality into four interpretable dimensions (quality impact, trigger precision, instruction compliance with fault attribution, and solution-path coverage), producing structured improvement briefs that require no ground-truth labels, test suites, or environment rewards. On SkillsBench, SkillAxe improves pass rates by 28\% relative over unimproved LLM skills and closes 47--67\% of the gap to human-authored skills. We validate the approach as a continuous improvement engine in the wild on SpreadsheetBench, where a SkillAxe-built skill library learns from past agent trajectories and raises pass rate from 16.0\% to 52.0\% using only 22 skills.

AI.tldr: SkillAxe是一个无监督框架,让LLM能够迭代诊断和改进自己的技能文档,在SkillsBench上将通过率提升28%,在SpreadsheetBench上从16%提升到52%。
AI.motivation: 技能文档对LLM代理框架至关重要,但LLM自己写的技能几乎无效,人类编写的技能却能显著提升性能(16.2个百分点),因此需要一种让LLM能够自我改进技能的方法。
AI.method: SkillAxe将技能质量分解为四个可解释维度:质量影响、触发精度、指令遵从性带故障归因、解决方案路径覆盖,生成结构化改进简报,无需ground-truth标签、测试套件或环境奖励。
AI.result: 在SkillsBench上比未改进的LLM技能相对提升28%,缩小47-67%与人类技能的差距;在SpreadsheetBench上仅用22个技能就将通过率从16%提升到52%。
AI.conclusion: SkillAxe能作为持续改进引擎,有效弥合LLM与人类在编写技能方面的差距,为无监督技能改进提供了可行路径。

relevance_reason: This paper is completely irrelevant to the research profile. The research profile is in Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion from text/video), while this paper is about LLM agent skill documentation self-improvement for software agents (like spreadsheet automation). Although both involve LLMs, the application domain is entirely different - this has nothing to do with video generation, motion synthesis, visual feature extraction, or cross-modal alignment between text/video/motion. The pain points and methods are completely unrelated to computer graphics or motion generation.

title: Decentralized Multi-Agent Systems with Shared Context
summary: Multi-agent systems (MAS) can scale large language model reasoning at test time by decomposing complex problems into parallel subtasks. However, most existing MAS rely on centralized orchestration, where a main agent assigns work, collects outputs, and merges results. As the number of subtasks grows, this controller becomes a communication and integration bottleneck. We propose Decentralized Language Models (DeLM), a MAS framework that decentralizes coordination through parallel agents, a shared verified context, and a task queue. Agents asynchronously claim subtasks, read accumulated progress, perform local reasoning, and write back compact verified updates. The shared context acts as a common communication substrate, enabling agents to build on one another's verified progress without routing every update through a central controller. Empirically, DeLM improves both software-engineering test-time scaling and long-context reasoning. On SWE-bench Verified, DeLM achieves the best performance across Avg.@1, Pass@2, and Pass@4, with gains of up to 10.5 percentage points over the strongest baseline, while reducing cost per task by roughly 50%. On LongBench-v2 Multi-Doc QA, DeLM achieves the highest average accuracy across four frontier model families, improving over the strongest baseline by up to 5.7 percentage points. The code is available on our project website at https://yuzhenmao.github.io/DeLM/.

title: SD-GRPO: Verifiable Segment Decomposition for Long-Form Vision-Language Generation
summary: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) and its variants, originally developed for Large Language Models (LLMs), have recently been applied to Multimodal LLMs and produced strong results. However, their coarse-grained holistic credit assignment from a single scalar advantage underfits vision-language (VL) tasks, where outputs are often long-form responses grounded in semantically rich images. To address this limitation, we exploit a structured signal that single-scalar formulations discard: the natural segmentation of long-form VL outputs. Concretely, we propose Segment-Decomposed GRPO (SD-GRPO), which z-normalizes verifiable per-segment rewards across the rollout group, yielding a vector of per-segment advantages in place of a single scalar. We evaluate SD-GRPO across three settings spanning controlled and real-world long-form VL generation, organized by increasing semantic entanglement across segments. On a controlled multi-panel dense-captioning task constructed from DOCCI, where segments are semantically independent, SD-GRPO consistently outperforms the GRPO baseline, with larger gains at higher segment counts. Extending to a controlled multi-chart long-form VQA task constructed from MultiChartQA, we show both theoretically and empirically that rollout-level rewards suffer from cross-segment credit misattribution that scales with output length. On a real-world scientific figure captioning task on the MMSci dataset, where subfigure captions share context across the figure, blending holistic and per-segment rewards further improves on both, suggesting per-segment normalization alone is insufficient when segments are semantically entangled. Finally, by integrating SD-GRPO into Dr. GRPO, we confirm that it can be applied to any GRPO framework with minimal implementation overhead to enhance long-form VL generation.

AI.tldr: SD-GRPO通过将GRPO的单标量优势分解为按段落归一化的向量优势，解决视觉语言任务中粗粒度信用分配的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有GRPO在多模态大模型中使用单标量优势进行信用分配，但对于长形式视觉语言输出（如图像grounded响应），这种粗粒度分配不足以捕捉各语义段的差异性。
AI.method: 提出分段分解GRPO(SD-GRPO)：对 rollout 组中的可验证分段奖励进行z-normalization，生成每分段优势向量代替单标量。在语义纠缠场景进一步混合整体与分段奖励。
AI.result: 在DOCCI多面板密集标注任务上SD-GRPO优于GRPO，分段越多提升越大；MultiChartQA上揭示了 rollout 级奖励的跨段信用误归因问题；MMSci科学图表标注任务上混合方法最佳。
AI.conclusion: SD-GRPO可集成到任何GRPO框架，最小化实现开销即可增强长形式VL生成，为多模态对齐提供更细粒度的信用分配机制。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The paper is about Vision-Language Model training/optimization (GRPO) for visual question answering, chart understanding, and image-grounded text generation tasks. This is NOT related to Text-to-Motion in Computer Graphics, which involves generating 3D human motion from text/video inputs. While the paper uses VLMs, it applies them to image understanding/captioning rather than motion generation or video-to-motion synthesis. The pain points are also entirely different - this paper addresses credit assignment in VLM training, not extracting 3D visual guidance from video priors or ensuring motion fidelity.

title: Business World Model
summary: Businesses are increasingly adopting AI-enabled tools to improve productivity, reduce costs, and enhance products and services. However, the transformative potential of AI extends beyond automating predefined tasks: it lies in enabling intelligent systems to plan, optimize, and execute business initiatives from high-level strategic objectives. This paper introduces the concept and architecture of a business world model (BWM), a world model specialized for business and organizational environments. Inspired by world models in artificial intelligence, cognitive science, and control theory, a BWM encodes business states, dynamics, constraints, objectives, and feasible action space to support autonomous decision-making. We propose a business-semantics-centric formulation in which business states, dynamics and actions are linked to key business entities. Within this framework, agents can simulate alternative action sequences, estimate their effects on future business outcomes, and evaluate trade-offs under uncertainty. The proposed architecture integrates semantic data representations, probabilistic machine learning models, deterministic business rules, and explicit action space into a coherent structure for planning and counterfactual reasoning. Although its individual components are not new, the contribution of BWM lies in organizing them as an executable internal simulator for business initiatives. This work establishes a conceptual foundation for autonomous business systems capable of moving from instruction-based execution toward goal-driven planning and execution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出商业世界模型(BWM)的概念和架构，旨在实现从指令执行向目标驱动规划的转变。BWM将商业状态、动态、约束、目标和行动空间编码为可执行的内部模拟器，使AI代理能够模拟行动序列并评估商业结果。
AI.motivation: 企业采用AI工具虽然能提高生产力，但其变革潜力远未充分发挥。当前的AI系统主要执行预定义任务，而缺乏从高层战略目标出发进行规划、优化和执行的能力。这促使作者探索一种能够支持自主业务决策的新型框架。
AI.method: 提出以商业语义为中心的 formulation，将商业状态、动态和行动与关键业务实体相链接。架构整合了：(1)语义数据表示；(2)概率机器学习模型；(3)确定性业务规则；(4)显式行动空间，形成统一的模拟器结构。
AI.result: 构建了一个可执行的内部业务模拟器，支持代理模拟替代行动序列、估计对未来商业结果的影响，并在不确定性下评估权衡。为实现从指令执行向目标驱动规划的商业AI系统奠定了概念基础。
AI.conclusion: BWM的核心贡献在于将现有AI组件（语义表示、ML模型、业务规则、行动空间）有机组织为支持规划和反事实推理的统一框架。这一创新为开发能够自主规划和执行业务举措的AI系统提供了可行的架构路径。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Business World Model (BWM) - a business simulation and decision-making framework for AI agents to perform goal-driven planning in commercial settings. It has NO relevance to the Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion research field. The application domain is completely different: business simulation vs 3D human motion generation. The methods are unrelated: business rules/semantic representation vs video generation/VLM for motion synthesis. The pain points are entirely different: business decision-making vs extracting visual guidance from video priors and cross-modal alignment for motion generation.

title: LLM-Mediated Demand Response Coordination in Smart Microgrids
comment: Accepted for publication in 18th International Conference on Sustainability in Energy and Buildings (SEB-26), to appear in Springer Nature proceedings (KES Smart Innovation Systems and Technologies). The final authenticated version will be available online at Springer
summary: Effective demand response in smart microgrids requires prosumers to cooperate voluntarily under strategic self-interest, a coordination problem structurally equivalent to a repeated Prisoner's Dilemma on a social network. This paper presents a multi-agent simulation in which a Large Language Model (LLM) Influence Compiler issues structured demand-response directives to a population of heterogeneous prosumer agents, each governed by a hybrid decision architecture combining game-theoretic base probability (derived from payoff history, neighbour imitation, and exploitation memory) with LLM narrative evaluation of incoming coordination signals. The hybrid architecture resolves a key methodological challenge: LLMs aligned via Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) exhibit strong cooperation bias when used as direct decision-makers, producing flat dynamics regardless of grid conditions. By separating strategic reasoning from grounded narrative evaluation, the model generates realistic prosumer behaviour across six personality archetypes, with baseline cooperation near 50% and clear differentiation under influence. Compiled structured directives achieve 33.3% demand-curtailment cooperation versus 27.0% for unstructured messaging and 28.0% for a no-intervention baseline ($Δ_\mathrm{comp} = +0.063$), with the advantage preserved across both grounded and idealized agent substrates ($Δ= +0.083$) and across all resistance levels ($R = 0.1$ to $0.7$). Hub-targeted dissemination via high-centrality network nodes outperforms peripheral or random targeting, confirming that grid topology provides mechanistic amplification independent of message content. These results suggest that structured LLM compilation, grounded agent reasoning, and network-aware targeting are complementary design principles for scalable, interpretable demand-response coordination in smart-city energy systems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究智能微电网中需求响应的协调问题，将用户自愿合作建模为社交网络上的重复囚徒困境。提出LLM Influence Compiler结合混合决策架构（博弈论基础概率+LLM叙事评估），通过结构化指令实现33.3%合作率，显著优于非结构化信息（27.0%）和无干预基线（28.0%）。验证了网络拓扑的中心性放大效应。
AI.motivation: 智能微电网的有效需求响应需要prosumers在战略性自我利益下自愿合作，这是一个典型的协调问题。传统方法中RLHF对齐的LLM作为直接决策者会产生合作偏见，导致动力学扁平化。需要一种新方法来生成现实的用户行为并提高需求响应合作率。
AI.method: 构建多智能体模拟系统：1)LLM Influence Compiler发出结构化需求响应指令；2)异构prosumer智能体采用混合决策架构（博弈论基础概率+LLM叙事评估）；3)测试六种人格原型；4)比较结构化指令、非结构化信息、无干预基线；5)验证网络拓扑效应。
AI.result: 结构化指令合作率33.3%，非结构化27.0%，无干预28.0%（Δ_comp=+0.063）；优势在多种条件下保持（Δ=+0.083，R=0.1-0.7）；hub-targeted传播优于peripheral或random targeting，证实网络拓扑的放大效应。
AI.conclusion: 结构化LLM编译、扎根智能体推理、网络感知目标是可扩展、可解释的需求响应协调的互补设计原则，为智慧城市能源系统提供新方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper addresses LLM-mediated coordination in smart microgrids (energy systems/game theory), while the research profile is Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion (3D motion generation from video/text). The application domains are entirely different - energy systems vs computer graphics. Although both use LLMs, this paper applies them to multi-agent game-theoretic coordination, not to video generation, visual feature extraction, or 3D motion synthesis. The methods, pain points, and goals have no overlap with the text-to-motion research field.

title: WHU-Infra3D: A Full-stack Multi-modal Dataset and Benchmark for 3D Roadside Infrastructure Inventory
summary: The paradigm of digital twin cities is shifting from coarse visual mapping toward more precise and actionable digitization of urban assets. However, existing datasets predominantly focus on coarse visual perception, lacking the strict multi-modal alignment and attribute and status diagnosis required for automated infrastructure maintenance. To bridge this gap, we introduce WHU-Infra3D, a large-scale, multi-modal benchmark dataset dedicated to roadside infrastructure inventory. Covering 53.8 km across three cities, WHU-Infra3D uniquely integrates panoramic imagery and LiDAR point clouds with rigorous 2D-3D instance association and cross-frame tracking. Comprising over 175k multi-view 2D bounding boxes alongside thousands of 3D infrastructure instances, the dataset provides over 181k detailed attribute and status annotations (e.g., rust, occlusion) to empower operational health assessment. We establish comprehensive baselines across five core tasks: 2D detection, 2D cross-view matching, 3D geo-identification, 3D point cloud segmentation, and attribute recognition. Extensive evaluations expose significant cross-city domain gaps and inherent vulnerabilities of current models on long-tailed defective statuses, establishing WHU-Infra3D as an essential testbed for advancing scalable, AI-driven urban infrastructure inventory and lifecycle management. The WHU-Infra3D dataset is available at https://github.com/WHU-USI3DV/WHU-Infra3D.

AI.tldr: WHU-Infra3D是一个大规模、多模态的路侧基础设施普查数据集，覆盖3个城市共53.8公里，集成全景影像与LiDAR点云，包含超过175k个2D边界框、数千个3D实例和181k详细属性状态标注，用于支持城市基础设施全生命周期管理的AI驱动普查。
AI.motivation: 现有数字孪生城市数据集主要关注粗粒度视觉映射，缺乏自动化基础设施维护所需的严格多模态对齐和属性状态诊断能力，难以支撑AI驱动的城市基础设施普查和维护工作。
AI.method: 构建包含全景影像、LiDAR点云的多模态数据集，建立2D-3D实例关联和跨帧跟踪，开展2D检测、2D跨视图匹配、3D地理识别、3D点云分割和属性识别五个核心任务的基线实验。
AI.result: 数据集揭示了显著的跨城市域差距和当前模型在长尾缺陷状态识别上的固有脆弱性，为规模化AI城市基础设施普查提供了重要测试平台。
AI.conclusion: WHU-Infra3D填补了城市基础设施多模态普查数据集的空白，为推动可扩展的AI驱动城市基础设施普查和全生命周期管理提供了关键数据基础和基准。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D roadside infrastructure inventory dataset (urban infrastructure普查), completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion field. While both involve 2D images and 3D point clouds, the application domain is entirely different - infrastructure mapping vs human motion generation. The paper doesn't address any Text-to-Motion pain points (video-to-motion guidance, VLM motion supervision, cross-modal text-video-motion alignment, motion naturalness). This is a domain mismatch: infrastructure computer vision vs generative motion synthesis.

title: Deployment-Time Memorization in Foundation-Model Agents
summary: Foundation-model agents are increasingly long-lived systems that remember users across interactions, making memorization an explicit deployment-time function rather than solely a property of model weights. Existing work addresses parametric memorization or audits fixed memory configurations, but does not characterize how memory-design choices jointly shape personalization utility, extraction risk, and deletion fidelity. We study this surface as deployment-time memorization, formulating agent memory as a privacy-utility frontier measured by Personalization Recall (PR) and Adversarial Extraction Rate (AER), and sweeping three memory-design knobs: summarization aggressiveness, retrieval breadth (k), and deletion mode. We further introduce the Forgetting Residue Score (FRS) to quantify whether deleted information remains recoverable from derived memory tiers. On LongMemEval, key-fact summarization reduces canary extraction by 76% on Gemma 3 12B and 64% on GPT-4o-mini while preserving nearly all personalization recall; critically, once content is compressed away, increasing k no longer restores leakage. The same compression, however, induces a deletion-fidelity failure: raw-only deletion leaves derived summary copies recoverable in approximately 20% of instances, and only full-pipeline purge or tombstone redaction drives worst-tier residue to zero. Together, these results establish that persistent agent memory must be evaluated as a first-class memorization mechanism -- assessed by what it helps agents recall, what it makes extractable, and what it can truly erase.

AI.tldr: 本文研究基础模型智能体的部署时记忆机制，通过三个内存设计旋钮（摘要 aggressiveness、检索广度 k、删除模式）分析个性化效用、信息提取风险和删除保真度的权衡。在 LongMemEval 上，关键事实摘要可将在 Gemma 3 12B 上的金丝雀提取降低 76%，GPT-4o-mini 上降低 64%，同时保留几乎所有个性化记忆；内容压缩后增加 k 无法恢复泄露。但压缩会导致删除保真度失败：仅删除原始内容会在约 20% 实例中留下可恢复的摘要副本，只有完整管道清除或墓碑编辑才能将残留降至零。
AI.motivation: 基础模型智能体是越来越长寿的系统，在交互中记住用户，使记忆成为明确的部署时功能而非仅是模型权重属性。现有工作解决参数记忆或审计固定内存配置，但未表征内存设计选择如何共同影响个性化效用、提取风险和删除保真度。
AI.method: 将智能体记忆表述为隐私-效用前沿，用个性化召回率（PR）和对抗提取率（AER）衡量； sweep 三个内存设计旋钮：摘要 aggressiveness、检索广度（k）和删除模式；引入遗忘残留分数（FRS）量化删除信息是否可从衍生记忆层恢复；在 LongMemEval 上评估。
AI.result: 关键事实摘要使 Gemma 3 12B 的金丝雀提取减少 76%、GPT-4o-mini 减少 64%，同时保留几乎所有个性化召回；内容压缩后增加 k 不再恢复泄露；仅原始删除会在约 20% 实例中留下可恢复的衍生摘要副本；只有完整管道清除或墓碑编辑才能将最差层残留降至零。
AI.conclusion: 持久智能体记忆必须作为一类记忆机制进行评估——按其帮助智能体召回的内容、使其可提取的内容及其可真正删除的内容来评估。

title: ABot-Earth 0.5: Generative 3D Earth Model
comment: From Amap-cvlab, Alibaba. Official page: https://abot-earth.amap.com/
summary: We present ABot-Earth 0.5, a generative 3D framework designed to synthesize vast, seamless 3D environments from ubiquitous, geospatially referenced satellite imagery. To achieve this, we propose a novel generative model formulated directly with the 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) representation. The model is trained on a diverse corpus of existing real-world urban reconstructions, learning to generate realistic geometry and textures. At inference, it synthesizes novel 3D scenes conditioned solely on satellite imagery at a scalable rate of under 10 minutes per square kilometer, while demonstrating exceptional realism. The framework is designed for accessibility, with integrated hierarchical level-of-detail (LOD) structures that permit real-time, interactive visualization on web-based map engines. This high-fidelity simulation sandbox effectively mitigates the sim-to-real domain gap, enabling critical downstream Embodied AI applications like closed-loop UAV navigation. By providing an ultra-low-cost and high-efficiency solution, ABot-Earth 0.5 significantly lowers the technical and financial barriers to large-scale 3D reconstruction and empowers the future of global digital earth visualization.

AI.tldr: ABot-Earth 0.5是一个生成式3D框架，利用3D高斯溅射（3DGS）表示从卫星影像合成大规模无缝3D环境，可在10分钟内每平方公里生成高真实感场景。
AI.motivation: 旨在降低大规模3D重建的技术和成本门槛，支持 embodied AI 应用（如闭环无人机导航），弥合仿真与真实之间的领域差距。
AI.method: 提出一种基于3DGS表示的新型生成模型，在多样化城市场景重建数据上训练推理时仅需卫星影像即可生成新颖3D场景，并集成层级LOD结构实现实时交互可视化。
AI.result: 可扩展生成速率低于10分钟/平方公里，具有极高真实感，支持Web地图引擎实时交互显示，有效降低领域差距。
AI.conclusion: ABot-Earth 0.5以极低成本高效率方案显著降低大规模3D重建门槛，为全球数字地球可视化未来发展奠定基础。

Only shares very general computer graphics/3D context.

title: Exploratory Responsiveness and Adaptive Rigidity under AI-Assisted Optimization
summary: This paper develops a theory of exploratory adaptation under AI-assisted optimization. The central argument is that the long-run adaptive effects of AI systems depend critically on how predictive assistance interacts with exploratory responsiveness itself. We formalize this mechanism using a dynamical framework in which cognitive, institutional, and technological systems evolve over rugged epistemic landscapes characterized by multiple locally reinforced configurations. A central state variable in the model is adaptive responsiveness, which measures the capacity of a system to traverse unfamiliar conceptual and institutional trajectories under changing conditions. Under convergent predictive regimes, AI systems substitute for exploratory engagement, reducing adaptive responsiveness and generating metastable trapping, hysteresis, premature convergence, and exploration-collapse dynamics in which systems become locally efficient but globally rigid. The framework also identifies contrasting exploration-enhancing regimes in which AI systems amplify exploratory search, conceptual traversal, and adaptive mobility. The effective substitution parameter is therefore responsiveness-dependent: systems possessing weak exploratory routines are more vulnerable to exploratory substitution, whereas systems already possessing high adaptive responsiveness may use AI assistance to expand exploratory mobility across rugged landscapes. The long-run adaptive effects of AI consequently depend not only on AI capability itself, but also on institutional structure, developmental context, and the architecture of human-machine interaction.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个AI辅助优化下的探索性适应理论，核心观点是AI系统的长期适应效果取决于预测辅助与探索性响应之间的交互机制。
AI.motivation: 理解在AI辅助优化情境下，预测性 assistance 如何与探索性响应相互作用，从而影响认知、制度和技术系统的长期适应能力。
AI.method: 使用动力学框架形式化这一机制，将认知、制度和技术系统建模为在多峰认知景观上演化的系统，引入"适应性响应"作为核心状态变量来衡量系统应对变化的能力。
AI.result: 在预测性AI regime下，AI系统会替代探索性 engagement，导致系统陷入局部最优但全局僵化的"探索崩溃"状态；而在探索增强regime下，AI系统能够放大探索性搜索。效果取决于系统的初始探索能力——探索能力弱的系统更容易被AI替代，而探索能力强的系统则可以利用AI扩展探索范围。
AI.conclusion: AI的长期适应效果不仅取决于AI本身的能力，还取决于制度结构、发展情境和人机交互架构。这一发现对于设计AI系统以促进而非抑制长期探索性适应具有重要启示。

It is NOT about Computer Graphics, NOT about Text-to-Motion generation, and uses NONE of the specified methods (video generation models like Wan Xiang/Seedance, VLM, 3D motion generation models). The application domain is completely different - it's a theoretical AI research paper about adaptation mechanisms, not computer graphics or motion synthesis. No overlap with any of the pain points (visual guidance extraction, VLM quality supervision, cross-modal alignment, motion naturalness).

title: What Spatial Memory Must Store: Occlusion as the Test for Language-Agent Memory
summary: Language-agent "memory palace" systems anchor each memory to a world coordinate, on the intuition that geometry adds something text cannot. We make that intuition testable and report three results. First, the memory-palace default of folding spatial proximity into a linear blend beside recency and importance does not help and can hurt: in a pre-registered recall experiment the shipped blend fails its own frozen test (mean Delta-Hit@5 -0.0375, Wilcoxon p=0.306), sitting at a position-blind baseline, while a geometry-led weighting wins decisively (+0.3208, p<10^-15): geometry must lead recall when the query regime is spatial. Second, memory recall and visibility must be separated: recall is occlusion-blind by design (you correctly remember the next room behind a wall), while visibility is a perception predicate over stored geometry that the live system never computed. A one-line ray-versus-voxel digital differential analyzer (DDA), re-pointed from the gaze ray the agent already casts, supplies it: text and the live FoV cone both score 0.000 on 849 behind-wall targets while cone-plus-DDA reaches 0.982 (exact McNemar p<10^-6); coordinate recall separately resolves near-duplicate locations a cosine null cannot (1.000 vs 0.533, n=150). Third, the visibility predicate is confirmed live under a git-committed pre-registration (SPMEM-OCC-LIVE-v1: eight scripted worlds, automated oracle scoring, 96 behind-wall targets, false-visible 1.000->0.000, pooled exact McNemar p=2.5x10^-29), a run that surfaced and fixed a real relay anchor defect. We concede that occlusion-needs-geometry is near-tautological; the contribution is the measurement and isolation, separating what spatial memory must store from how it is read. These pilots power a frozen confirmatory study (SPMEM-ZERO-REAL-PREREG-v1); the full human-authored multi-world study with blind raters remains future work.

AI.tldr: 研究语言-agent"记忆宫殿"系统中几何坐标的作用，验证空间几何是否能增强记忆检索。核心发现：几何必须主导recall而非辅助，visibility需要独立计算，使用DDA射线检测实现遮挡判断。
AI.motivation: 直觉认为几何为文本记忆增加"空间性"，但这一假设从未被系统验证。研究者希望将这一直觉可测试化，分离空间记忆存储与读取方式。
AI.method: 预注册实验：1)recall对比实验(默认blend vs geometry-led weighting)；2)visibility vs recall分离实验(使用DDA算法)；3)git提交的真实relay锚点缺陷修复实验。
AI.result: 1.默认blend失败(-0.0375,p=0.306)，geometry-led显著胜出(+0.3208,p<10^-15)；2.visibility用DDA达0.982 vs text/cone的0.000；3.预注册live实验确认visibilitypredicate(false-visible从1.000降至0.000,p=2.5x10^-29)。
AI.conclusion: 几何必须主导空间查询的recall；visibility需独立计算( occlusion-blind recall vs perception predicate)；贡献在于测量和隔离了空间记忆存储与读取方式，为后续完整人类实验奠定基础。

title: Generalized-CVO: Fast and Correspondence-Free Local Point Cloud Registration with Second Order Riemannian Optimization
summary: We propose a fast and correspondence-free local point cloud registration method that leverages geometric surface structure and reproducing kernel Hilbert space (RKHS) embeddings. The method represents point clouds as continuous functions with point-wise anisotropic kernels that encode local geometry. This formulation improves alignment along surface normals while relaxing alignment along tangential directions. To solve the resulting registration problem, we propose a second-order on-manifold optimization scheme with approximate Riemannian Hessians, achieving a speedup of up to 10x over the first-order solvers used in prior correspondence-free RKHS-based methods. We demonstrate improved frame-to-frame LiDAR and RGB-D tracking accuracy across diverse indoor and outdoor datasets. On a LiDAR tracking registration task in the driving domain, we achieve a reduction of $>55\%$ in both translational and rotational drift in challenging feature-sparse environments. On object registration benchmarks, we show improved robustness over ICP-based methods and further gains when refining global initialization, particularly under moderate misalignment.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种利用几何表面结构和再生核希尔伯特空间(RKHS)嵌入的快速、无对应关系的点云配准方法。该方法使用各向异性核将点云表示为连续函数,结合二阶流形优化,在特征稀疏环境中实现了显著的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 解决现有对应-free RKHS方法中计算效率低的问题,特别是在特征稀疏环境中(如LiDAR扫描)实现更稳定准确的点云配准。
AI.method: 1)使用点各向异性核将点云表示为连续函数,编码局部几何信息;2)在表面法线方向增强配准,在切线方向放松配准;3)提出二阶流形优化方案,使用近似黎曼Hessian矩阵加速求解。
AI.result: 比之前的对应-free RKHS方法提速10倍;在LiDAR跟踪任务中,平移和旋转漂移减少>55%;在目标配准基准上,相比ICP方法具有更好的鲁棒性,尤其在中度不对齐情况下。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在室内外场景的LiDAR和RGB-D跟踪中均实现了最先进的配准精度,为无对应关系的点云配准提供了高效且鲁棒的解决方案。

The research profile is about Text-to-Motion generation (generating 3D human motion from text and video), while this paper is about Point Cloud Registration for LiDAR scans and 3D reconstruction. The methods used (RKHS embedding, Riemannian optimization for point cloud registration) are unrelated to video generation models, VLMs, or 3D motion generation. There is no overlap in pain points or application areas - this is a 3D computer vision/robotics problem, not a motion synthesis problem.

title: Predictive Assistance and the Temporal Dynamics of Exploratory Compression
summary: Classical theories of cognition describe problem solving as exploratory search through structured problem spaces in which repeated interaction gradually compresses search into efficient representational structures. Predictive artificial intelligence systems introduce a distinct regime in which stabilization may occur before exploratory diversification unfolds, supplying solutions and decision trajectories prior to internally generated search. This paper develops a geometric dynamical framework in which attention evolves over a landscape of strategies shaped by stabilizing drift, endogenous exploratory perturbation, and responsiveness-gated learning. Predictive assistance is modeled as a process of exogenous exploratory compression that stabilizes trajectories before self-generated exploration broadens the accessible regions of strategy space. The framework yields three main results. First, sustained predictive stabilization reduces exploratory responsiveness by attenuating the effective influence of intrinsic perturbations even when exploratory variability remains present. Second, curvature accumulates and relaxes asymmetrically, producing hysteresis and delayed recovery of exploratory mobility after assistance withdrawal. Third, developmental outcomes depend critically on the timing of stabilization, with early intervention narrowing future exploratory traversal before broad representational diversification has occurred. The framework generates empirically testable predictions concerning exploratory entropy, premature convergence, and delayed recovery following predictive stabilization. More broadly, the results suggest that predictive systems may reshape the geometry of exploratory cognition itself.

title: SpineReport: Automated 3D Quantification and Reporting of Lumbar Spine Degeneration on MRI
summary: Lumbar spine conditions are a leading cause of disability worldwide, yet reliable quantification of degeneration from MRI remains challenging. In clinical practice, analysis is predominantly performed in two dimensions (2D), as manual three-dimensional (3D) assessment is time-consuming. However, 2D measurements suffer from limited reproducibility, particularly when anatomical structures are not aligned with the imaging plane. Existing automated approaches are often restricted to 2D, rely on discrete grading, or lack robustness and interpretability. We introduce SpineReport, an open-source, fully automated framework for comprehensive 3D morphometric analysis of lumbar spine MRI. Leveraging robust anatomical segmentations, the method extracts quantitative metrics from key structures, including the spinal canal, spinal cord, vertebrae, intervertebral discs, and foramina. These include both morphological and signal-based features, enabling cross-subject and longitudinal assessment. SpineReport further generates subject-specific reports that allow comparison with cohort distributions, improving interpretability and objective characterization of spinal morphology. Clinical relevance was evaluated against radiologist-reported severity grades for central canal, lateral recess, and foraminal stenosis. Metrics showed strong associations with central canal stenosis severity, with T2-weighted CSF signal providing the highest performance (AUC = 0.95). Canal AP diameter and area ratios also demonstrated strong correlations and high discriminative ability (AUC > 0.80). For lateral recess stenosis, associations were moderate, with lateral CSF signal being the most informative (AUC = 0.73). No significant associations were observed for foraminal stenosis despite robust region-of-interest extraction. SpineReport is released as an open-access tool: https://ivadomed.github.io/SpineReport/

AI.tldr: SpineReport是一个开源全自动的腰椎MRI 3D形态学分析框架,可提取脊柱结构(椎管、脊髓、椎间盘等)的形态和信号特征,并生成受试者特异性报告。用于椎管狭窄严重程度评估时,T2加权脑脊液信号达到AUC=0.95的优异性能。
AI.motivation: 腰椎疾病是全球致残主要原因,但MRI degeneration的可靠量化仍具挑战。临床实践中2D分析耗时且可重复性差,现有自动化方法局限于2D、依赖离散分级或缺乏鲁棒性和可解释性。
AI.method: SpineReport利用鲁棒的解剖分割,从椎管、脊髓、椎椎、椎间盘和椎间孔等关键结构提取形态和信号特征,支持跨受试者和纵向评估,并生成与队列分布比较的受试者特异性报告。
AI.result: 中央椎管狭窄: T2加权CSF信号AUC=0.95表现最优,椎管AP直径和面积比也达AUC>0.80; 侧隐窝狭窄: 侧方CSF信号AUC=0.73; 椎间孔狭窄: 无显著关联。
AI.conclusion: SpineReport在中央椎管和侧隐窝狭窄评估中展现出良好的诊断性能,尤其对中央椎管狭窄效果优异,但对椎间孔狭窄的评估仍需改进。该工具已开源发布,有望改善脊柱MRI的客观量化水平。

title: From Senses to Decisions: The Information Flow of Auditory and Visual Perception in Multimodal LLMs
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) can listen and see, but how do audio and visual signals actually travel through the network to shape an answer? Despite their growing role in research and real-world applications, the internal pathways through which audio and visual tokens influence the final prediction remain poorly understood. In this study, we examine audio-visual information flow inside Audio-Visual Large Language Models (AVLLMs), tracing how AVLLMs route, utilize, and integrate audio and visual information across two input configurations, audio-visual video and multiple interleaved audio-visual items. We find that for audio-visual video, AVLLMs follow the sequential information flow pathway established for VLMs and VideoLLMs, with audio and visual contribution flowing along this pathway in proportion to the task's reliance on each modality. In settings with multiple interleaved audio-visual items, this routing shifts to different parallel streams. Furthermore, we demonstrate that audio-visual and other token types can be discarded once their information is transferred to LLM, with minimal impact on the model's prediction or even slight improvement, generalizing across multiple tasks and datasets, enabling more efficient inference. These findings hold across multiple models and scales, Qwen2.5-Omni and Video-SALMONN2 Plus at 3B and 7B scales, leading to hypotheses on why these flow structures emerge. Together, these results deliver the first coherent picture of how AVLLMs orchestrate sound and sight inside the network and lay the groundwork for the next wave of interpretability, design, and efficiency advances in audio-visual and broader MLLMs.

AI.tldr: 研究音频-视觉大型语言模型(AVLLM)内部信息流，揭示音频和视觉信号如何在不同配置下影响最终预测，并发现可以在保持性能的同时丢弃部分模态token以提高推理效率。
AI.motivation: AVLLMs在研究和实际应用中越来越重要，但人们对其内部如何路由、利用和整合音频与视觉信息的机制知之甚少，这是理解模型行为和优化设计的关键障碍。
AI.method: 追踪AVLLMs在两种输入配置(音频-视觉视频和多模态交错项目)下的信息流动路径，分析音频和视觉token的贡献比例和路由机制，并在多个模型(Qwen2.5-Omni和Video-SALMONN2 Plus，3B和7B规模)上验证token丢弃策略的效果。
AI.result: 对于音频-视觉视频，AVLLMs遵循VLM和VideoLLM established的顺序信息流通道，音频和视觉贡献与任务对各模态的依赖程度成正比；对于多模态交错项目，信息流转向不同的并行stream；丢弃音频-视觉等token后，模型预测准确率几乎不受影响甚至略有提升，实现更高效的推理。
AI.conclusion: 这是首次揭示AVLLMs如何内在协调声音和视觉的系统研究，为音频-视觉及更广泛MLLMs的可解释性、设计和效率优化奠定了基础。

relevance_reason: The paper studies information flow in Audio-Visual LLMs for multimodal understanding, which is fundamentally different from Text-to-Motion generation in Computer Graphics. While both involve VLMs, this paper uses them for analyzing routing mechanisms in audio-visual understanding tasks, not for generating 3D human motion from text. The application domains are completely different - this is about multimodal language model interpretation, not motion synthesis. It does not address any of the specified pain points (3D visual feature extraction, motion fidelity supervision, cross-modal alignment for motion, or temporal consistency in motion synthesis).

title: A Controlled Audit of Pretraining Contamination in Public Medical Vision-Language Benchmarks
summary: Medical vision-language models (VLMs) are evaluated on public benchmarks whose images and question-answer pairs have been freely downloadable for years, yet reported accuracy assumes these examples were absent from pretraining. We audit open VLMs on SLAKE-En, PathVQA, VQA-RAD, and an auxiliary public OmniMedVQA mirror using four detector families: image-side near-neighbour overlap against PMC-OA-beta, canonical-order exchangeability, cohort-relative Min-K%++ tail enrichment, and cross-model top-K overlap. We find measurable image-side source overlap on SLAKE-En: 19.8% of images are flagged under SigLIP-B-16 and 4.2% under SigLIP-SO400M, while out-of-domain controls produce 0/2000 flags. Manual adjudication shows same-modality, same-projection matches to different patients rather than verified pixel-level duplicates, so we interpret this as source or distributional overlap rather than confirmed per-image memorization. On the text side, Qwen2.5-VL on SLAKE-En shows a canonical-order exchangeability signal that survives ordering ablation and external non-medical baselines. On the OmniMedVQA mirror, exchangeability fires for five medical and general VLMs while BLIP-2 remains clean. In contrast, cohort-relative Min-K%++ tail enrichment and cross-model top-K overlap collapse under an external pre-domain baseline: BLIP-2 reproduces the apparent positive signals despite lacking plausible medical-VQA exposure. We conclude that these cohort-relative detectors are unreliable as standalone membership-inference signals on small medical-VLM cohorts.

AI.tldr: 本文审计了医学视觉语言模型(VLM)在公共基准上的数据污染问题，使用四种检测方法发现约20%的图像存在来源重叠，但队列相对检测器作为独立成员推断信号不可靠。
AI.motivation: 医学VLM在公共基准上评估时，这些基准的图片和问答对可能已被用于预训练，导致报告的准确率因记忆而非真正泛化而被高估，需要审计数据污染问题。
AI.method: 使用四种检测器家族：图像侧近邻重叠(SigLIP-B-16/SigLIP-SO400M vs PMC-OA-beta)、规范顺序可交换性、队列相对Min-K%++尾部富集、跨模型top-K重叠。
AI.result: 在SLAKE-En上发现19.8%图像重叠(SigLIP-B-16)和4.2%(SigLIP-SO400M)；Qwen2.5-VL显示规范顺序可交换性信号；在OmniMedVQA镜像上5个VLM触发交换性；但BLIP-2在缺乏医学VQA暴露情况下复现了表面阳性信号，表明检测器不可靠。
AI.conclusion: 队列相对检测器作为小型医学VLM队列上的独立成员推断信号不可靠，需要更稳健的污染检测方法。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about auditing pretraining contamination in Medical Vision-Language benchmarks - a completely different application domain. While it uses VLM methods, the purpose is data contamination detection for medical VQA, not text-to-motion generation. The research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically generating 3D human motion from text/video, while this paper deals with medical image analysis and benchmark evaluation. None of the pain points (3D motion generation, cross-modal alignment for motion, temporal consistency) are addressed. The application domain is entirely different - medical VLM vs. computer graphics motion synthesis.

title: Less Context, Better Agents: Efficient Context Engineering for Long-Horizon Tool-Using LLM Agents
summary: Large language models deployed as autonomous agents for enterprise workflows face a key challenge: verbose tool responses from enterprise systems can cause context overflow, stale-state errors, and high inference cost. We study this problem in automated expense itemization in Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance and Operations using Model Context Protocol tools. We evaluate four GPT-5 configurations on a 50-task hotel expense benchmark: no user model, full conversation history, context pruned to the last 5 tool call/response pairs, and pruning with automated summarization. Results are averaged across 5 independent runs, with the user model held constant for the context-engineering comparison. The no-user-model baseline achieves only 8.0% complete itemization. Full-context retention improves completion to 71.0%, but consumes 1,480,996 tokens and 14.56 hours per benchmark. Pruning to the last 5 tool calls improves completion to 79.0% while reducing token use to 535,274 and runtime to 5.39 hours. Adding summarization achieves the best result: 91.6% complete itemization and 99.64% average amount itemized, with 553,374 tokens and 5.79 hours. We further report confidence intervals, effect-size analysis, sensitivity over pruning and summary windows, failure analysis, results across five expense types grouped into three categories, and cross-model evidence with Claude Sonnet 4.5. These results show that, for this class of enterprise tool-use workflow, selective retention of recent tool interactions plus compact summarization can improve both reliability and efficiency compared with full-history retention.

AI.tldr: 针对企业工作流中大型语言模型作为自主代理时面临的上下文溢出、陈旧状态错误和高推理成本问题，研究了在Microsoft Dynamics 365中自动费用明细化的应用，通过比较四种上下文管理策略（无用户模型、完整对话历史、剪枝到最近5对工具调用、剪枝+自动摘要）来评估GPT-5配置。
AI.motivation: 企业系统中冗长的工具响应会导致上下文溢出、陈旧状态错误和高推理成本，这是部署LLM作为自主代理的关键挑战。
AI.method: 在Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance and Operations中使用Model Context Protocol工具，在50项酒店费用基准测试上评估四种GPT-5配置：1)无用户模型 2)完整对话历史 3)剪枝到最近5对工具调用/响应 4)剪枝+自动摘要。结果取5次独立运行的平均值。
AI.result: 无用户模型基线仅达到8.0%完成率；完整上下文提升至71.0%，但消耗1,480,996 tokens和14.56小时；剪枝到最近5对工具调用提升至79.0%，减少到535,274 tokens和5.39小时；添加摘要达到最佳结果91.6%完成率和99.64%平均金额明细化，消耗553,374 tokens和5.79小时。
AI.conclusion: 对于这类企业工具使用工作流，选择性保留最近工具交互加上紧凑摘要可以同时提高可靠性和效率，相比完整历史保留策略表现更优。

relevance_reason: This paper is about enterprise LLM agents for financial expense itemization in Microsoft Dynamics 365, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. The application domain is entirely different: it deals with LLM context management for business workflows, not 3D human motion generation from text/video. None of the pain points (visual guidance extraction, VLM-based motion supervision, cross-modal alignment, motion naturalness) are addressed. Methods used are LLMs for tool-use rather than video generation, VLMs, or 3D motion models.

title: Interpretable Temporal Facial-Region Motion Analysis for In-the-Wild Parkinson's Disease Video Classification
comment: 22 pages, 6 figures. Submitted to Biomedical Signal Processing and Control
summary: Reduced facial expressivity is a common motor manifestation of Parkinson's disease (PD), often described as hypomimia or facial bradykinesia. This paper examines whether temporal motion descriptors extracted from facial-region keypoints can support in-the-wild PD-related video classification on the YouTubePD benchmark. Each video is represented using geometric descriptors from 14 predefined facial regions. Static geometry, normalized geometry, velocity-based descriptors, relative-velocity descriptors, and a GRU sequence baseline are compared under the same binary classification protocol. To assess stability and interpretability, the study includes seed-robustness analysis, region-level ablation, and permutation importance. The best result is obtained with normalized velocity descriptors and a Random Forest classifier, reaching a balanced accuracy of 0.826 and an AUROC of 0.855 on the held-out test split. Across 10 random seeds, this representation remains stable, with balanced accuracy of 0.810 +/- 0.018 and AUROC of 0.855 +/- 0.005. Overall, the results suggest that normalized facial-region motion is a lightweight and interpretable representation for YouTubePD video classification. The study is framed as a benchmark-level analysis and does not claim clinical severity assessment or MDS-UPDRS facial-expression scoring.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出一种基于面部区域运动描述符的帕金森病（PD）视频分类方法，在YouTubePD基准数据集上使用归一化速度描述符结合随机森林分类器达到0.826的平衡准确率和0.855的AUROC，表明面部区域运动特征是一种轻量级、可解释的PD相关视频分类表示。
AI.motivation: 帕金森病患者常表现出面部表情减少（少动症/面部运动迟缓），但目前缺乏轻量级、可解释的面部运动特征用于自动化PD相关视频分类评估。
AI.method: 从视频中提取14个预定义面部区域的几何描述符，比较静态几何、归一化几何、速度基描述符、相对速度描述符和GRU序列基线，使用随机森林分类器进行二分类。
AI.result: 归一化速度描述符结合随机森林分类器获得最佳性能：平衡准确率0.826，AUROC 0.855；10个随机种子下稳定，平衡准确率0.810±0.018，AUROC 0.855±0.005。
AI.conclusion: 归一化面部区域运动是一种轻量级、可解释的表示方法，适用于YouTubePD视频分类，但不适用于临床严重程度评估或MDS-UPDRS面部表情评分。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about Parkinson's disease classification from facial motion in medical videos, not text-to-motion generation in computer graphics. It uses random forest classifiers with hand-crafted facial region descriptors, whereas the research profile requires video generation models, VLMs, and 3D motion generation models. The only shared element is extracting motion features from video, but the goal (medical diagnosis vs. motion synthesis), domain (medical CV vs. computer graphics), and output (disease classification vs. 3D motion generation) are entirely different.

title: Minimalist Genetic Programming
summary: Genetic programming (GP) is based on two important insights. First, that any learning task can fundamentally be posed as a program induction problem, where the goal is to construct a symbolic hierarchical model that is expressed as a syntax tree. Second, to pose this task as a search problem, and use evolution to locate the desired model. Since it was proposed, GP has produced notable results in a wide range of tasks and problem domains. This work presents an alternative view by modifying the second core insight of GP, posing the problem as a syntactic derivation task instead. In particular, this paper presents Minimalist Genetic Programming (MGP), an algorithm that like GP is biologically inspired, but instead of evolution it takes inspiration from the Minimalist Program to human language, in which syntax is understood as an optimal solution to the problem of linking two other mental systems. In minimalism, the core computational process is a binary set formation operator called $MERGE$, than can be used to incrementally construct complex syntactic structures using a simple Markovian process. MGP is able to discover the core building blocks of the symbolic expressions, and to incrementally combined them using $MERGE$. The proposed system is benchmarked on symbolic regression tasks that are known to be difficult to solve with standard GP systems because of the propensity for bloat. Results show that when a proper lexicon of atomic syntactic objects are chosen, MGP is able to consistently produce the exact ground truth model on a set of symbolic regression where standard GP struggles to do the same. The insights provided by minimalism are shown to be relevant to the problem of program induction, and should be explored further based on the potential exhibited by MGP in this work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为极简遗传编程(MGP)的新方法,将语言学中的极简主义理论与程序归纳相结合。MGP使用MERGE算子而非传统进化的方式构建符号表达式,并在标准GP难以处理的符号回归任务上进行测试。
AI.motivation: 传统GP存在两个核心问题:一是将学习任务表述为程序归纳问题,二是使用进化进行搜索。作者认为第二个核心见解可以改进,因此引入语言学中的极简主义理论,将问题重新表述为句法派生任务,以解决标准GP中常见的膨胀(bloat)问题。
AI.method: MGP算法借鉴语言学中的极简主义程序,该理论认为句法是将符号系统链接的最优解。其核心计算过程是二元集合形成算子MERGE,可以通过简单的马尔可夫过程增量构建复杂句法结构。实验在已知标准GP难以解决的符号回归任务上进行测试,选择适当的原子符号对象词典。
AI.result: 当选择合适的原子句法对象词典时,MGP能够一致地产生精确的真值模型,而标准GP在相同任务上难以做到这一点。这表明极简主义的见解与程序归纳问题相关,且具有进一步探索的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 极简主义的MERGE算子为程序归纳问题提供了新的解决思路,MGP在符号回归任务上展示了优于标准GP的性能,尤其是在避免膨胀问题方面。该方法值得进一步探索和研究,以拓展程序归纳领域的研究方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Genetic Programming for symbolic regression - completely different application domain from Text-to-Motion. The research profile focuses on Computer Graphics for generating 3D human motion from text/video using video generation models, VLMs, and motion generation models. This paper addresses evolutionary computation for linguistics and symbolic regression problems, not motion synthesis. It uses different methods (genetic programming with MERGE operators) and doesn't address any of the pain points (3D feature extraction, VLM supervision, cross-modal alignment, motion naturalness). The application domains are entirely unrelated.

title: Maximum Matching Accuracy: An Instance Segmentation Evaluation Metric Utilizing Globally Optimal Matching
summary: Reliable evaluation of instance segmentation models requires metrics that accurately and consistently reflect segmentation quality. However, the metrics most widely used in biological imaging carry fundamental mathematical weaknesses: hard Intersection-over-Union (IoU) thresholds that produce discontinuous, low sensitivity scoring; per-object normalization that distorts scores under object size variation; and greedy or one-to-many matching procedures that yield non-optimal, order-dependent correspondences. Together, these properties produce unintuitive and unreliable model rankings under common failure modes such as split cells, merged cells, and cell boundary imprecision. We propose Maximum Matching Accuracy (MMA), a threshold-free continuous metric that finds a globally optimal one-to-one matching between predicted and ground truth objects and aggregates total overlap using per-pixel normalization. We evaluate MMA against AP@50, PQ, SEG, and AJI across three experiments: synthetic failure cases, progressive corruption tests, and a model ranking comparison. MMA produces scores that are more stable, more sensitive, and more interpretable than existing alternatives, providing a principled foundation for fair instance segmentation benchmarking in biological cell imaging.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的实例分割评估指标MMA（最大匹配精度），解决生物细胞成像中现有指标（AP@50、PQ、SEG、AJI）的根本性缺陷，包括硬IoU阈值导致的不连续评分、per-object归一化导致的尺寸偏差、以及贪婪匹配导致的顺序依赖性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有生物成像指标存在三大数学缺陷：1）硬IoU阈值产生低敏感度的 discontinuous 评分；2）per-object 归一化在目标尺寸变化时导致评分失真；3）贪婪或一对多匹配产生非最优、顺序依赖的对应关系。这些缺陷导致常见失败模式（细胞分裂、细胞合并、边界模糊）下的排名不符合直觉。
AI.method: 提出MMA指标：1）无阈值、连续评分；2）寻找预测与真值之间的全局最优一对一匹配；3）使用per-pixel归一化聚合总重叠。在三个实验中进行评估：合成失败案例、渐进损坏测试、模型排名比较。
AI.result: MMA产生的评分比现有替代方案更稳定、更敏感、更易解释，为生物细胞成像中的实例分割基准测试提供了原则性基础。
AI.conclusion: MMA是一个更公平、更可靠的实例分割评估指标，有望成为生物细胞成像领域基准测试的标准指标。

relevance_reason: This paper is about instance segmentation evaluation metrics for biological cell imaging, which is completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion research field. Although both involve computer vision, the application domains are entirely different: bio-medical imaging vs motion generation/synthesis. The paper addresses issues with segmentation metrics in microscopy, not any aspect of text-to-motion generation, video priors, VLM-based supervision, or cross-modal alignment for 3D motion synthesis.

title: Regimes: An Auditable, Held-Out-Gated Improvement Loop Demonstrated on LongMemEval with ActiveGraph
comment: 30 pages, 5 figures. Code and committed runs: https://github.com/yoheinakajima/regimes
summary: Autonomous improvement loops are hard to trust because the improvement process is usually external scaffolding bolted onto the agent: failures go unlogged, diagnoses cannot be replayed, and promote-or-discard decisions land in a side database rather than the agent's own history. We show that an event-sourced agent runtime removes that friction and turns controlled improvement into a first-class workflow. When the agent's state is a deterministic projection of an append-only event log, failures are recorded, a run replays exactly from its log, candidate patches scope to typed pipeline seams, gates are auditable, and every promotion or discard is itself an event. We demonstrate this with Regimes, a loop on the ActiveGraph runtime that diagnoses failed evaluations, proposes a repair at a pipeline point, and promotes it only after static checks, sandbox execution, in-sample evaluation, and held-out validation. The loop is target-agnostic: the same control flow runs against different tasks through a common interface. On LongMemEval-S the dominant failure is not retrieval but reconciliation: the evidence is already in the assembled context, yet the reader answers incorrectly. Across five seeded held-out splits, Regimes discovers reader-prompt repairs that improve final held-out accuracy by +0.05 to +0.10 in four splits and +0.01 in one over-promotion split; two splits are individually significant (seed 5 unadjusted for its sequential promotion structure), and the pooled count is descriptive only, since the splits share one 500-question pool. The durable contributions are ActiveGraph as an auditable substrate that makes controlled improvement loops tractable, the held-out-gated loop it supports, the failure-regime taxonomy routing each failure to a pipeline location (whose marginal value over an unrouted baseline is the primary open question), and the prompt-as-discovery-probe hypothesis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Regimes系统，一个基于事件溯源架构的自主改进循环框架，解决了传统改进流程外部化导致的可信性问题，使受控改进成为一等公民工作流。
AI.motivation: 自主改进循环难以信任，因为改进过程通常是外部脚手架，失败未记录、诊断无法回放、提升或丢弃决策存在于侧数据库而非智能体自身历史中。
AI.method: 使用事件溯源的智能体运行时ActiveGraph，使智能体状态成为仅追加事件日志的确定性投影。Regimes循环包括：在管道点诊断失败评估、提出修复建议，经过静态检查、沙箱执行、样本内评估和留出验证后提升。跨五个留出测试集进行评估。
AI.result: 在LongMemEval-S数据集上，主要失败类型不是检索而是协调：证据已在 assembled context 中，但阅读器回答错误。Regimes发现四组修复提升留出准确率+0.05至+0.01，一组提升+0.01；两组单独显著。
AI.conclusion: 贡献包括：ActiveGraph作为可审计 substrate 使受控改进循环可行、其支持的留出门控循环、失败机制分类路由（将每种失败路由至管道位置）、以及提示即发现探测假设。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM agent architectures and autonomous improvement loops (using event sourcing with ActiveGraph) for software engineering tasks (LongMemEval memory benchmark). It has NO relevance to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. Completely different application domain: LLM agents vs 3D motion generation from text. The methods (event sourcing, agent frameworks) are unrelated to video generation models, VLMs, or 3D motion generation models needed for the text-to-motion research profile.

title: Improving PET/CT-Based Whole-Body Lesion Segmentation Using Prediction Uncertainty-Augmented Models
summary: Accurate lesion segmentation from whole-body Positron Emission Tomography (PET)/Computed Tomography (CT) scans is essential for cancer staging and treatment planning. PET provides functional metabolic information with different radiotracers, while CT offers anatomical localization. Lesion delineation from PET/CT imaging is clinically challenging due to subtle imaging features, confounders, and inter-reader variability. Existing deep learning approaches suffer from training-related stochasticity, inconsistent predictions, missed lesions in high tumor-burden cases, and lack uncertainty quantification, limiting their clinical reliability. Using nnU-Net as a baseline, we propose an uncertainty-aware framework for whole-body PET/CT lesion segmentation that integrates (1) Bayesian ensembling to reduce training stochasticity, (2) voxel-wise uncertainty quantification with epistemic and aleatoric decomposition, and (3) epistemic uncertainty-augmented training to improve lesion detection. Two public datasets, AutoPET-III (1,611 scans) and Deep-PSMA (200 scans), comprising FDG and PSMA studies across multiple cancer types, are used for training and evaluation. Bayesian ensembling improves robustness and performance over deterministic nnU-Net models on the unseen AutoPET-III test set. Uncertainty maps highlight regions of model disagreement and correlate with misclassifications, particularly false positives. Uncertainty-augmented training improves lesion recovery at the cost of increased FPVol, reflecting a precision-recall trade-off. A case-adaptive routing strategy further improves Dice by selecting between the base and augmented models. To our knowledge, this is the first study to systematically investigate uncertainty quantification in multi-tracer, pan-cancer PET/CT segmentation and to combine Bayesian ensembling with uncertainty-aware modeling for this task.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于nnU-Net的不确定性感知全身PET/CT病变分割框架，通过贝叶斯集成、不确定性分解和增强训练来提高分割的临床可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法存在训练随机性、预测不一致、遗漏病变及缺乏不确定性量化等问题，限制了临床可靠性。
AI.method: 使用nnU-Net作为基线框架，集成(1)贝叶斯集成减少训练随机性，(2) voxel-wise不确定性量化（认知不确定性和偶然不确定性分解），(3)认知不确定性增强训练改善病变检测。使用AutoPET-III(1611例)和Deep-PSMA(200例)两个公共数据集训练和评估。
AI.result: 贝叶斯集成在未见过的AutoPET-III测试集上提高了鲁棒性和性能。不确定性图突出显示了模型分歧区域并与误分类相关。增强训练提高了病变检出率但增加了假阳性体积，体现了精确率-召回率权衡。自适应路由策略进一步改善了Dice得分。
AI.conclusion: 这是首次系统研究多追踪剂、泛癌PET/CT分割中的不确定性量化，并将贝叶斯集成与不确定性感知建模相结合。

relevance_reason: This paper is about PET/CT-based medical lesion segmentation, which is in the medical imaging domain. The research profile is specifically about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion from text and video). These are completely different application domains with no meaningful overlap. While the paper does use uncertainty quantification and Bayesian methods, these are applied to medical image segmentation tasks (nnU-Net for PET/CT), not video generation, vision-language models, or 3D motion generation. The pain points are entirely different (clinical reliability vs. cross-modal alignment and motion naturalness).

title: RealMath-Eval: Why SOTA Judges Struggle with Real Human Reasoning
comment: Code available at https://github.com/RicharMd/RealMath-Eval , Data available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/RicharMd/RealMath-Eval
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved near-perfect performance in \emph{solving} high-school mathematics, their ability to \emph{evaluate} the diverse reasoning processes of real human students remains under-examined. To bridge this gap, we introduce \textbf{RealMath-Eval}, a rigorously annotated benchmark of 224 real-world exam responses from high schools. Our initial evaluation reveals that even state-of-the-art LLM judges struggle significantly on this task, exhibiting a high Mean Squared Error ($\sim$2.96) against expert human grading. To probe a plausible explanation, we contrast this performance with a control setting where the same judges evaluate synthetic LLM-generated solutions. We identify a stark ``Evaluation Gap'': judges are considerably more accurate and consistent on synthetic text (MSE $\sim$1.17) but struggle to generalize to authentic student reasoning. Through semantic embedding analysis, we find that synthetic errors suffer from a ``structural collapse'' into predictable, low-dimensional linear subspaces, whereas human errors form a more diverse error space. Furthermore, generative probability probes suggest that human reasoning involves significantly higher information-theoretic surprisal, indicating that student reasoning transitions are more out-of-distribution for current models. Finally, we find that surface-level style transfer fails to close this gap. Our findings suggest that current LLM evaluation pipelines relying heavily on synthetic data may not adequately capture the diversity of authentic student mathematical reasoning.
