title: BiWM: Advancing Open-Source Interactive Video World Models with Bidirectional Autoregression
summary: Transitioning bidirectional video diffusion models into an autoregressive paradigm improves the interactivity of video world models, but existing causal pipelines need many stages (control fine-tuning, autoregressive training, causal initialization, few-step distillation) and still trail bidirectional models in quality due to error accumulation. Recent world models such as Yume-1.5 and Matrix-Game-3.0 instead adopt a bidirectional autoregressive approach, gaining fidelity and stable long-horizon rollout from self-correcting error propagation, yet open-source frameworks (e.g., minWM) support only causal models. We present BiWM, the first full-stack framework for interactive video world models under the bidirectional autoregressive paradigm, jointly optimizing generation quality and inference speed. From a pretrained video backbone, BiWM injects camera control by fine-tuning, then runs a few-step Distribution Matching Distillation (DMD) stage that turns the backbone into an action/camera-controllable world model: just two training stages instead of four in minWM, converging in a few hundred steps on 8xH200 GPUs. A single recipe spans Wan2.1-1.3B, Wan2.2-5B, HunyuanVideo-1.5-8B, and LTX-2.3-22B, and also supports secondary fine-tuning of existing bidirectional models. BiWM enables real-world camera control where minWM loses controllability, integrates pluggable history compression (FramePack-style and PackForcing-style) for long rollouts, and offers an optional NVFP4 4-bit training/inference pipeline. To counter DMD's mode-seeking degradation, we add GAN and mass-covering forward-KL objectives that preserve scene dynamics. We open-source BiWM for resource-constrained research and high-fidelity environment simulation.

AI.tldr: BiWM是首个支持双向自回归视频世界模型的全栈框架，通过微调+两步DMD蒸馏替代传统四阶段流程，实现高质量相机控制和长时序生成
AI.motivation: 现有因果管道需要4个训练阶段且质量受限；开源框架minWM仅支持因果模型；需要一种高效的双向自回归框架来平衡生成质量与推理速度
AI.method: 从预训练视频主干微调注入相机控制→两步DMD蒸馏转化为动作/相机可控世界模型；集成FramePack/PackForcing历史压缩；NVFP4 4位训练/推理管道；添加GAN和前向KL目标防止模式崩塌
AI.result: 仅需两个训练阶段（几百步在8xH200 GPU上），支持Wan2.1-1.3B到LTX-2.3-22B等多模型；实现minWM无法做到的实时相机控制
AI.conclusion: BiWM为资源受限研究和高质量环境模拟提供了开源解决方案，在生成质量和推理速度间达到良好平衡

relevance_reason: The paper is about Video World Models for interactive video generation with camera control, NOT Text-to-Motion generation. While it mentions video generation models like Wan2.1 (also in the profile), the application domain is fundamentally different - this is about generating 2D video content, not 3D human motion from text. The pain points differ significantly: the paper addresses camera control in video generation, not extracting 3D visual guidance from 2D video, VLM-based quality supervision for motion, or cross-modal alignment for 3D motion synthesis. Using similar diffusion methods for video generation vs motion generation are different application domains. Only the visual feature extraction aspect has loose relevance, but the core focus is wrong.

title: Supervised Fine-tuning with Synthetic Rationale Data Hurts Real-World Disease Prediction
summary: Supervised fine-tuning with synthetic rationale data is widely assumed to improve language model performance on clinical prediction tasks by teaching models not just what to predict but why. We test this assumption on five-year Alzheimer's disease and related dementias (ADRD) prediction from longitudinal health histories. Across a large-scale controlled experiment of 504 configurations, we find that rationale-based SFT consistently and substantially hurts prediction performance relative to label-only fine-tuning. The degradation persists across model families and data scales, and is not resolved by using a reasoning-oriented base model. Crucially, the failure is not explained by poor rationale quality: human expert annotation confirms that the generated rationales are medically accurate and faithfully grounded in patient-specific evidence, and few-shot experiments show that the same rationales improve performance when used as inference-time demonstrations rather than training targets. We identify the root cause as a structural conflict between narrative plausibility and discriminative optimization. We hope our work paves the path toward a more precise understanding of when and how rationale-based supervision helps and when it does not, guiding the responsible development of language models for high-stakes clinical prediction.

AI.tldr: 研究挑战了一个广泛假设：使用合成理由数据对临床预测任务进行监督微调能否提升语言模型性能。研究通过504个配置的大规模控制实验，测试了基于理由的监督微调在五年阿尔茨海默病及相关痴呆症(ADRD)预测任务中的效果。结果发现，基于理由的SFT始终且显著地损害预测性能，且这一现象在不同模型家族和数据规模下均存在，使用推理导向的基线模型也无法解决。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在验证一个广泛假设：在临床预测任务中，通过合成理由数据进行监督微调(SFT)不仅教会模型预测什么，还教会模型为什么预测，从而提升语言模型性能。作者希望探索这种基于理由的监督方法是否真的有效。
AI.method: 研究设计了一个包含504个配置的大规模控制实验，使用纵向健康历史数据预测五年内的阿尔茨海默病及相关痴呆症(ADRD)。实验测试了多种配置，并使用人类专家验证生成理由的医学准确性，同时进行了少样本实验比较推理时间演示与训练目标的差异。
AI.result: 研究发现基于理由的SFT始终且显著地损害预测性能，相对仅使用标签的微调表现更差。这种性能下降在不同模型家族和数据规模下均存在，且使用推理导向的基线模型也无法解决。然而，有趣的是：人类专家确认生成的理由在医学上是准确的，且相同理由在作为推理时间演示使用时反而能提升性能。根本原因在于叙事 plausibility 与判别优化之间的结构性冲突。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了一个重要发现：基于理由的监督微调在临床预测任务中可能适得其反。研究希望为更精确理解基于理由的监督何时有效、何时无效提供指导，以促进高风险临床预测语言模型的负责任开发。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about medical disease prediction (Alzheimer's disease) using language models, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion from text descriptions). The application domains are entirely different - medical clinical prediction vs computer graphics motion synthesis. Despite both using "language models" and "synthetic data," the purpose and domain have no overlap.

title: iSAGE: A Human-in-the-Loop Framework for Remote Sensing Semantic Segmentation via Sparse Point Supervision
summary: Semantic segmentation in remote sensing requires costly pixel-level annotations, and nearly every problem demands a new dataset since models rarely transfer across sensors, platforms, or geographies. Existing human-in-the-loop frameworks expand sparse clicks into dense supervision via auxiliary machinery (pseudo-labels, propagation, CRFs, foundation-model prompts, auxiliary heads), all operating on the model's predictive distribution. A confidently wrong pixel is indistinguishable from a confidently correct one in that distribution by construction, so no rule reading it can separate the two; the distinguishing signal is external to the model. This paper hypothesizes that expert clicks targeting confident model errors, not arbitrary pixels, suffice to match dense supervision, with no expansion machinery. iSAGE (Iterative Sparse Annotation Guided by Expert) realizes this hypothesis on an integrated open-source platform, where an error-weighted loss amplifies the gradient at each click and the annotation record itself is the dataset, extensible, correctable, and auditable. Experiments use a minimum-effort regime: at most one labeled pixel per class per frame. On BsB Aerial, iSAGE recovers 97.2% of dense supervision (74.79% mIoU on 0.040% of pixels) with contrasting class dynamics: amorphous classes (permeable areas) saturate from the seed, while small classes (cars) require late-iteration effort. On ISPRS Vaihingen (external benchmark), iSAGE reaches 76.78% mIoU with 0.011% of pixels, matching the dense baseline (76.65%) and exceeding all published methods. Under the same pipeline, four output-reading mechanisms (oracle entropy across budgets 1--100x, pseudo-labels across thresholds 0.90--0.99, CRF-based propagation, uniform random) plateau 7.4 to 14.5 pp below iSAGE. Across 31 surveyed methods, iSAGE is the only iterative human-in-the-loop framework operating without auxiliary machinery.

AI.tldr: iSAGE是一种无需辅助 machinery 的迭代稀疏标注框架，通过专家点击定位模型高置信度错误区域，在极低标注成本（每类每帧仅1个像素）下达到与密集标注相当的分割性能。
AI.motivation: 遥感语义分割依赖密集像素标注，成本高昂；现有human-in-the-loop方法依赖辅助 machinery（伪标签、CRF等），但这些辅助手段无法区分"自信的错误"与"自信的正确"，因为它们都基于模型的预测分布。
AI.method: 提出iSAGE框架：(1)专家点击定位模型高置信度错误而非任意像素；(2)误差加权损失放大点击位置的梯度；(3)迭代优化，标注记录即为数据集。在BsB Aerial和ISPRS Vaihingen数据集上验证。
AI.result: 在BsB Aerial上：仅用0.040%像素达到74.79% mIoU，恢复97.2%密集标注性能。ISPRS Vaihingen上：0.011%像素达到76.78% mIoU，与密集基线(76.65%)持平，超过所有已发表方法。对比四种输出读取机制（oracle entropy、伪标签、CRF、随机），iSAGE均优7.4-14.5个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 专家点击定位高置信度错误可替代密集标注，无需任何辅助machinery。iSAGE是首个且唯一的迭代human-in-the-loop框架。

relevance_reason: This paper is about remote sensing semantic segmentation with sparse point supervision, which is entirely different from the Text-to-Motion research field. The application domains are completely unrelated: one focuses on generating 3D human motion from text descriptions in Computer Graphics, while the other deals with aerial/satellite image segmentation in Remote Sensing. The methods (segmentation models, annotation) have no overlap with the Text-to-Motion methods (video generation models, VLMs, 3D motion generation). This is a different field entirely.

title: Sim2Schedule: A Simulator-Guided LLM Framework for Autonomous Open-Pit Mine Scheduling
summary: Open-pit mine scheduling is a critical process for maximizing economic return under complex geotechnical and operational constraints. While Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP) provides mathematically optimal baselines, its exponential computational complexity and inability to adapt in real time limit its practical deployment in dynamic industrial environments. This work introduces a simulator-driven Large Language Model (LLM) scheduling framework in which the LLM acts as an autonomous decision-making agent, guided at each step by a custom simulator that encodes geotechnical precedence, extraction-processing coupling, and dynamic capacity constraints directly into the action generation mechanism. Operating entirely zero-shot within a closed, data-secure environment, the framework produces complete, interpretable extraction and processing schedules without cloud-based inference, domain-specific fine-tuning, or retraining. To provide a trustworthy performance benchmark, a novel MILP formulation is developed that incorporates realistic operational and geotechnical constraints. Evaluated across mining instances of varying scale and time periods, the LLM-based framework recovers between 94\% and 99\% of the MILP optimal NPV while scaling linearly in computation time. These results position simulator-constrained LLM agents as a practical and scalable alternative to classical optimization for long-horizon industrial scheduling under complex operational constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模拟器驱动的大型语言模型（LLM）调度框架，用于解决露天矿坑开采调度问题。该框架在零样本条件下，无需云端推理领域特定微调即可生成完整可解释的开采加工计划，并在不同规模矿山实例上恢复了94%-99%的MILP最优净现值（NPV），同时计算时间呈线性扩展。
AI.motivation: 传统混合整数线性规划（MILP）方法虽然能提供数学最优解，但存在指数级计算复杂度且无法实时调整，难以适应动态工业环境。因此需要一种既能在复杂约束下保持高质量解、又具备实时适应能力的新型调度方法。
AI.method: 构建了一个模拟器驱动的LLM调度框架，其中LLM作为自主决策代理，每步由自定义模拟器引导。模拟器将地质技术优先级、开采-加工耦合和动态产能约束直接编码到动作生成机制中。框架在封闭数据安全环境中完全零样本运行。
AI.result: 在 不同规模和时间跨度的矿山实例上评估，该LLM框架恢复了94%-99%的MILP最优净现值（NPV），且计算时间呈线性扩展。
AI.conclusion: 模拟器约束的LLM代理可作为复杂工业长期调度问题的实用且可扩展的替代方案，能够在复杂运营约束下实现接近最优的经济回报。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about using LLMs for autonomous open-pit mine scheduling in the mining/industrial engineering domain. It has nothing to do with Computer Graphics, Text-to-Motion, video generation models, 3D motion generation, Vision Language Models for visual tasks, or any cross-modal alignment related to motion synthesis. The application domain is entirely different - mining operations optimization vs. computer graphics motion generation.

title: DB-3DME: From Dataset to Benchmark for Human-aligned Automatic 3D Mesh Evaluation
comment: CVPR 2026 workshop paper. 10 pages, 3 figures, 6 tables. Dataset available at GitHub and Hugging Face
summary: Recent advances in 3D generation have led to substantial improvements in realism, controllability, and efficiency, yet the evaluation of 3D assets remains underexplored. Existing evaluation paradigms, including human evaluation, learned metrics, and vision-language models (VLMs) as judges, suffer from limitations in cost, scalability, resolution handling, or task-specific alignment. In this work, we focus on 3D mesh evaluation and introduce DB-3DME, the Dataset and Benchmark for 3D Mesh Evaluation. DB-3DME contains 2,619 synthetic 3D meshes paired with human ratings on Geometry and Prompt Adherence. Using this dataset, we systematically benchmark state-of-the-art VLMs and identify visual encoding of 3D representations as a key factor for human-aligned evaluation performance. Motivated by this finding, we fine-tune an open-weight VLM, Qwen-2.5-VL-7B, for 3D mesh evaluation by adapting the visual encoder while freezing the language model. The fine-tuned model substantially outperforms existing pre-trained VLMs across multiple evaluation dimensions, establishing a new benchmark for automatic 3D mesh evaluation. We publicly release the benchmark dataset on GitHub and Hugging Face to facilitate future research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DB-3DME，一个用于评估3D网格的数据集和基准测试，包含2619个合成3D网格及人工评分。通过系统基准测试发现视觉编码是关键因素，并基于此微调了Qwen-2.5-VL-7B模型，在3D网格评估任务上取得了最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3D资产生成评估方法存在成本高、可扩展性差、分辨率处理能力有限或任务对齐度低等问题，缺乏专门的3D网格评估基准。
AI.method: 构建包含2619个合成3D网格的DB-3DME数据集，收集人工对几何质量和提示对齐的评分；系统基准测试最先进的视觉语言模型；针对3D网格评估任务微调Qwen-2.5-VL-7B模型，保持语言模型冻结仅适配视觉编码器。
AI.result: 发现3D表示的视觉编码是实现与人类对齐评估性能的关键因素；微调后的Qwen-2.5-VL-7B在多个评估维度上显著优于现有预训练VLMs，建立3D网格自动评估的新基准。
AI.conclusion: 研究为3D网格评估提供了标准化基准和有效方法，微调VLM为自动化3D资产评估开辟了新途径，数据集和代码已公开以促进后续研究。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D mesh EVALUATION (assessing quality of static 3D assets), not Text-to-Motion generation. The research profile targets human MOTION SYNTHESIS from text, which is a fundamentally different application domain. While both use VLMs, this paper uses VLM for evaluating 3D meshes, not for motion generation or quality supervision in temporal motion synthesis. The paper addresses static 3D asset quality assessment, not temporal human motion generation or the cross-modal alignment between text, video, and 3D motion representations that the profile requires.

title: From Context-Aware to Conflict-Aware: Generalizing Contrastive Decoding for Knowledge Conflict in LLMs
summary: When large language models generate from retrieved or augmented contexts, conflicts between external context and parametric priors remain a central reliability bottleneck. Existing contrastive decoding methods follow a \emph{context-aware} paradigm that unilaterally amplifies context over parametric priors, overwriting correct priors when the context is erroneous. We generalize this to the \textbf{conflict-aware} paradigm that dynamically allocates authority between prior and context based on conflict signals, rather than presupposing context trustworthiness. We show that the affine combination of prior and context logits yields a \textbf{power family} with an inherent \textbf{regime asymmetry}: extrapolation amplifies errors unboundedly when the prior is correct, interpolation under-corrects when the context is correct, and no static regime covers both. Existing contrastive decoding methods are instances of this family, mostly extrapolative. To evaluate both conflict directions, we propose TriState-Bench, a model-aware evaluation protocol that calibrates per-model prior knowledge to measure three conflict states: correction, resistance, and agreement. To resolve the asymmetry, we propose Adaptive Regime Routing (ARR), which routes between regimes at each step, lifting resistance EM from below 6 to 16--33 without sacrificing correction or agreement. Our code is available at https://github.com/keith-Jiang/conflict-aware-decoding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出冲突感知解码范式，解决大语言模型在利用检索增强上下文时外部上下文与参数化先验之间的冲突问题。现有对比解码方法单方面放大上下文而可能覆盖正确先验，本文提出自适应 regime 路由(ARR)方法，在每个解码步骤动态分配先验和上下文之间的权重。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在利用检索或增强上下文生成时，外部上下文与参数化先验之间的冲突是核心可靠性瓶颈。现有对比解码方法遵循"上下文感知"范式，单方面放大上下文而覆盖正确先验。
AI.method: 1.提出冲突感知范式，根据冲突信号动态分配先验和上下文之间的决策权。2.证明先验和上下文logits的仿射组合形成"幂族"，存在固有的" regime 不对称性"。3.提出TriState-Bench评估协议，测量三种冲突状态：纠正、抗拒和一致。4.提出自适应Regime路由(ARR)方法，在每个解码步骤在regime之间切换。
AI.result: ARR方法将抗拒EM从低于6提升到16-33，同时不牺牲纠正或一致性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过冲突感知范式和ARR方法成功解决了对比解码中的regime不对称问题，为大语言模型的可靠生成提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: 完全无关的论文。该论文是关于大语言模型中的知识冲突解决（NLP领域），使用对比解码方法。而研究Profile是关于计算机图形学中的文本到动作生成（Text-to-Motion），涉及视频生成模型、VLM、3D动作生成等。两者在应用领域、方法论和研究问题上完全不同，属于完全不同的研究领域。

title: Fusing Satellite Imagery and Planimetric Maps for Cross-View Localization
summary: Current cross-view localization methods predominantly rely on satellite imagery as the aerial modality. Although recent work explores planimetric maps (e.g., OpenStreetMap tiles), these approaches often lag in performance. Yet both modalities are widely available and possess complementary properties. Satellite images are closer to ground-level camera imagery, offering finer detail, whereas planimetric maps contain annotated objects (e.g., streetlamps) and remain informative in areas where the ground is occluded, such as by foliage. Despite this, only one prior work provides an end-to-end method to fuse the two modalities, and it does not demonstrate their potential within state-of-the-art methods. To combine the strengths of both modalities, we propose a new fusion module that augments standard encoders and demonstrates that integrating satellite imagery with planimetric maps improves state-of-the-art single-modality methods. The module comprises (i) cross-modal conditioning, which processes each modality's encoding with awareness of the other, and (ii) a patch-level fusion rule that controls the granularity of information exchange. We achieve state-of-the-art results, reducing the mean localization error by 30.13\%. Qualitatively, the fusion adaptively selects the more informative modality, improving overall accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的融合模块，将卫星影像与平面地图（如OpenStreetMap）结合，用于跨视图定位任务。该模块包含跨模态 conditioning 和 patch-level fusion rule，能够自适应地选择信息更丰富的模态，最终将平均定位误差降低30.13%。
AI.motivation: 现有跨视图定位方法主要依赖卫星影像，虽然有些工作探索了平面地图，但性能通常较差。然而这两种模态具有互补性：卫星影像更接近地面相机图像，提供更细的细节；平面地图包含标注物体（如路灯），且在被植被遮挡的区域仍具信息量。现有融合方法缺乏端到端的融合方案，未能展示其在先进方法中的潜力。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的融合模块，包含两个核心组件：(i) 跨模态 conditioning：使每种模态的编码能够感知另一种模态的信息；(ii) patch-level fusion rule：控制信息交换的粒度。该模块增强标准编码器，可集成到现有的单模态SOTA方法中。
AI.result: 实现了SOTA结果，将平均定位误差降低30.13%。定性分析表明，融合模块能够自适应地选择信息更丰富的模态，提高了整体准确性。
AI.conclusion: 成功证明了卫星影像与平面地图的融合可以互补，显著提升跨视图定位性能。该融合模块可作为即插即用的组件集成到现有方法中，具有实际应用价值。

relevance_reason: This paper is about cross-view localization using satellite imagery and planimetric maps for geographic/geospatial applications - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and Text-to-Motion. While the paper does use cross-modal fusion techniques, the application domain is remote sensing/geographic information systems, not motion generation. The task involves matching satellite images to ground-level views for localization, which has no connection to text-to-motion synthesis, 3D motion generation, or any of the pain points mentioned in the research profile (video-to-motion extraction, VLM-based quality supervision, cross-modal alignment for motion, temporal consistency).

title: FlexPath: Learned Semantic Path Priors for Image-Based Planning
summary: Recent learning-based path planners use neural networks to process visual map representations and approximate heuristics for classical search algorithms, yielding near-optimal paths with reduced search effort. However, these methods are tied to the shortest-path objective implicit in their supervision, which limits their flexibility to accommodate alternative criteria. We introduce FlexPath, a two-stage framework that decouples feasibility from preference. In Stage 1, we use imitation learning to acquire a task-independent spatial prior over feasible paths from visual map inputs. In Stage 2, differentiable Path Shape Objectives (PSOs) adapt this prior toward task-specific criteria without relearning path structure, requiring only efficient objective-level adaptation. A single pretrained model can be adapted to multiple objectives. For shortest-path planning, FlexPath reduces search effort on TMP by 14.3% compared to the state-of-the-art TransPath, while also finding lower-cost paths on average and demonstrating strong zero-shot generalization across three unseen domains. For obstacle clearance with minimum clearance distance 2, it achieves 96.8% full obstacle avoidance while maintaining low search cost. The framework further extends to semantic-aware avoidance and waypoint guidance via objective-level adaptation, and remains compatible with classical planners at inference time. Data and code are available at https://github.com/FraunhoferIVI/FlexPath.

AI.tldr: FlexPath是一个两阶段学习路径规划框架，通过解耦可行性与偏好来增强传统神经网络的灵活性。第一阶段使用模仿学习从视觉地图输入中获取与任务无关的空间先验，第二阶段通过可微分的路径形状目标(PSO)对该先验进行任务特定调整，无需重新学习路径结构。
AI.motivation: 现有学习式路径规划器受限于监督中的最短路径目标，缺乏灵活性来适应其他标准（如障碍物清除、语义感知避障或航点引导），且难以泛化到新领域。
AI.method: 采用两阶段框架：阶段1使用模仿学习从视觉地图输入获取可行路径的空间先验；阶段2通过可微分路径形状目标(PSO)对该先验进行任务特定调整，只需在目标级别进行高效适应，单个预训练模型可适应多种目标。
AI.result: 相比TransPath减少14.3%搜索 effort，同时找到平均更低成本的路径；在三个未见领域展现强零样本泛化能力；实现障碍物清除时96.8%完全避障；可通过目标级适应扩展到语义感知避障和航点引导。
AI.conclusion: FlexPath成功解耦了可行性与偏好，允许单个预训练模型通过目标级适应处理多种任务，保持与经典规划器的兼容性，为学习式路径规划提供了更大的灵活性和泛化能力。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses robot path planning using visual maps, which is a completely different application domain from Text-to-Motion generation in Computer Graphics. The research profile focuses on generating 3D human motion from text/video inputs, while FlexPath deals with robot navigation and obstacle avoidance. The methods (imitation learning + differentiable path shape objectives) are also unrelated to Video Generation Models (Wan Xiang, Seedance), VLMs, and 3D Motion Generation Models used in text-to-motion synthesis. There is no alignment with any of the pain points mentioned.

title: Mobility Anomaly Generation using LLM-Driven Behavior with Kinematic Constraints
summary: Although the study of human trajectory anomalies is critical for advancing spatial data mining, empirical research remains severely hindered by a pervasive lack of ground-truth datasets. Despite the availability of several real-world and simulated human trajectory collections, these datasets exclusively capture normal mobility patterns and lack annotated anomalies. This specific scarcity is fundamentally driven by the inherent statistical rarity of anomalous events, precluding the feasibility of conventional observational methods. Compounding this challenge, the systematic acquisition of large-scale mobility data is strictly bottlenecked by prohibitive costs and stringent privacy regulations. To overcome these fundamental limitations and establish a reliable human trajectory anomalies dataset with annotated ground truth, we introduce a novel, end-to-end generative framework designed to synthesize realistic trajectory anomalies at scale. Our architecture bridges the gap between purely synthetic mobility data and complex real-world physical constraints by operating directly on baseline simulated trajectories. We employ Large Language Model (LLM) agents to systematically inject semantically meaningful behavioral anomalies such as irregular out-of-distribution check-ins and skipped routine visits. To ensure rigorous spatial validity, the system leverages map-constrained routing reconstruction to recalculate the physical transitions between these LLM agent-modified staypoints. Moreover, to narrow the simulation-to-reality gap, we augment the resulting trajectories with a context-aware spatial noise model, parameterized by environmental and location-specific variables, to accurately emulate heterogeneous GPS sensor degradation.

AI.tldr: 针对人类轨迹异常检测研究中ground-truth数据集稀缺的难题，提出了一种基于大语言模型(LLM)智能体的端到端生成框架，可合成逼真的带标注轨迹异常数据。
AI.motivation: 当前人类轨迹异常研究严酷受阻于缺乏带有标注异常的ground-truth数据集。现有数据集仅包含正常移动模式，无法用于异常检测模型训练。原因包括：异常事件的统计稀有性难以通过传统观测方法获取；大规模移动数据采集受成本和隐私法规限制。
AI.method: 提出一种端到端的生成框架，包含三个核心组件：1)基于LLM智能体注入语义有意义的行为异常（如异常离群签到、遗漏常规访问）；2)利用地图约束路由重构重新计算LLM修改停留点间的物理转换确保空间有效性；3)通过情境感知空间噪声模型（参数化环境和位置特定变量）模拟异构GPS传感器退化，缩小模拟到真实的差距。
AI.result: 该框架能够大规模生成带标注的逼真人类轨迹异常数据，为空间数据挖掘中的轨迹异常检测研究提供可靠的训练和评估数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了人类轨迹异常ground-truth数据集的空白，为后续轨迹异常检测模型的训练和评估提供了数据基础，推动空间数据挖掘领域的发展。

relevance_reason: This paper is about GPS trajectory anomaly generation for trajectory detection research, which is completely different from Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. It deals with 2D spatial trajectories (latitude/longitude coordinates) for mobility anomaly detection, NOT 3D skeletal motion synthesis for graphics/animation. The application domain is fundamentally different: trajectory data mining vs computer graphics motion generation. Methods used (LLM-driven behavior for GPS trajectories, kinematic constraints for physical validity) are unrelated to the research profile's methods (Video Generation Models, VLM, 3D Motion Generation Models, Visual Feature Extraction). No cross-modal text-video-motion alignment or motion naturalness synthesis in the computer graphics sense.

title: A Large Scale Open-Source Image and Video Dataset for Robust Wildfire Detection and Classification
summary: Wildfire detection and monitoring are critical for mitigating fire spread and reducing environmental and infrastructural damage. In this work, we introduce GWFP (Global Wildfire Prevention Dataset), a large-scale, open-source dataset of wildfire images and videos designed to support early fire and smoke detection research. GWFP contains geographically diverse wildfire scenes, including flames, smoke, Waterdog/Fog environmental conditions, Near Infrared (NIR) imagery, Ember, and challenging negative samples collected from real-world scenarios worldwide. To evaluate dataset robustness and cross-domain generalization, we benchmark multiple convolutional and transformer-based architectures across both in-domain and cross-dataset settings. Additionally, we explore lightweight frequency--spatial feature interaction using Hadamard-enhanced residual connections (HTE-ResNet) to analyze representation robustness under domain-shift conditions. Experimental results demonstrate strong cross-dataset generalization and practical utility for real-world wildfire monitoring applications. The dataset and source code will be publicly released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: GWFP是一个大规模开源的野火图像和视频数据集，旨在支持早期火灾和烟雾检测研究，包含地理上多样化的野火场景，包括火焰、烟雾、水雾/雾环境条件、近红外图像、余烬和具有挑战性的负样本
AI.motivation: 野火的检测和监测对于减少火灾蔓延以及环境和基础设施损害至关重要，但目前缺乏大规模、多样化的野火数据集来支持相关研究
AI.method: 构建GWFP数据集并对多种卷积和Transformer架构进行基准测试，探索使用Hadamard增强残差连接(HT E-ResNet)的轻量级频率-空间特征交互来分析领域转移条件下的表示鲁棒性
AI.result: 实验表明数据集具有强大的跨数据集泛化能力，在实际野火监测应用中具有实用价值
AI.conclusion: GWFP数据集和提出的方法为野火早期检测提供了有价值的资源，支持跨领域泛化研究

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about wildfire detection and classification in remote sensing/environmental monitoring, while the research profile is about Text-to-Motion generation in Computer Graphics. The task, domain, and goals are entirely unrelated - wildfire detection is a classification task for environmental monitoring, not motion generation.

title: Self-Distillation Policy Optimization via Visual Feedback: Bridging Code and Visual Artifacts
summary: Code-generating large language models (LLMs) increasingly produce visual artifacts such as charts, web pages, and slides by writing programs that are executed by non-differentiable renderers, committing to code before observing the render. As a result, otherwise executable code often yields artifacts with visually salient defects, including overlapping elements, clipped text, broken alignment, low contrast, and overflow. We study visual-feedback self-distillation for code-generated visual artifacts. We propose Visual-SDPO, a self-distillation policy-optimization framework that treats rendered visual feedback as privileged context for a weight-sharing teacher and distills this feedback into a coding student. To make supervision spatially targeted rather than uniform, we introduce Visual-Grounded Code Credit Weighting, which traces each detected defect back to the code statements responsible for the affected elements and amplifies the distillation signal on those statements. A sequence-level GRPO (Group Relative Policy Optimization) term complements the dense token-level objective by rewarding executable, visually high-quality rollouts, while failed executions remain learnable through the self-distillation path by passing execution errors as privileged context to the teacher. We instantiate Visual-SDPO for chart, web/UI, and slide generation with a unified Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct backbone. Across chart-to-code, UI-to-code, and slide-generation benchmarks (ChartMimic, Design2Code, and AeSlides), Visual-SDPO improves over the zero-shot base by more than 10 absolute points in the primary metric and over GRPO by at least 2.4 points, with fewer training steps and no added inference-time cost.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Visual-SDPO框架，通过视觉反馈自蒸馏和代码信用权重分配来提升代码生成大模型在图表、网页和幻灯片等视觉 artifacts 上的生成质量。该方法将渲染后的视觉反馈作为特权上下文传递给教师模型，并通过空间定向的信用权重将缺陷追溯到具体代码语句。实验在ChartMimic、Design2Code和AeSlides基准上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 代码生成大模型在生成视觉 artifacts（如图表、网页、幻灯片）时存在明显缺陷：元素重叠、文本被裁剪、对齐破损、低对比度、溢出等。这些问题的根源在于模型在执行代码前就需要commit，导致即使代码可执行也会产生视觉质量问题的输出。现有方法缺乏有效的视觉反馈机制来指导模型改进代码生成。
AI.method: 本文提出Visual-SDPO自蒸馏策略优化框架，包含三个核心创新：(1) 视觉反馈自蒸馏：将渲染后的视觉反馈作为特权上下文传递给教师模型，与编码学生模型共享权重；(2) Visual-Grounded Code Credit Weighting：将检测到的视觉缺陷追溯到具体代码语句，对相关语句的蒸馏信号进行放大；(3) 序列级GRPO补充 token 级目标：奖励可执行且视觉质量高的 rollout，失败执行通过将错误信息作为特权上下文传递给教师模型保持可学习性。使用统一的Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct作为骨干网络。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集（ChartMimic、Design2Code、AeSlides）上，Visual-SDPO相比零样本基线提升超过10个绝对百分点，相比GRPO至少提升2.4个百分点的首要指标，且训练步骤更少，推理时无额外计算成本。
AI.conclusion: Visual-SDPO成功地将视觉反馈纳入自蒸馏流程，通过代码信用权重分配实现空间定向监督，有效提升了代码生成模型在视觉 artifacts 上的质量。该方法展示了视觉反馈在代码生成任务中的价值，为多模态代码生成提供了新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about code generation for visual artifacts (charts, webpages, slides) using VLMs - completely different application domain from Text-to-Motion (3D human motion generation). While both use VLMs and visual feedback conceptually, the core task is fundamentally different: generating code that produces visual outputs vs generating 3D human motion from text. This is a different field entirely in computer graphics.

title: Making Time Editable in Video Diffusion Transformers
summary: Modern Diffusion Transformers for video generation provide limited control over the progression of time and the editing of temporal dynamics. We propose a temporal-control methodology that extends a pretrained DiT with explicit time editing, allowing control over motion speed and temporal structure without redesigning the backbone. Its core implementation augments the pretrained model with a lightweight temporal module, preserving the original generative prior while expanding its controllable dynamic range.

AI.tldr: 提出一种针对视频生成扩散Transformer的时间控制方法，通过添加轻量级时间模块实现对运动速度和 temporal结构的控制。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成扩散Transformer对时间演进和时序动态的控制能力有限，限制了用户对生成视频的编辑能力。
AI.method: 在预训练DiT模型上添加轻量级时间模块，保留原始生成先验的同时扩展可控动态范围，实现显式时间编辑功能。
AI.result: 该方法无需重新设计骨干网络，即可在预训练模型基础上实现对运动速度和时序结构的控制。
AI.conclusion: 该 temporal-control 方法为视频生成提供了更灵活的时间控制能力，同时保持了预训练模型的生成质量。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses temporal control in video generation (2D video output) while the research profile is about Text-to-Motion (3D human motion generation). Although both use diffusion transformers, they are in DIFFERENT application domains - video generation vs human motion generation. The paper touches on motion speed control conceptually but doesn't address the key pain points: extracting 3D visual guidance from 2D video priors, cross-modal alignment between text/video/3D motion, or VLM-based quality supervision for motion fidelity. The method is too far removed from the specific text-to-motion generation task.

title: Reasoning or Memorization? Direction-Aware Diversity Exploration in LLM Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement learning has become a key paradigm for eliciting reasoning abilities in large language models, where exploration is crucial for discovering effective solution trajectories. Existing exploration methods typically encourage diversity in semantic or gradient spaces, without distinguishing what drives this diversity. A trajectory may appear novel because it follows a new reasoning process, or because it varies memorized patterns and shortcuts. Rewarding both cases equally may steer exploration toward memorization rather than genuine reasoning improvement. In this paper, we propose DiRL, a Direction-Aware Reinforcement Learning framework that anchors exploration to an internal reasoning-memorization direction of the policy. Specifically, DiRL extracts this direction from model representations, constructs direction-weighted gradient features to characterize rollout updates, and shapes rewards to amplify reasoning-aligned exploration while suppressing memorization-aligned variations. DiRL integrates seamlessly into standard Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Extensive experiments on mathematical and general reasoning benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of DiRL, showing significant improvements over various existing exploration methods.

AI.tldr: DiRL是一种方向感知的强化学习方法，旨在引导大型语言模型的探索行为朝向真正的推理能力而非记忆模式。该框架通过从模型表示中提取推理-记忆方向，构建方向加权梯度特征来表征 rollout 更新，并设计奖励机制来放大与推理对齐的探索，同时抑制与记忆对齐的变体。DiRL 可无缝集成到标准 GRPO 中，在数学和通用推理基准上展现出显著改进。
AI.motivation: 现有的探索方法通常鼓励语义空间或梯度空间的多样性，但没有区分这种多样性是由新的推理过程驱动的，还是由记忆模式和捷径的变异产生的。等价地奖励这两种情况可能会将探索引向记忆而非真正的推理改进。因此需要一种方法来区分和引导探索朝向真正的推理能力发展。
AI.method: DiRL框架包含三个核心组件：1) 从模型表示中提取推理-记忆方向；2) 构建方向加权梯度特征来表征 rollout 更新；3) 设计奖励机制来放大推理对齐的探索同时抑制记忆对齐的变体。该方法无缝集成到标准 Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) 中。
AI.result: 在数学和通用推理基准上的广泛实验表明，DiRL 能够显著超越各种现有的探索方法，展现出有效的推理能力提升。
AI.conclusion: DiRL 通过引入方向感知的探索机制，成功地将强化学习探索引导至真正的推理能力发展而非记忆模式，为提升大型语言模型的推理能力提供了一种新的有效范式。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM reinforcement learning for improving reasoning vs memorization in large language models. It has absolutely no connection to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. The application domain is completely different - this is about LLM training, not 3D motion generation, video generation, or any computer graphics task. The methods (GRPO, reinforcement learning for LLMs) are entirely unrelated to the research profile's methods (video generation models, VLM for motion, 3D motion generation).

title: Fisher-Guided Progressive Parameter Selection for Adaptive Fine-Tuning
summary: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) aims to adapt pretrained models with a small trainable parameter subset, however, most existing methods choose this subset from fixed architectural heuristics rather than using dynamic, task-aware criteria. We introduce \textbf{FisherAdapTune}, a Fisher-guided Adaptive Fine-Tuning framework that progressively selects parameter groups by tracking the temporal drift of their Fisher geometry. Starting from a PAC-Bayesian view of fine-tuning, we decompose the generalization error bound into Fisher-weighted update costs and show that parameter groups whose curvature contribution has stabilized can be frozen to reduce the error bound without interrupting the remaining adaptation dynamics. FisherAdapTune formulates this criterion with a scale-invariant Jensen-Shannon distance between consecutive Fisher distributions, yielding an adaptive active parameter set. We evaluate our approach on a downstream segmentation task, and results show FisherAdapTune improves the in-distribution performance and zero-shot transfer in multiple settings, validating that Fisher structural drift is a useful signal for efficient, task-aware adaptation. We release our \href{https://github.com/AtlasAnalyticsLab/FisherAdapTune}{code} publicly to enable further application of our proposed approach.

AI.tldr: FisherAdapTune是一种基于Fisher信息几何的自适应微调框架，通过跟踪参数组的Fisher曲率漂移来动态选择需要微调的参数，实现参数高效微调。
AI.motivation: 现有参数高效微调方法(PEFT)通常基于固定架构启发式选择待微调参数，缺乏动态的、任务感知的标准。论文希望引入基于任务的自适应参数选择机制。
AI.method: 从PAC-Bayesian视角分析微调，将泛化误差分解为Fisher加权更新成本；提出使用尺度无关的Jensen-Shannon距离衡量相邻Fisher分布差异；当参数组的曲率贡献稳定时将其冻结；通过Fisher几何追踪实现自适应选择活跃参数组。
AI.result: 在下游分割任务上，FisherAdapTune提升了分布内性能并改善了零样本迁移效果，验证了Fisher结构漂移是高效任务感知微调的有效信号。
AI.conclusion: Fisher结构漂移可作为高效、任务感知微调的有用信号，FisherAdapTune框架能够自适应地选择需要微调的参数组，实现参数高效微调。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about parameter-efficient fine-tuning (FisherAdapTune) for neural networks using Fisher information geometry, applied to segmentation tasks. The research profile is specifically about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion generation (3D human motion synthesis from text/video). The application domain is entirely different: this is general ML model adaptation, not text-to-motion, not computer graphics, not any motion generation. The methods and goals have no connection to extracting 3D visual guidance from video, VLM-based motion quality supervision, or cross-modal alignment between text, video, and 3D motion.

title: ReflectiChain: Epistemic Grounding in LLM-Driven World Models for Supply Chain Resilience
summary: AI agents in supply chains face a fundamental epistemic gap: large language models (LLMs) interpret policies but lack physical grounding, while reinforcement learning (RL) optimizes flows but is semantically blind to unstructured constraints. We introduce REFLECTICHAIN, bridging this gap through a Generative Supply Chain World Model (SC-WM) - encoding heterogeneous supply networks into a 6-dim graph-latent space with physical conservation - and Double-Loop Learning that separates epistemic uncertainty (KL-trust-region-bounded policy adaptation) from aleatoric uncertainty (stochastic latent rollouts). On Semi-Sim, a 10-node semiconductor benchmark with SIR risk propagation, 6 perturbation types, and 10 policy constraint templates, REFLECTICHAIN improves Rationale Consistency Score by 33.0% (p < 0.0001, d = 2.78), maintains 82.3% operability under adversarial shocks, and exhibits anti-fragile behavior (+40.2% gain under moderate pressure). We identify three operational epistemic mechanisms - uncertainty separation, knowledge-boundary detection, and empirical Bayesian policy updating - and discuss five limitation categories.

AI.tldr: REFLECTICHAIN是一个解决供应链中AI智能体认知差距的系统,通过生成式供应链世界模型(SC-WM)将异构网络编码为6维图潜空间,并采用双环学习分离认知不确定性和偶发不确定性。在半导体基准测试中,该系统显著提升了理由一致性评分,并展现出抗脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 解决供应链AI智能体的认知差距问题
AI.method: 引入REFLECTICHAIN系统,通过生成式供应链世界模型(SC-WM)将异构供应链网络编码为6维图潜空间,采用双环学习分离两种不确定性
AI.result: 在Semi-Sim基准测试中,REFLECTICHAIN将理性一致性评分提升33.0%(p<0.0001,d=2.78),在对抗性冲击下维持82.3%可操作性,并展现出抗脆弱性行为(在中度压力下增益+40.2%)
AI.conclusion: 识别出三种操作认知机制(不确定性分离、知识边界检测、经验贝叶斯策略更新),并讨论了五类局限性。该系统成功弥合了LLM语义理解与RL优化能力之间的差距。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Supply Chain Resilience and AI agents, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. The application domain is entirely different: supply chain management vs. 3D human motion generation. Methods are also completely different: LLM-driven world models with graph latent spaces for supply chain networks vs. video generation models (Wan Xiang, Seedance), VLMs, and 3D motion generation. The paper addresses cognitive gaps in supply chain AI agents, not any of the pain points related to text-to-motion synthesis such as visual guidance extraction, cross-modal alignment, or motion naturalness.

title: An Improved Generative Adversarial Network for Micro-Resistivity Imaging Logging Restoration
summary: An improved GAN-based imaging logging image restoration method is presented in this paper for solving the problem of partially missing micro-resistivity imaging logging images. The method uses FCN as the generative network infrastructure and adds a depth-separable convolutional residual block to learn and retain more effective pixel and semantic information; an Inception module is added to increase the multi-scale perceptual field of the network and reduce the number of parameters in the network; and a multi-scale feature extraction module and a spatial attention residual block are added to combine the channel attention. The multi-scale module adds a multi-scale feature extraction module and a spatial attention residual block, which combine the channel attention mechanism and the residual block to achieve multi-scale feature extraction. The global discriminative network and the local discriminative network are designed to gradually improve the content and semantic structure coherence between the restored parts and the whole image by playing off each other and the generative network. According to the experimental results, the average structural similarity measure of the five sets of imaged logging images with different sizes of missing regions in the test set is 0.903, which is an improvement of about 0.3 compared with other similar methods. It is shown that the method in this study can be used for the restoration of micro-resistivity imaging log images with good improvement in semantic structural coherence and texture details, thus providing a new deep learning method to ensure the smooth advancement of the subsequent interpretation of micro-resistivity imaging log images.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于改进GAN的微电阻率成像测井图像修复方法，针对图像部分缺失问题，通过在FCN网络中集成深度可分离卷积残差块、Inception模块、多尺度特征提取模块和空间注意力残差块，并结合全局与局部判别网络实现高质量图像修复。
AI.motivation: 微电阻率成像测井图像在实际应用中经常出现部分区域缺失的问题，这严重影响后续图像解释的准确性和连续性，需要一种能够有效恢复图像语义结构一致性和纹理细节的深度学习方法。
AI.method: 采用FCN作为生成网络基础架构，引入深度可分离卷积残差块学习保留更多有效像素和语义信息；添加Inception模块增加多尺度感受野并减少网络参数；集成多尺度特征提取模块与空间注意力残差块，结合通道注意力机制实现多尺度特征提取；设计全局判别网络和局部判别网络协同工作，逐步提升修复部分与整体图像的内容和语义结构一致性。
AI.result: 在五组不同缺失区域大小的测试集图像上，平均结构相似度（SSIM）达到0.903，相比其他同类方法提升约0.3。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在微电阻率成像测井图像修复中能够有效提升语义结构一致性和纹理细节质量，为后续图像解释的顺利推进提供了新的深度学习解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses micro-resistivity imaging logging restoration in geophysical/petroleum engineering, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. While it uses GAN and attention mechanisms (superficially similar methods), the application domain is entirely different - it's about restoring geophysical logging images, not generating 3D human motion from text. This is a completely different field with no relevance to text-to-motion synthesis.

title: Belief-Space Control for Personalized Cancer Treatment via Active Inference
summary: Cancer treatment is at the core a sequential decision-making problem with partial observability, latent patient heterogeneity, and explicit constraints on the budget for medical measurements. Unlike standard Reinforcement Learning (RL) approaches that control state trajectories, cancer treatments permanently modify patients' transition dynamics, changing how states evolve over time. We model cancer treatment as a belief-space planning problem using active inference, deriving an expected free-energy objective that unifies goal-directed control and information acquisition under measurement budgets without. We implement this framework using real clinical cancer data from the AACR Project GENIE Biopharma Collaborative dataset. Results on clinical data demonstrate a simultaneous patient categorization and high treatment efficacy, under real measurement and treatment constraints.

AI.tldr: 将癌症治疗建模为基于信念空间的主动推理规划问题，统一目标导向控制与信息获取，在测量预算约束下实现患者分类与高效治疗。
AI.motivation: 癌症治疗具有部分可观测性、隐含患者异质性及测量预算限制等独特挑战，传统RL方法无法处理治疗对患者转移动态的永久性修改。
AI.method: 采用主动推理框架，导出期望自由能目标函数，结合信念空间规划与测量预算约束，使用AACR Project GENIE真实临床数据实现。
AI.result: 在真实临床数据上实现同时的患者分类与高效治疗效果，满足实际测量和治疗预算约束。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为癌症个性化治疗提供了有效的决策支持方法，证明了主动推理在医疗领域应用的可行性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about personalized cancer treatment via active inference - a medical AI/healthcare domain completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and Text-to-Motion. The application domain is entirely different (medical decision-making vs. motion generation), uses different methods (active inference for treatment planning vs. video/motion generation models), and addresses completely different pain points. There is no overlap whatsoever with the research profile.

title: FoA-SR: Faithful or Aesthetic? Profile-Aware Preference Optimization for Real-World Image Super-Resolution
summary: Real-world image super-resolution (SR) is often designed with a single restoration objective, despite the current capacity of generative models to produce multiple high-quality reconstructions for the same input. In this paper, we argue that the best restoration strategy is subject to the specific restoration profile: a Faithful restoration prioritizes reference consistency, structure preservation, and hallucination suppression, whereas an Aesthetic restoration prioritizes visually pleasing and natural-looking details. We propose FoA-SR, a novel preference optimization approach to real-world SR based on profiles. To achieve this goal, FoA-SR starts with our supervised FLUX.2-based SR adapter (Flux2SR) trained with LR latent conditioning, flow matching, and image-space reconstruction losses for paired LR-to-HR image super-resolution. Following the development of the shared supervised super-resolution adapter, FoA-SR generates a shared stochastic candidate pool for each input image and ranks the same candidates using profile-specific Faithful and Aesthetic rewards to mine winner-loser pairs. These pairs are used to fine-tune separate LoRA adapters while keeping the base model frozen. Experiments on RealSR and DIV2K show that FoA-SR can steer the same SR adapter towards distinct restoration objectives: a Faithful adapter improves reference-consistent metrics while an Aesthetic adapter boosts metrics that measure perceptual quality without reference. Our candidate-pool analysis shows that Faithful and Aesthetic rewards frequently select different winners, and a Hybrid-LoRA ablation shows that collapsing both profiles into one reward yields an implicit compromise rather than explicit profile control.

AI.tldr: FoA-SR是一种基于偏好的真实世界图像超分辨率优化方法，通过Faithful和Aesthetic两种重建配置来指导同一SR适配器产生不同的重建结果。
AI.motivation: 真实世界图像超分辨率通常只针对单一重建目标设计，但生成模型可以为同一输入产生多个高质量重建。作者认为最佳重建策略应取决于具体的重建配置：Faithful优先考虑参考一致性、结构保留和抑制幻觉，而Aesthetic优先考虑视觉美观和自然细节。
AI.method: FoA-SR方法包括：（1）使用基于FLUX.2的监督SR适配器Flux2SR，结合LR潜在条件化、流匹配和图像空间重建损失进行训练；（2）为每张输入图像生成共享的随机候选池；（3）使用配置特定的Faithful和Aesthetic奖励对候选进行排名，挖掘胜负对；（4）微调独立的LoRA适配器同时保持基础模型冻结。
AI.result: 在RealSR和DIV2K数据集上的实验表明，FoA-SR可以引导同一SR适配器朝向不同的重建目标：Faithful适配器提升参考一致性指标，Aesthetic适配器提升无参考的感知质量指标。候选池分析显示Faithful和Aesthetic奖励经常选择不同的获胜者，混合LoRA消融显示将两个配置合并为一个奖励产生隐含的折中而非显式配置控制。
AI.conclusion: FoA-SR成功实现了基于配置的真实世界图像超分辨率，通过分离的LoRA适配器可以灵活控制重建策略。未来的工作可能涉及更多配置类型的探索和更高效的推理方法。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Image Super-Resolution (SR), which is completely unrelated to the Text-to-Motion research field. The paper deals with enhancing 2D image resolution using diffusion models, while the research profile focuses on generating 3D human motion from text descriptions. The application domains are entirely different - image processing vs. motion generation - despite both potentially using diffusion-based methods. The paper does not address any of the specified pain points (3D visual guidance extraction, VLM-based motion quality supervision, cross-modal text-video-motion alignment, or motion naturalness).

title: Beyond Static Evaluation: Co-Evolutionary Mechanisms for LLM-Driven Strategy Evolution in Adversarial Games
summary: Recent advances in LLM-driven code evolution have enabled automated discovery by iteratively generating and improving programs. However, applying these methods to adversarial multi-agent games introduces a fundamental challenge: the evaluation landscape shifts as strategies improve, causing fixed evaluators to become unreliable and evolution to stagnate. We propose three mechanisms to address this challenge: evaluator co-evolution, which incorporates discovered champions into the opponent pool; hierarchical deep evaluation, which replaces noisy few-game scores with statistically reliable assessments; and weakness pressure, which dynamically up-weights the most difficult opponents to break through plateaus. We implement these mechanisms within FAMOU, a framework built upon the same foundation-model code-evolution paradigm as OpenEvolve and ShinkaEvolve. On the MCTF 2026 3v3 maritime capture-the-flag task, FAMOU consistently outperforms both baselines under two backbone LLMs, achieving the highest combined score (0.526) and the best generalization to unseen opponents (61.7% win rate), while ablations confirm that each mechanism contributes to performance. Notably, the LLM mutation process generates tactical structures entirely absent from the seed strategies -- including lookahead search and adaptive interception -- demonstrating that code-level evolution can produce nontrivial algorithmic innovations in adversarial settings. The FAMOU-evolved strategy further achieved 1st place in the hardware round-robin and 3rd in simulation at the AAMAS 2026 MCTF Competition, validating its real-world transferability. The optimized implementation and corresponding evaluation codes developed through our evolutionary process are available at: https://github.com/1xiangliu1/FAMOU-CoEvo

AI.tldr: 本文提出FAMOU框架，通过三大机制（评估器共进化、分层深度评估、弱点压力）解决对抗性多智能体游戏中评估景观动态变化导致的进化停滞问题，在MCTF 2026竞赛中获硬件轮环冠军并实现了代码级进化产生全新战术结构（如前瞻搜索、自适应拦截）。
AI.motivation: LLM驱动的代码进化方法在对抗性多智能体游戏中面临根本挑战：随着策略改进，评估景观不断变化，导致固定评估器不可靠，进化停滞。现有方法缺乏对动态评估环境的有效应对机制。
AI.method: 实现三大机制：1)评估器共进化，将发现的冠军策略纳入对手池；2)分层深度评估，用统计可靠的评估替代噪声大的少量对局评分；3)弱点压力，动态上调最难对手的权重。基于与OpenEvolve/ShinkaEvolve相同的基础模型代码进化范式构建FAMOU框架，在MCTF 2026 3v3海上夺旗任务上测试。
AI.result: FAMOU在两种骨干LLM下均一致优于基线，获最高综合得分(0.526)和最佳泛化能力(61.7%胜率)。消融实验证实各机制均有贡献。LLM变异生成了种子策略中完全不存在的新战术结构，包括前瞻搜索和自适应拦截。在AAMAS 2026 MCTF竞赛中获硬件轮环第1名、仿真第3名。
AI.conclusion: 代码级进化可在对抗性环境中产生非平凡的算法创新。评估器共进化、分层深度评估和弱点压力三大机制有效解决了动态评估环境中的进化停滞问题，验证了FAMOU策略的真实世界可迁移性。

relevance_reason: 完全无关。该论文是关于对抗性多智能体游戏中的LLM驱动策略进化（FAMOU框架用于海上夺旗任务），属于游戏AI/多智能体系统领域。而研究档案是关于计算机图形学中的Text-to-Motion（文本到动作生成），涉及从2D视频提取3D运动特征、跨模态对齐（文本、视频、3D运动）等。两者唯一的共同点是都可能使用LLM，但应用领域完全不同：游戏策略生成 vs 人体运动合成。这相当于比较"扩散模型用于图像生成"和"扩散模型用于人体动作生成"的区别——应用领域完全不同，应得低分。

title: Dissect and Prune: Enhancing Robustness in AI-Generated Image Detection
comment: 25 pages, 9 figures, 9 tables, Accepted to ICML 2026; includes appendix
summary: While existing AI-generated image detectors report high performance, we identify that this is largely driven by a critical prediction asymmetry: a bias toward the real class that severely limits sensitivity to generated content, especially under standard post-processing operations such as compression and resizing. We hypothesize that this stems from the model's reliance on spurious features, distracting signals that obscure true generative artifacts. To address this, we propose DEAR (Dissect and Prune), which leverages inpainted images to identify and prune these interfering components. Specifically, we find that features strongly aligned to either inpainted or non-inpainted regions are less robust to post-processing. By measuring the alignment between channel activations and inpaint masks, DEAR removes features at both extremes, retaining only those that capture genuine generative artifacts. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach significantly enhances robustness against unseen generators and post-processing, effectively mitigating the prediction asymmetry. Our code is available at https://github.com/dahyedahye/dear.

AI.tldr: 本文指出当前AI生成图像检测器存在严重的预测不对称性问题——偏向真实类标签，导致对生成内容的敏感度不足，尤其在压缩和调整大小等后处理操作下性能下降。作者提出DEAR方法，利用图像修复技术识别并剪除模型对虚假特征的依赖，保留仅捕获真实生成痕迹的特征，从而增强模型对未知生成器和后处理的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有检测器虽然报告高性能，但这种高性能主要由对真实类的预测偏差驱动，严重限制了模型对生成内容的敏感度，特别是在经历压缩、调整大小等标准后处理操作后。作者认为这是因为模型依赖了虚假特征——那些干扰真实生成痕迹的干扰信号
AI.method: DEAR方法的核心是利用修复(inpainted)图像来识别和剪除干扰特征。具体步骤包括：1)创建修复图像并测量通道激活与修复mask的对齐程度；2)识别与修复区域或非修复区域强对齐的特征，这些特征对后处理的鲁棒性较差；3)移除处于两个极端的特征，仅保留那些能捕获真实生成痕迹的特征
AI.result: 实验结果表明，DEAR方法显著增强了对未知生成器和后处理操作的鲁棒性，有效缓解了预测不对称性问题
AI.conclusion: 通过利用修复图像技术识别并移除不可靠的虚假特征，DEAR能够保留真正捕获生成痕迹的特征，从而解决AI生成图像检测器中普遍存在的预测不对称问题，提升模型在实际应用中的可靠性

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion from text and video), while this paper is about AI-Generated Image Detection (forensics/classification). The paper addresses image detection robustness, not motion generation. Even though both involve "quality assessment" conceptually, the target (image vs motion), the output (binary classification vs 3D motion sequence), and the entire application domain are entirely different. This would be relevant only if the research profile were about AI-generated image detection.

title: Instruction Finetuning DeepSeek-R1-8B Model Using LoRA and NEFTune
summary: Financial named-entity recognition (NER) is essential for translating unstructured financial reports and news into structured knowledge graphs. However, general-purpose large language models (LLMs) often misclassify financial entities or ignore domain-specific patterns. This paper investigates the use of DeepSeek-R1-8B, a recent open-source large language model, combined with Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) and Noisy Embedding Fine-Tuning (NEFTune) for financial NER. Each annotated sentence in our corpus of 1693 samples is converted into an instruction-input-output triple. We insert lightweight LoRA matrices into the Transformer layers and apply NEFTune to improve generalisation by adding uniform noise to embedding vectors during training. Experiments show that the LoRA-adapted DeepSeek-R1-8B achieves a micro-F1 of 0.901 on seven entity types (Company, Date, Location, Money, Person, Product and Quantity), and adding NEFTune further boosts the micro-F1 to 0.912, outperforming Llama3-8B, Qwen3-8B, Baichuan2-7B, T5 and BERT-Base baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用DeepSeek-R1-8B结合LoRA和NEFTune技术进行金融命名实体识别（NER），通过在1693个样本语料库上进行微调，在七种实体类型上达到0.912的micro-F1分数。
AI.motivation: 通用大型语言模型经常错误分类金融实体或忽略领域特定模式，因此需要针对金融领域进行专门的NER研究。
AI.method: 将每个标注句子转换为指令-输入-输出三元组，在Transformer层中插入轻量级LoRA矩阵，并在训练时对嵌入向量添加均匀噪声以应用NEFTune技术提升泛化能力。
AI.result: LoRA适配的DeepSeek-R1-8B在七种实体类型（公司、日期、地点、货币、人名、产品和数量）上达到micro-F1为0.901，加入NEFTune后进一步提升至0.912，优于Llama3-8B、Qwen3-8B、Baichuan2-7B、T5和BERT-Base基线模型。
AI.conclusion: LoRA和NEFTune技术的结合能有效提升开源大语言模型在金融NER任务上的性能，为金融文本信息抽取提供了可行的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Financial Named Entity Recognition (NER) using DeepSeek-R1-8B with LoRA and NEFTune techniques. It has NO relevance to the Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion research field. The application domain is completely different - it's financial NLP text processing, not 3D motion generation, video generation, or cross-modal alignment between text, video, and 3D motion representations. Even though it uses similar base models (LLMs), the task and domain are entirely different from the research profile's focus on visual guidance extraction, VLM-based quality supervision, and motion synthesis.

title: Content-Induced Spatial-Spectral Aggregation Network for Change Detection in Remote Sensing Images
summary: The integration of spatial and spectral information is beneficial to the improvement of change detection performance. However, existing methods cannot efficiently suppress the influences of spatial and spectral differences in unchanged areas. To address these issues, in this paper we propose a content-guided spatial-spectral integration network (CSI-Net) for the fusion of global spatial details and spectral difference information. Specifically, the proposed CSI-Net is composed of a spatial reasoning (SR) module, a spectral difference (SD) module, and a content-guided integration (CGI) module. In the SR module, the spatial information is learned by cascaded graph convolution blocks for global modeling. The SD module is responsible for the extraction of spectral features, by calculating the means and variances of features to reduce the impact of spectral differences in unchanged regions. In addition, in order to integrate the spatial-spectral features efficiently, we design a CGI module to further take advantage of their complementary information. In this module, high-level content information is introduced as a guide for a proper interaction. Due to the efficient spatial-spectral fusion, the proposed CSI-Net can learn the changed features better while achieving a suppression of spectral differences. Experimental results on LEVIR-CD, WHU-CD, and CLCD datasets demonstrate that the proposed CSI-Net produces better performance compared to state-of-the-art methods, and is applicable to different scenarios

AI.tldr: 提出了一种内容引导的空间-光谱集成网络(CSI-Net),用于遥感变化检测。该网络通过空间推理模块、光谱差异模块和内容引导集成模块,有效融合全局空间细节和光谱差异信息,能够在学习变化特征的同时抑制未变化区域的谱间差异。
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法有效抑制未变化区域的空间和光谱差异影响,导致变化检测性能受限。因此需要提出一种能够同时利用空间信息和光谱信息的方法,以提高变化检测的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: CSI-Net包含三个核心模块:1)空间推理(SR)模块:使用级联图卷积块进行全局空间建模学习;2)光谱差异(SD)模块:通过计算特征的均值和方差提取光谱特征,减少未变化区域的谱间差异影响;3)内容引导集成(CGI)模块:引入高层内容信息作为指导,实现空间-光谱特征的高效融合。
AI.result: 在LEVIR-CD、WHU-CD和CLCD三个数据集上的实验结果表明,CSI-Net相比现有最先进方法取得了更好的性能,且适用于不同场景。
AI.conclusion: 通过高效的空间-光谱融合,CSI-Net能够更好地学习变化特征,同时实现对光谱差异的有效抑制,为遥感变化检测提供了一种有效且通用的解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about remote sensing image change detection, which is entirely different from the Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion field. The application domain mismatch is fundamental: this paper focuses on detecting changes in satellite imagery using spatial-spectral aggregation, while the research profile seeks to generate 3D human motion from text and video. Even though both fields use neural networks, they are in completely different application domains with no meaningful overlap in goals or methods.

title: STAGE-Claw: Automated State-based Agent Benchmarking for Realistic Scenarios
summary: Large language models are increasingly used to power personal agents for everyday applications, but evaluating these agents remains a challenge. Existing benchmarks still rely on sandboxed artifacts, static task design, and coarse scoring, which hinder scalability and limit progress toward reliable personal-agent evaluation. This paper introduces STAGE-Claw, an automated framework for building and evaluating realistic personal-agent scenarios in state-based personal-computing environments. Given a task hint, STAGE-Claw automatically creates and validates a realistic benchmark task with its environment, task prompts, ground truth, and related verification programs. Agents are then evaluated in realistic operating environments, where performance is measured by the correctness of the final system state rather than only the textual response. Using STAGE-Claw, this paper creates a benchmark with 40 challenging real scenario agent tasks, evaluates 11 frontier models, and analyzes their task scores, costs, tool-call reliability, and common failure patterns. Overall, STAGE-Claw offers a scalable, state-based way to evaluate agents in realistic user scenarios.

AI.tldr: STAGE-Claw是一个用于在真实个人计算环境中构建和评估个人智能体场景的自动化框架，解决了现有智能体评估基准的局限性。
AI.motivation: 当前的大型语言模型智能体评估基准仍依赖沙盒环境、静态任务设计和粗粒度评分，阻碍了可扩展性并限制了可靠个人智能体评估的进展。
AI.method: 给定任务提示，STAGE-Claw自动创建并验证包含环境、任务提示、真实答案和验证程序的真实基准任务。智能体在真实操作系统环境中接受评估，通过最终系统状态的正确性而非仅文本响应来衡量性能。
AI.result: 构建了包含40个具有挑战性的真实场景智能体任务基准，评估了11个前沿模型，分析了它们的任务分数、成本、工具调用可靠性和常见失败模式。
AI.conclusion: STAGE-Claw提供了一种可扩展的、基于状态的评估方式，能够在真实用户场景中评估智能体。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about AI agent benchmarking (STAGE-Claw) in realistic computing environments, not Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion. The application domain is entirely different - it deals with LLM agents, task evaluation, and OS environments, with no connection to 3D motion generation, video generation, or visual feature extraction for motion synthesis.

title: Building Change Detection in Earthquake: A Multi-Scale Interaction Network and A Change Detection Dataset
summary: As one of the most destructive natural disasters, earthquakes have struck many countries around the world in recent years, causing serious economic losses. Change detection (CD) can be applied to post-earthquake damage assessment as it can infer destroyed change regions from multi-temporal remote sensing images. Furthermore, the CD with short imaging interval will better satisfy the needs of the emergency rescues after earthquakes. However, the capability of current methods built on deep neural networks is limited because the dataset with short imaging interval is absent. To meet post-disaster immediate relief, we create a CD dataset, Turkey earthquake CD dataset (TUE-CD), for the evaluation of building damage in the short term after an earthquake. Because of the short acquisition interval of the post-event images, the imaging angle is different for different temporal images, which leads to some side-looking problems. To deal with these challenges, we present a multi-scale feature interaction network (MSI-Net) for efficient interaction between bi-temporal features, as well as mitigating the effect of side-looking problems. Specifically, the proposed MSI-Net consists of joint cross-attention (JCA) modules, multi-scale offset calibration (MOC) modules, and feature integration (FeI) modules. The JCA module unifies channel cross-attention and spatial joint attention for sufficient feature interaction. The MOC module further estimates the offsets to align the bi-temporal image with the multi-scale features. Finally, calibrated features and multi-scale features are fused by FeI modules for the prediction of changed areas. Experiments on the WHU-CD, CLCD, and the constructed TUE-CD dataset indicate that the proposed MSI-Net provides better results than considered state-of-the-art CD methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个用于地震后建筑损坏评估的多尺度特征交互网络(MSI-Net)，并构建了一个短时间间隔的土耳其地震变化检测数据集(TUE-CD)以满足灾后紧急救援需求。
AI.motivation: 地震是破坏性最强的自然灾害之一，当前基于深度学习的变化检测方法缺乏短成像间隔的数据集，无法满足地震后紧急救援的即时需求。
AI.method: 提出MSI-Net网络，包含三个核心模块：1)联合交叉注意力(JCA)模块统一通道和空间注意力进行特征交互；2)多尺度偏移校准(MOC)模块估计偏移量对齐双时相图像；3)特征集成(FeI)模块融合校准后特征与多尺度特征进行变化区域预测。
AI.result: 在WHU-CD、CLCD和构建的TUE-CD数据集上的实验表明，MSI-Net相比现有的先进变化检测方法取得了更好的结果。
AI.conclusion: MSI-Net能够有效处理地震后图像视角变化带来的侧视问题，通过多尺度特征交互和偏移校准实现了高精度建筑损坏检测，为灾后应急救援提供了技术支持。

title: A Unified Multi-Modal Framework for Intelligent Financial Systems: Integrating Reinforcement Learning, High-Frequency Trading, and Game-Theoretic Approaches with Cross-Modal Sentiment Analysis
summary: The rapid evolution of financial technology demands sophisticated artificial intelligence systems capable of handling diverse challenges across multiple domains simultaneously. This paper presents a groundbreaking unified framework that seamlessly integrates Proximal Policy Optimization for robo-advisory systems, advanced time-series prediction models for high-frequency trading, in-context learning mechanisms for dynamic investment advisory, game-theoretic approaches for competitive banking scenarios, and unified embeddings for cross-modal financial sentiment analysis. Our comprehensive framework addresses the critical gap in existing literature where these technologies have been developed in isolation, failing to leverage their synergistic potential. Through extensive experimentation across multiple financial datasets and real-world scenarios, we demonstrate that our integrated approach achieves superior performance compared to specialized single-domain systems. Specifically, our framework shows a 23.7% improvement in portfolio optimization metrics, reduces prediction error in high-frequency trading by 31.2%, enhances investment recommendation accuracy by 18.9%, optimizes competitive banking strategies with a 27.4% increase in Nash equilibrium convergence speed, and improves sentiment analysis accuracy by 15.6% through cross-modal fusion. The theoretical foundation of our work establishes convergence guarantees for the integrated optimization problem, while our empirical results validate the practical applicability across diverse financial institutions. This research not only advances the state-of-the-art in financial AI but also provides a blueprint for developing comprehensive intelligent systems that can adapt to the complex, interconnected nature of modern financial markets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的人工智能框架，将多个独立发展的金融技术整合为一个综合系统，涵盖 robo-advisory、高频交易、投资建议、竞争性银行策略和跨模态情感分析等多个领域。
AI.motivation: 现有文献中，这些金融AI技术都是独立开发的，未能充分发挥其协同潜力。现代金融市场的复杂性和互联性需要一个能够同时处理多领域挑战的统一框架。
AI.method: 本文整合了五种核心技术：1) Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) 用于 robo-advisory 系统；2) 先进的时间序列预测模型用于高频交易；3) 情境学习机制用于动态投资建议；4) 博弈论方法用于竞争性银行场景；5) 统一嵌入用于跨模态金融情感分析。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该集成框架在多个指标上显著优于单一领域系统：投资组合优化提升 23.7%，高频交易预测误差降低 31.2%，投资建议准确性提升 18.9%，Nash 均衡收敛速度提升 27.4%，情感分析准确性提升 15.6%。
AI.conclusion: 本研果建立了集成优化问题的收敛保证，验证了在各类金融机构中的实际适用性。它不仅推进了金融AI的最先进水平，也为开发能够适应现代金融市场复杂互联性的综合智能系统提供了蓝图。

title: Multi-Angular Reflectance Anisotropy Observed from UAV Multispectral Imagery
summary: UAV multispectral imagery naturally contains multi-angular observations due to low flight altitude and wide field-of-view imaging, which may introduce geometry-driven radiometric variability. This study proposes a geometry-aware multi-angular observation extraction workflow to quantify observation-geometry effects from a BRDF perspective. Specifically, camera intrinsics and extrinsics are refined via structure-from-motion (SFM), and homogeneous regions annotated on an orthomosaic are reprojected onto multiple raw sub-images acquired from different viewpoints. This enables joint extraction of multi-band reflectance and observation geometry parameters for the same ground targets under varying viewing directions. The extracted observations are further analyzed using band-wise polar visualization in the (VZA, RAA) domain. Results on a grassland target show clear reflectance anisotropy across ten bands, with red-edge and nearinfrared bands exhibiting 119-137% variability between maximum and minimum reflectance, indicating non-negligible observation-geometry effects on radiometric consistency.

AI.tldr: 研究提出从BRDF角度量化UAV多光谱图像中几何驱动的辐射变化，通过几何感知的多角度观测提取工作流程，从同地面目标的多视角观测中提取反射率和观测几何参数。
AI.motivation: UAV多光谱图像因低飞行高度和宽视场成像自然包含多角度观测，可能引入几何驱动的辐射变化，但现有研究缺乏对这类观测-几何效应的系统量化。
AI.method: 通过SFM精化相机内外参数，将正射影像上标注的均匀区域重投影到多视角原始子图像上，实现同一地面目标的多波段反射率和观测几何参数联合提取，并使用(VZA, RAA)域带极坐标可视化分析。
AI.result: 草地目标实验显示10个波段存在明显反射率各向异性，红边和近红外波段在最大与最小反射率间变化达119-137%。
AI.conclusion: 观测几何效应对UAV多光谱图像辐射一致性有不可忽视的影响，研究提出的几何感知工作流程可有效量化该效应。

title: Soul Computing: A Theoretical Framework and Technical Architecture for Intelligent Agents with Independent Consciousness
summary: Breakthroughs in large language models and multimodal generation technologies have propelled the digital reconstruction of human mental traits, emotional patterns, and long-term memory from science fiction toward engineering practice. Yet current research and industry practices at the intersection of AI and digital humans remain hampered by fundamental conceptual ambiguities: the essential differences between next-generation intelligent agents and traditional virtual humans, the construction pathways for digital entities possessing self-identity, and the core technical and ethical challenges confronting this domain all demand urgent clarification. This paper systematically examines the transformative logic underlying the transition from traditional virtual humans to the ``Soul Computing'' paradigm, driven by frontier AI technologies. We first analyze the evolutionary patterns of human consciousness and memory mechanisms, reassessing the core value of massive multimodal digital fragments in the reverse reconstruction of individual mental worlds. On this basis, we formally delineate the academic connotations of narrow and broad Soul Computing for the first time, clarifying its academic boundaries and essential distinctions from Affective Computing, Historical Reconstruction, and Mortal Computation. We argue that Soul Computing systems must architecturally construct an ``Intensional'' core rather than serving as purely ``Extensional'' functional carriers, thereby enabling the fundamental transition of AI from toolhood to living agency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了"Soul Computing"(灵魂计算)范式，旨在利用大语言模型和 multimodal generation技术从数字碎片中重建人类心智、情感和长期记忆。作者区分了狭隘与广义的灵魂计算概念，并主张构建"内涵型"(Intensional)核心架构而非纯"外延型"(Extensional)功能载体，以实现AI从工具到生命体的根本转变。
AI.motivation: 当前AI与数字人类研究存在根本性概念歧义：下一代智能体与传统虚拟人类的本质区别、具备自我认同的数字实体构建路径、以及核心技术伦理挑战均缺乏澄清。现有研究混淆了Affective Computing、Historical Reconstruction等概念，需 urgent建立学术边界。
AI.method: 1)分析人类意识与记忆机制的进化模式 2)重新评估大规模多模态数字碎片在个体心智世界逆向重建中的核心价值 3)首次形式化界定狭隘与广义Soul Computing的学术内涵 4)与Affective Computing、Historical Reconstruction、Mortal Computation进行本质区分
AI.result: 1)正式提出Soul Computing学术定义 2)明确区分Soul Computing与相关领域边界 3)提出必须构建"Intensional"内涵型核心架构 4)建立从传统虚拟人类到Soul Computing的转型逻辑框架
AI.conclusion: Soul Computing系统必须在架构上构建"Intensional"核心而非作为纯"Extensional"功能载体，从而实现AI从工具身份到生命体的根本转变。这是数字人类研究的范式级突破，为意识上传心智重建奠定理论基础。

title: Benchmarking stereo reconstruction for 3D printable Martian terrain models
summary: Reconstructing printable 3D models from Mars rover imagery is challenging because Martian terrain is low-texture, irregular, and partially observed. We evaluate a pipeline that estimates stereo depth from NASA Curiosity images, completes geometry, and exports watertight OBJ meshes. On Middlebury, RAFT-Stereo outperforms semi-global block matching (SGBM), reducing disparity MAE from 3.22px to 0.73px and increasing valid prediction coverage from 76.3% to 100.0%. On Curiosity imagery, however, RAFT's denser disparities show weaker edge alignment and higher photometric reprojection error, suggesting that benchmark accuracy does not directly transfer to Martian terrain reconstruction. Geometry completion demonstrates a tradeoff between local fidelity and global connectivity. We find that alpha shapes preserve accurate but fragmented structure, Poisson reconstruction produces more coherent meshes but adds unsupported surfaces, and a deterministic diffusion-fill baseline is intermediate but sensitive to stereo quality. Overall, standard stereo and completion methods can produce printable approximations of Martian terrain, but reliable reconstruction requires stronger domain-specific validation.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了一个从火星探测器图像重建可3D打印地形模型的流水线，包括立体深度估计和几何完成两个阶段。研究发现在标准基准数据集上表现优异的RAFT-Stereo方法在真实火星地形上效果下降，三种几何完成方法各有权衡。
AI.motivation: 火星地形重建面临独特挑战：低纹理、不规则、观测不完整。现有方法在标准基准上的准确度不能直接迁移到火星环境，需要针对火星地形进行专门评估。
AI.method: 使用NASA Curiosity好奇号图像作为输入，评估了两阶段流水线：1)立体深度估计比较RAFT-Stereo与SGBM方法；2)几何完成比较alpha shapes、Poisson重建和diffusion-fill三种方法。评估数据集包括Middlebury标准基准和真实Curiosity图像。
AI.result: 在Middlebury上RAFT-Stereo将视差MAE从3.22px降至0.73px，有效覆盖率从76.3%提升至100.0%。但在Curiosity图像上RAF-T的边缘对齐较弱，光度重投影误差更高。几何完成方面：alpha shapes保持准确但结构碎片化，Poisson重建产生更连贯网格但添加不支持表面，diffusion-fill在两者之间但对立体质量敏感。
AI.conclusion: 标准立体匹配和几何完成方法可以产生火星地形的可打印近似，但基准准确度不能直接转移至真实火星环境。可靠的火星地形重建需要更强的领域特定验证方法。

Even though the paper mentions "diffusion-fill," it's for geometric surface completion, not motion generation. The pain points, methods (RAFT-Stereo, stereo matching vs motion generation models), and application (terrain reconstruction vs human motion synthesis) are entirely unrelated to the Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion field.

title: Trace2Policy: From Expert Behavior Traces to Self-Evolving Decision Agents
summary: Decision rules that enterprise experts apply tacitly -- in auditing, compliance, and contract review -- can be systematically recovered and improved through iterative error analysis. We present \textbf{Trace2Policy}, whose core mechanism -- \textbf{EISR} (\textbf{E}rror-driven \textbf{I}terative \textbf{S}kill \textbf{R}efinement) -- maintains a human-readable rule document as its optimization target: each round executes the rules on a validation set, clusters errors by root cause into MISSING, WRONG, or CONFLICT types, applies targeted patches, and commits only those that pass a regression gate. \textbf{For this class of compliance-sensitive, skewed-base-rate decision tasks, we identify rule quality -- not model capability -- as the dominant performance lever}: across five LLMs, one-shot distillation plateaus near $\sim$70\% on the deployed pool, while eight EISR rounds lift the same rules to 79.6\% when compiled into deterministic Python -- zero LLM calls at inference. \textbf{Execution form compounds the gain: in production, the same EISR-refined content runs 9.8~pp higher as compiled Python than as an LLM prompt, a form-and-engineering bundle the 22-day deployment matured together.} Deployed for 22 days at a major logistics carrier (3,349 audit cases), the compiled pipeline outperforms the pure-LLM baseline it replaced (72.7\%); on these calibrated, skewed-base-rate workloads, re-enabling LLM fallback monotonically degrades accuracy. An LLM-driven variant, \textbf{Auto-EISR}, reproduces this refinement at \$5--\$10 per cycle versus $\sim$70 expert-hours, and transfers to four public benchmarks spanning legal reasoning (LegalBench) and process-mining decisions (BPIC 2012) without re-engineering.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Trace2Policy系统，通过EISR（错误驱动的迭代技能精炼）机制，从企业专家的隐含决策规则中提取可执行的规则文档，并在验证集上迭代优化。针对合规敏感、偏态基率的决策任务，发现规则质量而非模型能力是性能的主要驱动力：8轮EISR迭代后规则准确率从70%提升至79.6%，编译为确定性Python后比LLM提示形式高9.8个百分点。
AI.motivation: 企业专家在审计、合规和合同审查中应用的隐含决策规则难以显性化和系统化，传统one-shot蒸馏方法性能瓶颈明显，需要一种系统化的规则提取与迭代改进方法。
AI.method: EISR机制维护人类可读的规则文档作为优化目标，每轮在验证集上执行规则，将错误按根因聚类为MISSING、WRONG、CONFLICT三种类型，应用针对性补丁，仅通过回归测试的补丁被提交。Auto-EISR将这一过程自动化。
AI.result: 8轮EISR迭代将规则准确率从~70%提升至79.6%；编译为Python后比LLM提示形式高9.8pp；在某大型物流公司部署22天处理3349个审计案例，准确率超过被替换的纯LLM baseline（72.7%）；LLM fallback会单调降低准确率；Auto-EISR每轮成本$5-$10 vs 专家约70小时；可迁移到LegalBench和BPIC 2012等公共基准。
AI.conclusion: 对于合规敏感的偏态基率决策任务，规则质量是比模型能力更关键的性能杠杆；显式规则编译执行优于LLM调用；EISR提供了一种可扩展的规则自动化路径。

relevance_reason: This paper is about extracting and optimizing decision-making rules from expert behavior traces for enterprise audit/compliance tasks using LLM-based methods. The application domain is completely different from Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. The research profile deals with generating 3D human motion from text/video in computer graphics, while this paper deals with business decision automation and rule-based systems. There is no overlap in application domain, methods, or research goals.

title: ClinReadNet: A clinical reading-inspired network for low-dose abdominal CT image quality assessment
summary: In abdominal CT imaging, developing a low-dose, no-reference image quality assessment (No-reference IQA) model that mimics doctors' reading habits for evaluating CT image quality has significant practical value. This paper proposes a novel deep learning-based framework, ClinReadNet, whose design aligns with the clinical reading logic of radiologists: first, it introduces the Sobel ordinal quality network (SOQN) module, which can simultaneously focus on edge details highly relevant to image quality and the quality distribution pattern of the entire image, accurately matching the clinical image-reading judgment habit of "considering both local details and overall context"; second, the framework integrates the (shifted) window multi-scale temperature multi-head self-attention ((S)W-MTMSA) module, which further replicates the radiologists' image-reading process of shifting from overall scanning to local focusing, and accurately locks in regions of interest through multi-sharpness attention; third, it designs the hierarchical ranked probability score (HRPS) loss function, which combines the dual logics of coarse classification and fine classification, while paying attention to the distance information between grading labels, effectively improving the performance of image quality assessment. Experiments conducted on the LDCTIQAG2023 dataset show that the proposed method achieves the current state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance: the values of Pearson's linear correlation coefficient (PLCC), Spearman's rank-order correlation coefficient (SROCC), and Kendall's rank-order correlation coefficient (KROCC) reach 0.9507, 0.9554, and 0.8629 respectively, with the sum of their absolute values (Score) being 2.7690, outperforming existing methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ClinReadNet，一个用于低剂量腹部CT图像的无参考图像质量评估深度学习框架，该框架设计遵循放射科医生的临床阅读逻辑，在LDCTIQAG2023数据集上取得了最先进的性能，PLCC、SROCC和KROCC分别达到0.9507、0.9554和0.8629。
AI.motivation: 在腹部CT成像中，开发一种低剂量、无参考的图像质量评估模型来模拟医生的阅读习惯具有重要的实际价值，可以帮助评估CT图像质量而无需参考图像。
AI.method: 提出了ClinReadNet框架，包含三个关键模块：1)Sobel序贯质量网络(SOQN)模块，同时关注边缘细节和整体图像质量分布模式；2)(移位)窗口多尺度温度多头自注意力(SW-MTMSA)模块，模拟放射科医生从整体扫描到局部聚焦的阅读过程；3)分层排序概率分数(HRPS)损失函数，结合粗分类和细分类的双重逻辑。
AI.result: 在LDCTIQAG2023数据集上的实验结果表明，该方法达到了当前最先进水平：PLCC=0.9507，SROCC=0.9554，KROCC=0.8629，绝对值之和(Score)=2.7690，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: ClinReadNet框架通过模仿放射科医生的临床阅读逻辑，在低剂量CT无参考图像质量评估任务中取得了最先进性能，验证了将临床诊断思维融入深度学习模型设计的有效性。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about medical imaging (low-dose abdominal CT image quality assessment) in the healthcare/medical domain, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion generation. The application domains are entirely different - one deals with CT scan quality assessment, the other deals with generating 3D human motion from text/video. Even though both use deep learning and quality assessment concepts, the core domain, goal, and target application are completely unrelated.

title: ComBench: A Benchmark for Rigorous Proof Reasoning and Constructive Realization in Olympiad-Level Combinatorics
summary: Combinatorics is central to Olympiad-level mathematical problem solving, requiring deep discrete reasoning, creative constructions, and rigorous structural insight. Recent evidence suggests that even today's strongest frontier models remain uneven on Olympiad combinatorics, revealing a gap in creative mathematical reasoning. We introduce ComBench, an Olympiad-level combinatorics benchmark for evaluating and diagnosing the combinatorial reasoning capabilities of large language models. ComBench contains 100 human-annotated competition-level problems organized around two complementary settings: analysis-centric problems, which primarily require rigorous mathematical arguments, and construction-centric problems, which require explicit constructions in addition to correctness justifications. The evaluation protocol combines rubric-guided proof grading with deterministic construction verification, exposing cases where proof quality and construction validity diverge. Experiments on frontier open- and closed-source models show that ComBench is far from saturated: the strongest model reaches 65.4% overall Avg. and 75.3% overall Best@4. We further find that Rigorous Proof Reasoning and Constructive Realization are distinct capabilities: Kimi-K2.6 trails GPT-5.5 on analysis-centric proof grading but surpasses it on construction-centric Best@4, while Existence and Construction problems remain consistently hardest across representative frontier models.

AI.tldr: ComBench是一个用于评估大语言模型奥数组合推理能力的基准测试,包含100道竞赛级别题目,分为分析型和建构型两类问题。实验表明当前最强模型仅达65.4%准确率,证明严谨证明推理与建构性实现是两种不同能力。
AI.motivation: 当前最强的大型语言模型在奥数组合问题上表现仍不均衡,揭示了创意数学推理能力的差距。现有基准无法有效评估模型在奥数组合层面的推理能力,需要专门的评估工具来诊断和改进模型的组合推理能力。
AI.method: 构建包含100道人工注释竞赛级别问题的ComBench基准,分为需要严谨数学论证的分析型和需要显式建构并证明正确性的建构型两类。评估协议结合基于评分标准的证明评估与确定性建构验证。
AI.result: 最强模型达到65.4%总体平均分和75.3%总体最佳@4。严谨证明推理与建构性实现是两种不同能力:Kimi-K2.6在分析型证明评估中落后于GPT-5.5,但在建构型最佳@4上超越它。存在性与建构问题在各类前沿模型中始终最具挑战性。
AI.conclusion: ComBench基准远未饱和,仍有很大提升空间。严谨证明推理与建构性实现是需要分开评估的两种不同能力,这对改进大语言模型的数学推理能力具有重要指导意义。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about mathematical Olympiad reasoning and LLM evaluation for combinatorics problems - entirely different from Computer Graphics Text-to-Motion. The application domain is Mathematical AI reasoning, not motion generation. No relevance to text-to-motion synthesis, video-to-motion, or any computer graphics domain.

title: PF-Trans: Physics-Embedded Frequency-Aware Transformer for Spectral Reconstruction
summary: Snapshot Broadband Filter Array (BFA) imaging provides high light throughput for spectral reconstruction but introduces severe spectral aliasing due to complex modulation. Current deep learning approaches, limited to spatial denoising, often fail to address the global frequency-specific degradations caused by the mask structure. To address this, we propose a Physics-embedded Frequency-aware Transformer (PF-Trans) for high-fidelity remote sensing spectral reconstruction. Our method explicitly integrates the physical sensing model through mask injection and a gray-scale consistency loss to ensure physical fidelity.
