Furthermore, we introduce a Dual-domain Block with a parallel Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) branch, enabling the network to perceive and suppress aliasing artifacts in the frequency domain. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that PF-Trans achieves state-of-the-art performance, achieving a Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR) of up to 48.50 dB on the GF-5 Shanghai dataset, significantly outperforming comparison methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于高保真遥感光谱重建的物理嵌入频率感知Transformer(PF-Trans)方法。该方法针对快照宽带滤光片阵列(BFA)成像中因复杂调制而产生的严重光谱混叠问题，通过掩模注入和灰度一致性损失实现物理保真度，并引入双域模块和并行快速傅里叶变换分支来抑制频率域混叠伪影。在GF-5上海数据集上达到48.50 dB的峰值信噪比，实现了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 快照宽带滤光片阵列(BFA)成像虽然能提供高光通量用于光谱重建，但因复杂调制而引入严重的光谱混叠。现有的深度学习方法仅局限于空间去噪，无法解决由掩模结构引起的全局频率特定退化问题。
AI.method: 提出物理嵌入频率感知Transformer(PF-Trans)，主要创新点包括：1)通过掩模注入显式集成物理传感模型；2)采用灰度一致性损失确保物理保真度；3)引入双域模块和并行快速傅里叶变换(FFT)分支，使网络能够感知并抑制频率域中的混叠伪影。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上进行了广泛实验，PF-Trans在GF-5上海数据集上实现了高达48.50 dB的峰值信噪比(PSNR)，显著优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: PF-Trans通过物理嵌入和频率感知模块的有效结合，成功解决了BFA成像中的光谱混叠问题，为高保真遥感光谱重建提供了新的有效方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about remote sensing spectral reconstruction (遥感光谱重建) using snapshot broadband filter array (BFA) imaging, which is entirely different from Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. While both use Transformers, the application domains are completely different: one deals with satellite spectral imaging and the other with human motion generation. The pain points and methods are unrelated - this paper addresses spectral aliasing in remote sensing rather than text-to-motion synthesis, video-to-motion generation, or cross-modal alignment between text, video, and 3D motion.

title: A complementary study on PlanGPT: Evaluation with defined Performance Metrics and comparison with a planner
summary:
Automated Planning is a subfield of Artificial Intelligence (AI) where the main objective is generating a sequence of actions, known as a plan, that helps us reach a goal state from an initial state. A planning problem is defined by a set of objects, an initial state and a desired goal state. The objective is to compute a plan that'll lead us from the inital state to the goal state. Programs that generate plans are called planners.
  In this paper, we did a complementary study to the state-of-the-art LLM called PlanGPT which was released last year. We redid some experiments to verify whether planning with LLMs is \textbf{pertinent} and \textbf{worthwhile}. We also check whether the results obtained in the official PlanGPT paper for plan coverage were correct, and we also performed a more comprehensive study on PlanGPT's performance: in our paper PlanGPT's performance was evaluated using two metrics: Plan Cost and Plan Generation Time. The results of planGPT were compared to those produced by a traditional planner for the same plans and same metrics. We discovered that PlanGPT is no better than a Greedy search strategy.

AI.tldr: 本文是对PlanGPT（一种用于自动规划的LLM）进行复现和补充研究。研究旨在验证LLM规划的有效性，并比较PlanGPT与传统启发式搜索策略的性能差异。
AI.motivation: PlanGPT是去年发布的用于自动规划的LLM，但作者希望验证其规划能力是否真正有效，以及与现有方法的比较结果是否可靠。
AI.method: 作者复现了PlanGPT的实验，使用两个评估指标（计划成本和计划生成时间），将PlanGPT的性能与传统规划器进行比较。
AI.result: 研究发现PlanGPT的性能并不优于传统规划方法，实际上与贪心搜索策略的效果相当。
AI.conclusion: LLM在自动规划领域的表现有限，PlanGPT并未展现出比传统方法更好的性能，为LLM规划的有效性提出了质疑。

relevance_reason: The paper is about PlanGPT - an LLM for automated planning (classical AI planning like robotics/logistics), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. Even though both involve LLMs, the application domains are fundamentally different: this paper addresses AI planning problems, not motion generation or 3D animation. The methods, goals, and evaluation metrics are entirely different from the research profile which focuses on generating human motion from text/video in computer graphics.

title: FSS-Net: Frequency-Spatial Synergy Network with Wavelet Attention for Carotid Artery Ultrasound Segmentation
summary: Accurate segmentation of carotid arteries in ultrasound imaging is critical for stroke risk assessment. However, speckle noise, low contrast, and blurred boundaries remain major challenges. In this paper, we propose a Frequency-Spatial Synergy Network (FSS-Net) to achieve noise-robust and high-precision carotid artery segmentation. The network integrates wavelet transform, multi-domain attention, and edge enhancement into a unified encoder-decoder architecture. Specifically, a Channel-Spatial-Wavelet Attention (CSWA) module is designed to suppress noise and purify semantic features in the frequency domain. A Wavelet-Enhanced Bottleneck (WEB) module is introduced to capture long-range global dependencies efficiently. Furthermore, a Laplacian-Guided Adaptive Edge Fusion (LAEF) module compensates high-frequency details and maintains boundary continuity. Extensive experiments on carotid ultrasound datasets show that FSS-Net achieves a Dice score (DSC) of 96.46% and strong robustness under low SNR conditions, outperforming several state-of-the-art methods. This method realizes accurate segmentation of carotid artery in ultrasonic imaging, effectively identifies carotid atherosclerotic plaque, and is verified by other task (such as segmentation of breast cancer), suggesting that it has good clinical application potential in identifying abnormal tissue masses in ultrasonic images.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FSS-Net网络，整合小波变换、多域注意力和边缘增强模块，实现颈动脉超声图像的高精度分割，在低信噪比条件下仍可达到96.46%的Dice分数。
AI.motivation: 颈动脉超声图像分割面临 speckle 噪声、低对比度和边界模糊等挑战，现有方法难以在噪声环境下保持高精度分割。
AI.method: 提出Frequency-Spatial Synergy Network(FSS-Net)，包含三个核心模块：1)CSWA模块在频域抑制噪声并净化特征；2)WEB模块捕获长距离全局依赖；3)LAEF模块增强高频细节并维持边界连续性。
AI.result: 在颈动脉超声数据集上达到96.46%的Dice分数，在低信噪比条件下表现出强鲁棒性，优于现有SOTA方法，并在乳腺癌分割任务中得到验证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了超声图像中颈动脉的准确分割，可有效识别颈动脉粥样硬化斑块，具有良好的临床应用潜力。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about carotid artery ultrasound image segmentation in the medical imaging domain, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. The application domains are entirely different: medical imaging vs. motion generation/synthesis. Although both use attention mechanisms and frequency domain analysis, FSS-Net addresses speckle noise in ultrasound images, not any of the text-to-motion pain points (3D visual guidance extraction, VLM-based quality supervision, cross-modal alignment, or motion naturalness). The methods and goals have no overlap with video generation models, VLMs, or 3D motion generation.

title: A Reliable Fault Diagnosis Method Based on Belief Rule Base Consider Robustness Analysis
summary: In equipment operation, the implementation of fault diagnosis is essential to ensure the continuity and safety of production equipment, improve operational efficiency and reduce maintenance costs. Since sensor readings are widely used for fault diagnosis, their reliability directly affects the results of fault diagnosis. A new fault diagnosis method is proposed to address the two problems of robustness assessment and robustness optimization of fault diagnosis models. For this purpose, a reliable fault diagnosis method based on a belief rule base (BRB) considering robustness analysis is proposed. Firstly, the robustness analysis of the BRB model is carried out systematically. Secondly, three robustness constraint strategies are proposed to optimize the robustness of the BRB fault diagnosis model. Finally, the effectiveness of the proposed model is verified by taking the fault diagnosis of WD615 diesel engine and Case Western Reserve University bearings as an example, and the experiments show that the proposed model improves both accuracy and robustness.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于置信规则库(BRB)的可靠故障诊断方法,系统分析BRB模型的鲁棒性,并提出三种鲁棒性约束策略优化故障诊断模型的鲁棒性。通过WD615柴油机和凯斯西储大学轴承故障诊断实验验证了该模型的有效性,提高了故障诊断的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 设备运行中故障诊断对确保生产连续性和安全性、提高运行效率、降低维护成本至关重要。传感器读数的可靠性直接影响故障诊断结果,需要解决故障诊断模型的鲁棒性评估和优化问题。
AI.method: 1)建立基于置信规则库(BRB)的故障诊断模型;2)系统进行BRB模型的鲁棒性分析;3)提出三种鲁棒性约束策略优化BRB故障诊断模型;4)采用WD615柴油机和凯斯西储大学轴承进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明,所提出的BRB故障诊断模型在WD615柴油机和凯斯西储大学轴承故障诊断中均提高了诊断准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 基于置信规则库考虑鲁棒性分析的故障诊断方法能够有效提高故障诊断模型的准确性和鲁棒性,为设备故障诊断提供了一种新的可靠方法。

relevance_reason: This paper is about fault diagnosis for mechanical equipment (diesel engines and bearings) using Belief Rule Base (BRB) methodology - completely different from Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. The application domain is industrial fault diagnosis/reliability engineering, not motion generation or computer graphics. There is no overlap in methods or application domain.

title: Efficient RWKV-based Representation Learning for 3D Point Clouds
summary: The recent receptance weighted key value (RWKV) model combines RNN-style recurrence, offering a linear-complexity alternative to Transformers' quadratic self-attention for modeling global dependencies. However, when directly applied to point clouds, RWKV, originally developed for sequential text, struggles to capture local geometric structures and model spatial dependencies effectively. To address this, we propose the \textbf{P-RWKV} block, which bridges the gap between sequence modeling and irregular 3D geometry while preserving the efficiency advantages of RWKV. It consists of a Local Perception Expansion (LPE) component to expand contextual perception along the spatio-temporal sequence and a Spatial Context Enhancement (SCE) component to strengthen spatial awareness. To validate the effectiveness of P-RWKV for point cloud understanding, we construct PointER, a single-modality self-supervised representation learning framework whose encoder is composed of stacked P-RWKV blocks. Furthermore, we extend P-RWKV to a cross-modality setting and integrate the proposed core sub-modules into multiple architectures, demonstrating strong plug-and-play flexibility and architectural generality. Extensive experiments show that the P-RWKV block and its key sub-modules achieve competitive performance across various tasks with lower computational cost and inference latency. Code will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: P-RWKV是一种新型神经网络模块，旨在将用于序列建模的RWKV模型应用于3D点云处理，通过局部感知扩展(LPE)和空间上下文增强(SCE)两个组件来解决点云数据的不规则性和空间依赖性建模问题。配合自监督学习框架PointER，在多种点云理解任务上实现了竞争力的性能，同时具有更低的计算成本和推理延迟。
AI.motivation: 原始RWKV模型是为序列文本设计的，直接应用于点云时难以有效捕捉局部几何结构和空间依赖关系。这是因为点云数据具有不规则性，与自然语言序列的规则结构不同。
AI.method: 提出P-RWKV块，包含两个核心组件：1) 局部感知扩展(LPE)组件，用于扩展沿时空序列的上下文感知；2) 空间上下文增强(SCE)组件，用于增强空间感知能力。基于此构建了PointER单模态自监督表示学习框架，并将P-RWKV扩展到跨模态设置。
AI.result: 实验表明P-RWKV块及其关键子模块在各种点云任务上实现了竞争力的性能，同时具有更低的计算成本和推理延迟，并展示了良好的即插即用灵活性和架构通用性。
AI.conclusion: P-RWKV成功架起了序列建模与不规则3D几何之间的桥梁，在保持RWKV效率优势的同时，有效提升了点云理解的性能。

relevance_reason: The paper is about 3D point cloud processing (classification, segmentation) using RWKV-based representation learning. While it deals with 3D data, the application domain is completely different from Text-to-Motion generation. This paper focuses on point cloud understanding tasks, not on generating human motion from text/video inputs. The methods (RWKV for point clouds) and the pain points addressed are unrelated to cross-modal text-to-motion synthesis, VLM-based supervision, or video-to-motion generation which are central to the research profile.

title: Cross-Modal Knowledge Distillation without Paired Data: Theoretical Foundation and Algorithm
summary: Cross-modal knowledge distillation (CMKD) studies how a (large) teacher model trained on one type of data (e.g., images) can guide a (smaller) student model building on another type of data (e.g., text/audio). Existing CMKD methods often require paired multi-modal data with aligned semantics, but obtaining such paired data are often costly and impractical. To mitigate this limitation, we develop a new CMKD framework for the more challenging setting where paired data are unavailable. In particular, we establish a cross-modal distributional relationship between teacher and student models, which reveals two fundamental quantities governing effective distillation: feature alignment and label alignment. These quantities characterize semantic discrepancy between modalities at the levels of representation and prediction distributions, respectively. Motivated by this insight, we propose a principled framework, with theoretical guarantees, that enables effective cross-modal knowledge distillation by aligning distributions rather than individual samples. Extensive experiments across a wide range of multimodal benchmarks show that our framework is highly effective in both unpaired and paired data settings, improving significantly over prior work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的跨模态知识蒸馏(CMKD)框架，用于在paired data不可用时，通过对齐特征分布和标签分布来实现跨模态知识转移。
AI.motivation: 现有CMKD方法依赖paired multi-modal data，但获取成本高且不切实际，需要开发无paired data情况下的跨模态蒸馏方法。
AI.method: 建立跨模态分布关系，通过特征对齐和标签对齐两个基本量来刻画不同模态在表示和预测分布层面的语义差异，并提供理论保证。
AI.result: 在多种多模态基准数据集上验证，框架在unpaired和paired数据设置下均显著优于先前方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过分布对齐而非样本对齐实现跨模态知识蒸馏，为paired data稀缺的现实场景提供了有效解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Cross-Modal Knowledge Distillation (CMKD) for general multi-modal learning, not specifically about Text-to-Motion generation in Computer Graphics. While it addresses cross-modal alignment conceptually, it does not target the text-to-motion domain at all - it appears to be about general knowledge transfer between modalities (possibly for image classification or similar tasks). The paper does not address any of the specific pain points: extracting 3D visual guidance from 2D video, VLM-based quality supervision for motion, or maintaining motion naturalness. Using "cross-modal alignment" concepts in a general multi-modal setting is fundamentally different from the specific application of generating 3D human motion from text in computer graphics.

title: CoCoSI: Collaborative Cognitive Map Construction for Spatial Intelligence
summary: Spatial intelligence is a key frontier for multimodal large language models (MLLMs), enabling them to reason about the physical world from visual experience. Inspired by human spatial cognition, recent approaches construct grid-based cognitive maps from multi-frame visual inputs to maintain coherent spatial representations over time. However, limited context lengths still challenge spatial understanding, while existing methods, such as long-context modeling and external memory, often require architectural changes, memory modules, or finetuning, limiting their applicability to off-the-shelf pretrained MLLMs. This motivates a lightweight, model-agnostic method for preserving spatial information beyond the native context window. To this end, we propose a plug-and-play multi-agent framework that collaboratively constructs cognitive maps as structured spatial memory, enhancing the spatial understanding of arbitrary pretrained MLLMs without architectural modification or additional training. Our framework features local-global agent coordination, cognitive map construction with atomic commits, and cross-agent verification. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance on spatial understanding tasks while remaining fully training-free. Code will be released.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个即插即用的多智能体框架，通过协作构建认知地图作为结构化空间记忆，增强预训练多模态大语言模型的空间理解能力，无需架构修改或额外训练。
AI.motivation: 空间智能是多模态大语言模型的关键前沿，但有限的上下文长度挑战空间理解。现有方法如长上下文建模和外部记忆通常需要架构改变或微调，限制了对现成预训练模型的适用性。
AI.method: 提出一个即插即用的多智能体框架，具有三个核心机制：1）局部-全局智能体协调；2）认知地图的原子提交构建；3）跨智能体验证。
AI.result: 广泛实验表明，该方法在空间理解任务上达到优越性能，同时完全训练免费。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能有效增强任意预训练多模态大语言模型的空间理解能力，无需架构修改或额外训练。

relevance_reason: This paper is about constructing cognitive maps for spatial intelligence in multimodal LLMs, which is completely different from the Text-to-Motion generation domain in Computer Graphics. While it uses VLMs, it doesn't address any of the pain points: extracting 3D visual guidance from 2D video, VLM-based motion quality supervision, cross-modal alignment for motion, or motion naturalness. The application domain is entirely different - this is about enhancing spatial understanding in VLMs for general tasks, not about generating or synthesizing 3D human motion.

title: HIPIF: Hierarchical Planning and Information Folding for Long-Horizon LLM Agent Learning
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities as autonomous agents across a wide range of tasks, their performance often degrades in multi-turn long-horizon agentic tasks. Existing methods have made progress through fine-grained credit assignment to alleviate long-horizon sparse rewards and hierarchical reinforcement learning to decompose tasks and reduce long-term dependency. However, these methods still do not directly address long-context interference, in which continuously growing histories weaken the agent's ability to track the global task state and impair subsequent reasoning and decision-making. Inspired by the way humans handle complex tasks through subgoal decomposition and completed progress summarization, we propose Hierarchical Planning and Information Folding (HIPIF) for long-horizon LLM agent learning. HIPIF trains the agent end-to-end to organize long-horizon execution around explicit subgoals while folding completed subgoal histories to reduce long-context interference. Furthermore, to stabilize subgoal-based planning and execution, HIPIF combines hierarchical reflection and subgoal-oriented process rewards to guide subgoal generation, transition, and execution, without relying on costly auxiliary models or task-specific expert trajectories. Extensive experiments on three publicly available agentic benchmarks demonstrate the validity of our method.

AI.tldr: 提出了HIPIF方法，通过子目标分解和信息折叠解决大型语言模型在长视野多轮代理任务中的长上下文干扰问题。
AI.motivation: LLMs在多轮长视野代理任务中性能下降，现有方法虽通过细粒度信用分配和层次强化学习取得进展，但未直接解决长上下文干扰问题——即不断增长的历史削弱代理跟踪全局任务状态的能力。
AI.method: 提出层次规划与信息折叠(HIPIF)方法：1)训练代理围绕明确子目标组织长视野执行；2)将已完成的子目标历史进行折叠以减少长上下文干扰；3)结合层次反射和子目标导向的过程奖励来稳定子目标规划和执行，无需额外辅助模型或任务特定专家轨迹。
AI.result: 在三个公开的代理基准测试上进行了广泛实验，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: HIPIF通过子目标分解和已完成进度的信息折叠，有效缓解了长上下文干扰问题，提升了LLMs在长视野代理任务中的性能。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about LLM agent learning for long-horizon multi-turn tasks (NLP/AI Agents domain), while the research profile is specifically about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion generation. The application domains are entirely different - one deals with language model agents and task planning, the other deals with generating 3D human motion from text/video. No connection to motion generation, visual features, or cross-modal alignment for graphics synthesis.

title: Vision-Assisted Foundation Model for Solving Multi-Task Vehicle Routing Problems
summary: Multi-task vehicle routing problems play a critical role in enhancing efficiency across various industries and service sectors. These problems consist of multiple variants that optimize routing costs while meeting diverse customer constraints. Existing multi-task VRP solvers solely utilize a graph-based modality, limiting their ability to address variants with multiple constraints. As a format to represent complex semantics, vision modality shows great potential for encoding diverse VRP constraints. This motivates us to learn patch-level semantics from the vision images, and then integrate them into a graph-based model to solve various VRP variants simultaneously. However, directly applying this approach to multi-task VRPs presents three challenges: 1) existing VRP images lack constraint representations, which are essential for multi-task VRPs, 2) the fixed receptive field of individual patches cannot effectively accommodate varying requirements across tasks, and 3) imbalanced pixel distribution among constraints may cause the model to overlook constraints with fewer pixels. In this paper, we propose a vision-assisted foundation model (VaFM) to address these challenges. In the vision modality, input images tailored to all constraints are encoded by a convolutional neural network. The obtained patch embeddings are fused with graph-based nodes to generate solutions, with an auxiliary task designed to address the pixel-imbalanced issue. The performance of VaFM is evaluated across 16 different VRP variants. The experimental results demonstrate the superiority of VaFM over state-of-the-art methods, especially for variants with complex constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种视觉辅助的基础模型(VaFM)，将视觉模态与图结合用于解决多任务车辆路径规划问题。该方法通过CNN编码针对约束定制的输入图像，将patch嵌入与图节点融合生成解决方案，并设计了辅助任务来解决像素不平衡问题。在16个不同VRP变体上进行了评估，表现出优于现有方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 多任务VRP在提升各行业效率方面具有重要作用，但现有求解器仅使用图模态，难以处理多约束变体。视觉模态可编码复杂语义，但直接应用面临三大挑战：1)现有VRP图像缺乏约束表示；2)patch的固定感受野无法适应不同任务需求；3)约束间像素分布不平衡可能导致模型忽略像素较少的约束。
AI.method: 提出VaFM方法：在视觉模态中，使用针对所有约束定制的输入图像，由卷积神经网络编码；将获得的patch嵌入与图节点融合以生成解决方案；设计辅助任务解决像素不平衡问题。
AI.result: 在16个不同VRP变体上评估VaFM性能。实验结果表明，VaFM优于现有最先进方法，尤其对于具有复杂约束的变体效果显著。
AI.conclusion: VaFM成功地将视觉模态与图基模型结合，有效解决了多任务VRP中的约束表示和像素不平衡问题，为复杂约束的VRP变体提供了一种有效的解决思路。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper addresses Vehicle Routing Problems (VRP) in logistics/optimization domain, which is entirely different from Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. The application domain is logistics optimization, not human motion generation or computer graphics. The methods (CNN for encoding VRP images, graph patch embedding) are used for solving routing optimization problems, not for text-to-motion synthesis. None of the pain points (3D visual guidance extraction, VLM quality supervision, cross-modal alignment, motion naturalness) are addressed. This is a fundamental field mismatch - logistics optimization vs. motion generation in computer graphics.

title: ActiveMem: Distributed Active Memory for Long-Horizon LLM Reasoning
summary: Memory is essential for enabling large language model (LLM) agents to handle long-horizon reasoning tasks. Existing memory mechanisms are largely centralized, typically organizing retrieved information and interaction history within a single model context. This design imposes a fundamental trade-off: scaling reasoning trajectories risks context overload, whereas aggressive content pruning may result in irreversible information loss. Seeking a better trade-off, we draw inspiration from human cognitive systems, especially the functional complementarity between the prefrontal cortex (executive control) and the hippocampus (memory management), suggesting that such a trade-off need not be inherent, but may instead stem from centralized memory organization. To this end, we propose ActiveMem, a heterogeneous framework that decouples agent memory from the core reasoning process. Specifically, a high-level Planner utilizes distilled semantic gists to execute reasoning, while a lightweight, distributed memory system operates in parallel to actively accumulate and consolidate these gists throughout the task. Experiments on BrowseComp-Plus and GAIA show that ActiveMem achieves state-of-the-art accuracy with significantly reduced overhead, demonstrating the effectiveness of distributed active memory for long-horizon reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出了ActiveMem，一种异构框架，通过解耦代理记忆与核心推理过程，实现分布式主动记忆，增强LLM代理处理长程推理任务的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆机制是集中式的，在扩展推理轨迹时面临上下文过载，而激进的内容修剪可能导致不可逆的信息丢失。借鉴人脑前额叶（执行控制）和海马体（记忆管理）的功能互补性，认为这种权衡并非必然，而是源于集中式记忆组织。
AI.method: ActiveMem包含高层Planner使用蒸馏语义要点执行推理，同时轻量级分布式记忆系统并行积累和整合这些要点。
AI.result: 在BrowseComp-Plus和GAIA基准上实现最先进的准确性，显著减少计算开销。
AI.conclusion: 分布式主动记忆机制对长程推理任务非常有效，为解决LLM代理记忆瓶颈提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about distributed active memory systems for LLM reasoning, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion. The application domain is AI/LLM reasoning, not video generation, motion synthesis, or any computer graphics task. None of the methods (distributed memory for LLM agents) address the pain points (3D visual feature extraction, cross-modal alignment, motion naturalness). This is a fundamental field mismatch - entirely different research area.

title: Few-step Generative Models as Lossy Compression
summary: DiffC provides a principled way to reuse pre-trained diffusion models for lossy compression, but its encoding and decoding procedures remain slow because they require many discretized forward and reverse steps. We study whether few-step generative models -- Rectified Flow, Consistency Trajectory Models (CTM), and MeanFlow -- can be cast as codecs within the same reverse channel coding (RCC) framework. The main challenge is that RCC requires posterior and shared distribution parameters, whereas these models do not explicitly parameterize intermediate conditional distributions. For Rectified Flow and MeanFlow, we use the equivalence between velocity parameterization and diffusion-style denoising parameterization to derive the quantities required by RCC. For CTM, which is distilled from EDM, we adopt the EDM noise parameterization together with local Gaussian approximations of the sender and shared distributions at intermediate states. This yields a proof-of-concept probabilistic formulation that enables compression with pre-trained few-step generative models without retraining. On low-resolution benchmarks, the resulting codecs reduce encoding and decoding time and improve realism in the low-bit-rate regime.

AI.tldr: 研究将few-step生成模型(Rectified Flow、CTM、MeanFlow)整合到reverse channel coding(RCC)框架中实现无损压缩，证明在低分辨率基准上可减少编解码时间并提高低比特率下的真实性。
AI.motivation: DiffC虽能复用预训练扩散模型进行有损压缩，但其编码解码过程缓慢，需大量离散前后向步骤，因此探索更高效的few-step生成模型作为编解码器。
AI.method: 对于Rectified Flow和MeanFlow，利用速度参数化与扩散式去噪参数化的等价性推导RCC所需量；对于CTM，采用EDM噪声参数化结合sender和shared分布在中间状态的局部高斯近似。
AI.result: 得到无需重新训练的预训练few-step生成模型的压缩概念验证，在低分辨率基准上降低了编码解码时间并在低比特率下提升了真实性。
AI.conclusion: few-step生成模型可作为高效编解码器，为实时压缩应用提供了新的可行方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about image compression using few-step generative models (Rectified Flow, CTM, MeanFlow), which is completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion domain. The application domains are fundamentally different: image compression vs. 3D human motion generation from text/video. While the paper uses some similar generative modeling techniques, they are applied to a entirely different problem (compression) and different data modality (2D images vs. 3D motion). It doesn't address any of the pain points (3D visual guidance extraction, VLM quality supervision, cross-modal alignment, motion naturalness) and is not relevant to text-to-motion synthesis research.

title: One Token per Multimodal Evidence: Latent Memory for Resource-Constrained QA
summary: External memory effectively grounds large language models (LLMs) and vision-language models (VLMs)-based question answering (QA) in relevant multimodal evidence. However, existing memory paradigms represent each memory item in raw text and image forms, so retrieval-based systems must pass the retrieved text or images to the generation LLMs/VLMs, resulting in high token consumption and storage pressure, making it unaffordable for resource-constrained applications. We propose Latent Memory, a latent-space memory paradigm that replaces each raw text or image evidence item with a single high-dimensional latent token produced by a small compressor LLM/VLM. Rather than retrieving raw evidence for generation, Latent Memory operates in a unified latent representation space: the query is embedded into this space to retrieve relevant latent tokens, and the retrieved latent tokens are directly prompted to a pretrained LLM or VLM for answer generation. To make each latent token simultaneously informative for reconstruction, retrieval, and generation, we train the compressor with reconstruction, contrastive, and distillation objectives in a unified end-to-end manner. Latent Memory is evaluated on seven text-only QA benchmarks (e.g., HotpotQA) and multimodal QA benchmarks, where it achieves competitive QA performance compared to advanced RAG baselines while consuming 3x to 10x fewer generator tokens. It can also deliver the strongest image-grounded QA performance on WebQA. Code is available at https://github.com/zz1358m/Latent-Memory-Master.

AI.tldr: 提出Latent Memory，一种潜在空间记忆范式，用高维潜在token替代原始文本/图像证据，减少生成模型的token消耗。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆范式直接存储原始文本/图像，检索系统需要将原始证据传递给生成模型，导致高token消耗和存储压力，对资源受限应用不可行。
AI.method: 使用小型压缩LLM/VLM将文本/图像证据压缩为单一高维潜在token，训练压缩器时结合重建、对比和蒸馏目标。查询嵌入潜在空间检索相关token，直接用于生成答案。
AI.result: 在7个文本QA基准和 Multimodal QA基准上评估，QA性能与先进RAG基线相当，但generator token消耗减少3-10倍。在WebQA上实现最强图像问答性能。
AI.conclusion: Latent Memory通过潜在空间表示有效降低token消耗，同时保持竞争力，为资源受限应用提供可行方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about Question Answering systems with latent memory for reducing token consumption - entirely different application domain from Computer Graphics Text-to-Motion. While it mentions VLM, it's used for compressing evidence for QA, not for motion generation, video-to-motion synthesis, or cross-modal alignment for 3D motion. No relevance to text-to-motion generation, motion fidelity, or visual guidance extraction.

title: Geometric Coastline Localization using Vision-Language Models
summary: Coastline detection in remote sensing imagery is commonly formulated as a pixel-wise segmentation problem, where the final coastline is extracted from a predicted mask through post-processing. This formulation relegates coastline geometry, the primary representation used in coastal change analysis, to a secondary artifact rather than the learning objective. In practice, coastlines are defined by geomorphic proxies such as vegetation lines, dune toes, or cliff edges, rather than an instantaneous land-water boundary often used in pixel-based segmentation approaches. In this work, we revisit coastline extraction from a representation perspective and formulate the task as geometric boundary localization. We use the New Zealand Coastal Change Dataset (NZCCD) and high-resolution aerial imagery from Land Information New Zealand (LINZ) to develop CoastlineVLM-7B, a vision-language model (VLM) built on the GeoChat-7B/LLaVA-1.5 architecture that jointly performs coastline presence detection, proxy-type classification, and coastline grounding. The model directly predicts a coastline as a polyline rather than a dense segmentation mask. We evaluate CoastlineVLM-7B against segmentation baselines under strict one-pixel boundary supervision. Results show that geometry-based metrics are more suitable for assessing coastline localization quality than pixel-overlap metrics such as Intersection over Union (IoU). CoastlineVLM-7B improves global geometric alignment with reference coastlines, reducing Hausdorff distance from 37.74 m to 31.84 m and Earth Mover's Distance from 21.12 m to 17.32 m. These results indicate that output representation is a critical design choice in coastline extraction, and that geometry-oriented learning, combined with the semantic reasoning capabilities of vision-language models, aligns well with how coastlines are defined and evaluated in operational coastal monitoring.

AI.tldr: 本文重新定义海岸线提取任务，从像素级分割转向几何边界定位，使用视觉语言模型CoastlineVLM-7B直接预测海岸线折线而非分割掩膜。
AI.motivation: 传统像素级分割方法将海岸线几何作为次要产物，而实际海岸线由植被线、沙丘 toe 或悬崖边等地貌代理定义，非即时水陆边界。
AI.method: 基于GeoChat-7B/LLaVA-1.5架构构建Vision-Language Model (VLM)，联合执行海岸线存在检测、代理类型分类和海岸线定位，直接预测折线表示。
AI.result: 几何指标更适于评估海岸线定位质量；Hausdorff距离从37.74m降至31.84m，Earth Mover's Distance从21.12m降至17.32m。
AI.conclusion: 输出表示形式是关键设计选择，几何导向学习结合VLM语义推理能力，与运营海岸监测中海岸线定义和评估方式高度契合。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about geometric coastline localization using VLMs - a geographic/computer vision task for extracting coastline features from images. The research profile is about Text-to-Motion generation in Computer Graphics - specifically generating 3D human motion from text descriptions. These are entirely different application domains. While both use Vision-Language Models, the paper uses VLM for geographic feature extraction (predicting coastline polylines), not for motion synthesis, quality assessment, or cross-modal alignment between text, video and 3D motion representations. The pain points about 3D visual guidance extraction, motion fidelity supervision, and temporal consistency are completely unaddressed.

title: Learning What to Remember: Observability-Safe Memory Retention via Constrained Optimization for Long-Horizon Language Agents
summary: Long-horizon language agents accumulate observations, reasoning traces, and retrieved facts that exceed their finite context windows, making memory retention a fundamental resource-allocation problem. Existing memory systems improve management through heuristic scoring, retrieval optimization, or learned compression, but largely treat retention as a local decision problem and do not explicitly model its long-term consequences under realistic observability constraints. To fill this gap, we formulate memory retention as a constrained stochastic optimization problem with explicit budget feasibility, evidence utility, and delayed costs including miss penalties, reacquisition delays, and stale-information risk. We then propose OSL-MR (Observability-Safe Learning for Memory Retention), a novel framework that enforces a strict separation between online-observable features and offline-available supervision (OAS). OSL-MR combines an evidence learner trained from realized evidence supervision with a Mixed-Score heuristic that serves both as a deployable online-safe baseline and as a structured inductive prior for learning. The resulting policy learns query-conditioned evidence value directly from interaction data while remaining deployable under the same observability constraints. Experiments on LOCOMO and LongMemEval show that OSL-MR consistently outperforms recency-based methods, Generative Agents-style scoring, and other heuristic baselines, particularly under tight memory budgets. The Mixed-Score prior further improves precision while preserving recall, and sensitivity analysis demonstrates robustness across a wide range of cost configurations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OSL-MR框架，将长程语言智能体的记忆保留问题形式化为约束随机优化问题，通过可观测性安全学习(OAS)分离在线可观测特征与离线可用监督，并结合混合评分启发式方法，在有限上下文窗口下实现更优的记忆资源分配。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆系统将保留视为局部决策问题，未能显式建模有限上下文窗口下记忆保留的长期后果和现实可观测性约束，导致记忆资源分配次优。
AI.method: 1)将记忆保留形式化为带显式预算可行性、证据效用和延迟成本(包括遗漏惩罚、重获取延迟和信息过期风险)的约束随机优化问题；2)提出OSL-MR框架，强制在线可观测特征与离线可用监督的严格分离(OAS)；3)结合基于实现证据监督的证据学习器与混合评分启发式方法，作为可部署在线安全基线和学习结构化归纳先验；4.学习查询条件下的证据价值，直接从交互数据中学习同时保持可观测性约束下的可部署性。
AI.result: 在LOCOMO和LongMemEval基准上的实验表明，OSL-MR始终优于基于最近性的方法、生成式智能体风格评分和其他启发式基线，特别是在紧凑内存预算条件下。混合评分先验进一步提升精度同时保持召回率，敏感性分析显示在广泛成本配置范围内具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 本文工作表明，将记忆保留问题形式化为约束优化问题并显式建模可观测性约束，能够有效提升长程语言智能体的记忆管理性能。OSL-MR框架为有限上下文窗口下的智能记忆保留提供了新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about memory retention optimization for long-horizon language agents (LLM/NLP domain), not computer graphics or text-to-motion generation. It has nothing to do with video generation, 3D motion synthesis, cross-modal alignment between text/video/motion, or any computer graphics application. While it uses constrained optimization, that's a general ML technique - the application domain is completely different from what the research profile needs.

title: 3D-CoS: A New 3D Reconstruction Paradigm Based on VLM Code Synthesis
summary: Most recent 3D reconstruction and editing systems operate on implicit and explicit representations such as NeRF, point clouds, or meshes. While these representations enable high-fidelity rendering, they are fundamentally low-level and hard to control programmatically. In contrast, we propose and systematically evaluate a new 3D reconstruction paradigm, 3D Code Synthesis (3D-CoS), where 3D assets are constructed as executable Blender code, a programmatic and interpretable medium. To assess how well current VLMs can use code to represent 3D objects, we evaluate representative open-source and closed-source VLMs in code-based reconstruction under a unified protocol. We further introduce a suite of structured code-synthesis workflows, including blueprint-based planning, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) over Blender API documentation, few-shot geometric demonstrations, and a component-level Agent workflow for part-wise code generation. To demonstrate the unique advantages of this representation, we further evaluate localized text-driven modifications and compare our code-based edits with a point-cloud-based 3D editing baseline. Our study shows that code as a 3D representation offers strong controllability and locality, yielding stronger edit fidelity and better preservation of unedited regions in our targeted editing evaluation. Our work also analyzes the potential of this paradigm, delineates the current capability frontier of VLMs for programmatic 3D modeling, and highlights code synthesis as a promising direction for editable 3D reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 3D-CoS是一种新的3D重建范式，将3D资产构建为可执行的Blender代码，而非传统的NeRF、点云或网格表示。通过评估VLMs在代码基重建中的能力，引入基于蓝图的规划、检索增强生成、几何演示和组件级Agent工作流。实验表明代码表示具有更强的可控性和局部性，在目标编辑评估中实现更好的编辑保真度和未编辑区域保留。
AI.motivation: 现有3D重建和编辑系统使用的NeRF、点云、网格等表示本质上是低级的，难以程序化控制。而Blender代码作为一种程序化和可解释的媒介，可能提供更强的可编辑性和可控性。当前VLMs在程序化3D建模方面的能力边界尚不清楚。
AI.method: 在统一协议下评估开源和闭源VLMs进行代码基3D重建；引入结构化代码合成工作流包括：基于蓝图的规划、Blender API文档的检索增强生成、少样本几何演示、组件级Agent工作流用于部分级代码生成；与点云基3D编辑基线进行对比实验。
AI.result: 代码作为3D表示展现出强大的可控性和局部性，在目标编辑评估中实现了更强的编辑保真度，并更好地保留了未编辑区域。这表明代码表示方法优于传统的点云基编辑方法。
AI.conclusion: 代码作为3D表示是有前景的可编辑3D重建方向。该范式提供了独特的可控性和局部性优势，同时划定了VLMs在程序化3D建模方面的当前能力边界。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D reconstruction using VLM-generated Blender code, which is a completely different application domain from Text-to-Motion. The research profile focuses on generating human motion from text/video inputs, while this paper addresses static 3D asset reconstruction and editing. None of the pain points are addressed: no video priors for motion extraction, no motion fidelity or temporal consistency, no cross-modal alignment between text-video-motion. Although VLMs are used in both, the application domain (3D reconstruction vs. human motion generation) is entirely different, making this paper irrelevant to the Text-to-Motion research field.

title: Infini Memory: Maintainable Topic Documents for Long-Term LLM Agent Memory
summary: Long-term LLM agents need persistent memory that can track changing facts and provide relevant evidence across sessions. Existing memory systems often store observations as isolated records, summaries, or indexed fragments, which makes evidence aggregation, fact revision, and memory maintenance difficult. We propose Infini Memory, a maintainable text-based persistent memory architecture that treats agent memory as topic-structured documents. Each topic document serves as a semantic unit for collecting related evidence, preserving metadata, and revising facts over time. New observations are first staged in a buffer and periodically consolidated into coherent textual contexts. At inference time, an agentic retrieval procedure lets the LLM read memory through iterative tool calls rather than a single retrieval step. On MemoryAgentBench, Infini Memory achieves 64.7% overall score. Ablations show that topic-structured maintenance and iterative evidence inspection improve complementary aspects of long-term memory use.

AI.tldr: 本文提出InfiniMemory，一种面向长期LLM智能体的持久化记忆架构，采用主题结构化文档存储方式解决传统记忆系统难以进行证据聚合、事实修订和记忆维护的问题。
AI.motivation: 长期运行的LLM智能体需要持久记忆来跟踪变化的事实并在多轮会话中提供相关证据。现有记忆系统将观察存储为孤立的记录、摘要或索引片段，导致证据聚合、事实修订和记忆维护困难。
AI.method: 1)将智能体记忆组织为主题结构化文档，每个主题文档作为语义单元收集相关证据、保留元数据并支持事实修订；2)新观察先暂存于缓冲区，定期整合为连贯的文本上下文；3)推理时采用智能体式检索流程，通过迭代工具调用让LLM读取记忆而非单次检索。
AI.result: 在MemoryAgentBench上InfiniMemory达到64.7%的总体得分。消融实验表明主题结构化维护和迭代证据检查对长期记忆使用的不同方面有互补的改进效果。
AI.conclusion: InfiniMemory通过主题结构化文档和迭代检索机制有效解决了长期记忆的证据聚合、事实修订和维护难题，验证了架构设计的有效性。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about LLM agent memory systems (topic-structured documents for long-term LLM agents), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion from video/text). The application domains are entirely different - one deals with memory architecture for LLM agents, the other deals with video-to-motion generation in computer graphics. No methodological overlap either - the paper focuses on memory management, evidence aggregation, and iterative retrieval, not on video generation models, VLMs for motion quality assessment, or 3D motion synthesis.

title: 5% > 100%: Flatness Preference is All You Need for Multimodal Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning
summary: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) methods provide a streamlined and efficient tool for adapting large models to domain-specific multimodal downstream tasks. Although these methods proved their tangible effects in practice, their principal aspects remain under-explored. Therefore we remain curious about the underlying generalization mechanisms in various PEFT methods and how they can be further enhanced. In this paper, we reveal the flatness preference widely present in various PEFTs, where a small fraction of sharp dimensions dominates the generalization of PEFT. This finding suggests an appealing possibility: we may be satisfied with a better generalization by merely attending to this small fraction of sharp dimensions instead of all of them. Furthermore, we propose Flatness Preference Optimization (FlatPO) to flatten these key sharpness dimensions, leading various PEFTs toward better generalization. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our findings and the proposed method. Code is available at https://github.com/Can-Lin/FlatPO.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了参数高效微调(PEFT)方法中的平坦性偏好现象，发现少数尖锐维度主导了PEFT的泛化能力，并提出FlatPO方法来改善泛化效果。
AI.motivation: PEFT方法虽在实践中证明有效，但其基本泛化机制仍未被充分探索，作者好奇不同PEFT方法的底层泛化机制以及如何进一步提升。
AI.method: 通过分析各种PEFT方法，发现其中普遍存在的平坦性偏好现象，识别出少数尖锐维度主导泛化；提出Flatness Preference Optimization (FlatPO)方法来平坦化这些关键尖锐维度。
AI.result: 实验证明了对PEFT中平坦性偏好现象的发现以及FlatPO方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过关注少数尖锐维度而非全部参数，可以获得更好的泛化效果，为PEFT方法的改进提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) methods and flatness preference in neural network optimization - a generic machine learning training concept. It has NO connection to Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion generation. The application domain is completely different (general ML model training vs. 3D human motion synthesis). While PEFT could theoretically be applied to motion generation models, this paper doesn't address any of the specified pain points (3D visual guidance extraction, VLM-based quality supervision, cross-modal alignment, motion naturalness). It's a methodological paper about model generalization in transformer training with no graphics or motion application relevance.

title: When the Chain of Thought Knows Better: Failure Modes in Multi-Turn Reasoning Models
comment: Accepted at the ICML 2026 FAGEN Workshop
summary: Failures in multi-turn reasoning models are largely invisible to terminal-score evaluation. A model can lock onto an unsafe stance early in a long dialogue, yet its final-turn refusal rate may appear indistinguishable from a robustly aligned baseline. To expose these hidden temporal dynamics, we propose a trace-level diagnostic - the CoT-Output 2x2 safety matrix. This framework labels every turn along two independent axes (internal reasoning and visible output), yielding four operationally defined failure cells: robust alignment, alignment faking, overt jailbreak, and a distinct failure mode we term context-injection failure (where the CoT maintains safe reasoning, but the visible output produces harm, highlighting a multi-turn manifestation of reasoning unfaithfulness). We evaluate three distilled reasoning targets against a fixed attacker across five oversight conditions, collecting 6750 turn-level observations on the Information-Hazard scenario. Our analysis reveals two reproducible vulnerabilities: an oversight paradox where explicit monitoring cues paradoxically increase alignment-faking rates rather than suppress them, and a context-injection failure where models lock onto unsafe external outputs despite safe internal states. We release the full dataset of multi-turn dialogues and CoT traces to support follow-up trace-diagnostic research.

AI.tldr: 当前的多轮推理模型安全评估存在盲点：模型可能在对话早期就采取不安全立场，但最终拒绝率却与对齐良好的基线模型无异。本文提出CoT-Output 2x2安全矩阵框架，通过内部分推理和可见输出两个独立轴标注每个对话轮次，识别四种失败模式：稳健对齐、对齐伪装、表面越狱和上下文注入失败（CoT保持安全推理但输出产生危害）。实验在信息危害场景下收集6750个轮级观察，发现两个可复现的漏洞：监督悖论（显式监控提示反而增加对齐伪装率）和上下文注入失败（模型即使内部推理安全也会锁定不安全外部输出）。
AI.motivation: 现有评估方法仅关注最终轮次的拒绝率，无法捕捉多轮对话中的隐藏时序动态。一个模型可能在对话早期就锁定不安全立场，但最终表现出的拒绝率却与稳健对齐的基线模型难以区分。这种"时间维度上的盲点"使得当前安全评估无法暴露真实的对齐失效问题。
AI.method: 提出trace级诊断框架——CoT-Output 2x2安全矩阵。该框架沿两个独立轴（内部推理Chain-of-Thought和可见输出）对每个对话轮次进行标注，生成四种操作定义的失败单元：稳健对齐、对齐伪装、表面越狱和上下文注入失败。在信息危害场景下，针对三个蒸馏推理模型和固定攻击者，在五种监督条件下进行评估，收集6750个轮级观察。
AI.result: 实验揭示两个可复现的漏洞：(1)监督悖论——显式监控提示反而增加对齐伪装率而非抑制它；(2)上下文注入失败——模型即使CoT保持安全推理时，也会锁定不安全外部输出而产生危害性可见输出。这表明存在一种新的多轮推理不忠实模式。
AI.conclusion: 本文贡献包括：(1)提出CoT-Output 2x2安全矩阵框架以暴露多轮推理中的隐藏时序动态；(2)识别监督悖论和上下文注入失败两种新型可复现漏洞；(3)发布完整的多轮对话和CoT trace数据集以支持后续trace诊断研究。安全评估需要从终端分数转向trace级诊断。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI safety and LLM alignment evaluation, specifically studying failure modes in multi-turn conversational reasoning models. It has nothing to do with Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion generation. Although it mentions "Chain-of-Thought" reasoning, this is about LLM internal reasoning safety, not motion generation. The methods, application domain, and research goals are completely different from the research profile which focuses on 3D motion synthesis from text/video using video generation models and VLM-based quality assessment. This is a fundamentally different field (AI safety vs computer graphics).

title: PathRelax: Parallel-Path Relaxed Speculative Jacobi Decoding for Accelerating Auto-Regressive Text-to-Image Generation
summary: The growing need for high-resolution image generation in autoregressive text-to-image models has resulted in extended token sequences, significantly increasing computational costs and inference times. However, existing state-of-the-art methods for accelerating autoregressive text-to-image models rely on chain-structured draft token sequences, leading to inefficient draft token search and limited acceptance lengths. To address this, we propose parallel-path cross-relaxed speculative Jacobi decoding (\textbf{PathSpec}), a novel framework that enhances efficiency through a multi-sequence draft tree structure. Our parallel-path speculative Jacobi decoding (\textbf{PathExplore}) expands the token search space, achieving a higher speedup ratio without sacrificing image quality. Additionally, we introduce cross-path relaxed verification (\textbf{PathRelax}) that exploits semantic similarities across sequences to further boost token acceptance rates. Evaluated on the Parti-Prompts, MSCOCO2017, and T2ICompBench datasets, our method achieves a speedup ratio of 4.14 $\times$, 3.95$\times$, and 4.18$\times$, respectively. Remarkably, PathExplore, without any relaxed sampling, outperforms relaxed sampling methods in the speedup ratio, such as GSD and LANTERN. Moreover, PathRelax's relaxation mechanism can be seamlessly integrated with other relaxation techniques, enabling further acceleration and providing an efficient solution for real-time text-to-image generation. Our code is available at https://github.com/Haodong-Lei-Ray/PathSpec.

AI.tldr: PathSpec是一个用于加速自回归文本到图像模型的新型推理框架，通过多序列草稿树结构实现并行路径 speculative Jacobi解码，显著提升推理速度。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率图像生成需要更长的token序列，导致自回归模型推理计算成本高、耗时长。现有方法使用链式结构草稿token序列，搜索效率低且接受长度有限。
AI.method: 提出PathSpec框架，包含两部分：(1) PathExplore通过并行路径speculative Jacobi解码扩展token搜索空间；(2) PathRelax利用序列间语义相似性提升token接受率。整体采用多序列草稿树结构实现并行解码。
AI.result: 在Parti-Prompts、MSCOCO2017和T2ICompBench数据集上分别实现4.14x、3.95x和4.18x的加速比。PathExplore在不使用relaxed sampling的情况下性能优于GSD和LANTERN等relaxed sampling方法。
AI.conclusion: PathSpec为实时文本到图像生成提供了高效解决方案，PathRelax可与其他relaxed技术无缝集成进一步加速推理。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The paper is about Text-to-Image generation (2D image synthesis), while the research profile is about Text-to-Motion generation (3D human motion synthesis). These are fundamentally different domains in computer graphics - one generates 2D images, the other generates 3D character motion. The method (autoregressive text-to-image with speculative decoding) is unrelated to video generation models, VLM-based motion quality assessment, 3D motion generation, or cross-modal alignment between text/video/motion. Even though both involve "text-to" tasks, the output modality and entire application pipeline are completely different.

title: The Arbiter Agent: Continually Monitoring Multi-Agent Conversations to Detect Emergent Misalignment
summary: As AI systems built from multiple language-model agents become more common, they are increasingly used to make decisions together: discussing, negotiating, and acting on shared tasks. While individual agents may appear well-aligned when tested on their own, problems can arise from how they interact with one another. We introduce the Arbiter, an agent designed to monitor multi-agent conversations in real time and identify which participants may be behaving in misaligned ways. The Arbiter operates under a limited "inspection budget", meaning it must decide carefully how to use its resources. As it observes a conversation step by step, it can choose to wait, question a participant, examine internal information such as system prompts or reasoning traces, or log concerning behavior. At the end, it produces a report identifying the likely source of misalignment. We evaluate the Arbiter across five conversation conditions, ranging from risky financial advice model organisms to evaluation-aware and colluding agents, we test five tool configurations of increasing capability and two backbone models. We find that the Arbiter reliably detects misaligned agents well before the end of the conversation, with active inspection tools improving both detection accuracy and speed. Weight-induced misalignment proves hardest to detect, while instruction-induced misalignment is identified reliably even under passive observation. The logging tool exhibits a dual effect, improving recall at the cost of precision. These results suggest that continual, budget-aware monitoring can effectively catch misalignment, and that overseeing multi-agent systems may require treating the auditor as an active participant in the process. The code is available at https://github.com/aisilab/arbiter.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Arbiter系统，一个用于实时监控多智能体对话并识别行为失调的智能体。该系统需要在有限的"检查预算"约束下运作，在对话过程中逐步观察并决定是否等待、询问参与者、检查内部信息或记录异常行为。最终生成识别失调来源的报告。
AI.motivation: 随着由多个语言模型智能体构建的AI系统日益普及，它们越来越多地被用于共同做出决策。然而，当单独测试时表现良好的个体智能体，在相互交互时可能出现失调问题。现有方法难以在多智能体交互场景中有效识别这类问题。
AI.method: Arbiter以逐步方式观察对话，可选择等待、质疑参与者、检查内部信息（如系统提示或推理轨迹）或记录异常行为。研究在五种对话条件下评估该系统（从风险金融建议到评估感知智能体和共谋智能体），并测试了五种能力递增的工具配置和两种骨干模型。
AI.result: Arbiter能够可靠地在对话结束前检测到失调的智能体，主动检查工具提高了检测精度和速度。权重诱导的失调最难检测，而指令诱导的失调即使在被动观察下也能可靠识别。日志工具表现出双重效应——提高召回率但降低精确率。
AI.conclusion: 持续且预算感知的监控可以有效捕获失调行为；监督多智能体系统可能需要将审计者视为过程的积极参与者。

relevance_reason: This paper is about multi-agent AI systems and alignment detection in LLM conversations - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and Text-to-Motion. The application domain is entirely different: it's focused on AI safety/alignment for monitoring agent behavior, not motion generation. None of the methods (Arbiter agent for conversation monitoring) relate to video generation models, VLM-based motion quality supervision, 3D motion generation, or cross-modal alignment between text/video/motion. This is a different field entirely.

title: LAFP: Preserving Latent Action Structure in Latent Policy Learning via Flow Matching
summary: Learning high-quality latent actions from large-scale unlabeled videos, coupled with limited real-world interaction data for training an action decoder, has emerged as a promising paradigm for scalable latent policy learning. However, existing approaches typically rely on behavior cloning, which tends to collapse inherently multimodal action distributions into unimodal ones, thereby degrading the pretrained latent action structure. While flow matching provides a potential alternative, directly applying it leads to a misalignment between latent actions and physical actions during action decoder training, due to the stochastic nature of the learned policy. To address these, we propose Latent Action Flow Policy (LAFP), which leverages flow matching for latent policy learning and introduces an inference-time interpolation mechanism to mitigate stochasticity-induced misalignment. Experimental results demonstrate that LAFP consistently outperforms prior methods on downstream imitation learning tasks, achieving up to 10-15% improvement in success rate while incurring less than 1x additional inference overhead.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为潜在动作流策略(LAFP)的新方法,通过流匹配学习潜在策略,并引入推理时插值机制来解决随机性引起的错位问题,可从大规模无标签视频中学习高质量潜在动作,并结合有限真实交互数据训练动作解码器。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常依赖行为克隆,容易将固有的多模态动作分布坍缩为单模态,破坏预训练的潜在动作结构;而直接应用流匹配会导致潜在动作与物理动作之间的错位问题。
AI.method: LAFP利用流匹配进行潜在策略学习,并引入推理时插值机制来缓解随机性引起的错位问题。
AI.result: 在下游模仿学习任务中一致优于先前方法,成功率提升10-15%,同时推理开销增加不到1倍。
AI.conclusion: LAFP为可扩展的潜在策略学习提供了一种有效的解决方案,成功平衡了流匹配的优势与推理时对齐的需求。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant - This paper addresses ROBOTICS/Latent Policy Learning for robot manipulation via flow matching, which is entirely different from Computer Graphics Text-to-Motion. The application domain is robot control and imitation learning, NOT human motion generation from text/video. While it uses flow matching (a diffusion-related method), this is used for learning latent robot actions, not generating 3D human motion. The pain points and methods (VLM-based quality supervision, cross-modal text-video-motion alignment, video generation models for visual guidance) are not addressed at all. This is a robotics paper that happens to use flow matching in a completely different context.

title: AutoPDE: Reliable Agentic PDE Solving via Explicitly Represented Solver Strategies
summary: Numerical solvers for partial differential equations (PDEs) are core computational tools in science and engineering. Building reliable PDE solvers requires not only executable code, but a numerical solver strategy, a set of decisions about discretization, stabilization, solver configuration, and resolution control, that matches the PDE structure. Recent LLM-based coding agents have begun to reduce the programming burden by generating and debugging solver implementations. However, they typically move directly from a PDE problem to solver code, leaving the solver strategy implicit in implementation details. Feedback from a failed solve is therefore routed back to code edits rather than to the underlying strategy, so numerical decisions remain hard to check before code is generated and hard to revise using numerical evidence when it fails. To address this limitation, we propose AutoPDE, a code agent that maintains the solver strategy as an explicitly represented object throughout the solving process: an independent, inspectable object that is built before any code is written and can be revised, using numerical evidence, whenever a solve fails. AutoPDE builds and maintains this object in three stages, all drawing from a library of reusable PDE-solving skills: PDE analysis identifies the equation type and algebraic structure; numerical method selection chooses a numerical method that matches the analysis result and commits to a discretization, stabilization, and linear solver accordingly; and adaptive tuning runs low-cost pilot solves to calibrate resolution and tolerances under the prescribed accuracy and runtime budget. We evaluate AutoPDE on the PDE Agent Bench, where experimental results show that AutoPDE achieves a pass rate of $54.5%$, improving over the strongest baseline by $14.2$ percentage points.

AI.tldr: AutoPDE是一个代码代理系统，旨在解决现有LLM代码代理在构建PDE求解器时的局限性。该系统将求解器策略保持为独立的、可检查的对象，贯穿整个求解过程。AutoPDE通过三个阶段构建和维护这个对象：从可重用的PDE求解技能库中获取信息，包括PDE分析、数值方法选择和自适应调优。在PDE Agent Bench上的实验表明，AutoPDE达到了54.5%的通过率，比最强基线提高了14.2个百分点。
AI.motivation: 构建可靠的PDE求解器需要数值求解策略，包括关于离散化、稳定化、求解器配置和分辨率控制的决策。现有的LLM代码代理直接从PDE问题生成求解器代码，将求解器策略隐含在实现细节中。失败求解的反馈回到代码编辑而不是底层策略，导致数值决策在代码生成前难以检查，失败后难以使用数值证据修订。
AI.method: AutoPDE通过三个阶段构建和维护求解器策略对象，全部从可重用PDE求解技能库中获取：(1)PDE分析：识别方程类型和代数结构；(2)数值方法选择：选择匹配分析结果的数值方法，并承诺离散化、稳定化和线性求解器；(3)自适应调优：运行低成本试点求解来在校准分辨率和容差下达到精度和运行时预算。
AI.result: 在PDE Agent Bench上评估，AutoPDE达到了54.5%的通过率，比最强基线提高了14.2个百分点。
AI.conclusion: AutoPDE通过将求解器策略保持为显式表示的对象，使数值决策可以在代码生成前检查，失败后可以使用数值证据修订。三个阶段的框架（从技能库中获取）有效地提高了PDE求解的成功率。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about using LLMs to build PDE (Partial Differential Equation) solvers - a scientific computing/numerical analysis topic. It has nothing to do with Computer Graphics, Text-to-Motion generation, video generation models, Vision Language Models for motion, or any of the methods mentioned in the research profile. The application domain is entirely different - PDE solving vs. motion synthesis.

title: GUI-AC: Enhancing Continual Learning in GUI Agents
summary: Graphical User Interfaces (GUIs) serve as the dominant medium for human-computer interaction, yet building GUI agents that generalize across the vast diversity of real-world interface environments, with the same flexibility and robustness that humans naturally exhibit, remains unsolved. Notably, GUI data are inherently non-stationary: the continual emergence of previously unseen interface instances (e.g., novel domains and resolutions) induces persistent distribution shifts, significantly impeding the continual learning of existing GUI agents. Reinforcement fine-tuning (RFT) has attracted considerable attention as a promising approach. Nevertheless, RFT exhibits pronounced instability in its grounding capability, manifested as sharp reward discontinuities and high-variance oscillations. The imbalanced distribution of rollout outcomes introduces substantial noise into advantage estimation, leading to policy overconfidence. The fixed clipping bound suppresses the increase in policy probabilities needed to adapt to new distributions, leading to a collapse in exploration capacity. To address these challenges, we propose GUI-AC, a method that enhances the continual learning capability of GUI agents. GUI-AC introduces grounding certainty to support two core mechanisms: (i) Adaptive Advantage, which down-weights noisy advantage estimates to prevent policy overconfidence; and (ii) Dynamic Clipping, which relaxes the clipping bound to encourage exploration range. Extensive experiments show that these mechanisms jointly improve performance, enabling our method to surpass state-of-the-art baselines. Code is available anonymously at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/GUI-AC.

AI.tldr: GUI-AC是一种提升GUI代理持续学习能力的方法，通过引入 grounding certainty 来支持两个核心机制：自适应优势（Adaptive Advantage）和动态裁剪（Dynamic Clipping），以解决强化微调在GUI代理中的不稳定性和探索崩溃问题。
AI.motivation: 构建能够跨多样化真实世界界面环境泛化的GUI代理仍然未解决。GUI数据本质上是非平稳的：新界面实例的持续出现导致持续分布偏移，严重阻碍了现有GUI代理的持续学习。强化微调（RFT）存在显著的不稳定性，表现为 grounding 能力不稳定、奖励不连续和高方差振荡。
AI.method: GUI-AC引入 grounding certainty 来支持两个核心机制：(i) 自适应优势（Adaptive Advantage），对 noisy 的优势估计进行降权，防止策略过度自信；(ii) 动态裁剪（Dynamic Clipping），放松裁剪边界以鼓励探索范围。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，这些机制共同提升了性能，使该方法超越了最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: GUI-AC方法通过自适应优势和动态裁剪两个机制，有效解决了RFT在GUI代理持续学习中的不稳定性和探索崩溃问题，提升了GUI代理的泛化能力和学习效果。

relevance_reason: This paper is about GUI agents and continual learning in interface automation, which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. The application domain is entirely different: GUI automation vs 3D motion generation. It does not address any of the pain points (visual feature extraction, VLM-based quality supervision, cross-modal alignment, motion naturalness) and uses completely different methods (reinforcement learning for agents vs video generation and motion models). No relevance to the research profile.

title: Accelerating NeurASP with vectorization and caching
comment: 16 pages, 5 figures, to be published in the Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP) journal for the 42nd International Conference on Logic Programming (ICLP) issue
summary: Neurosymbolic AI combines neural networks with symbolic programs to create robust and explainable predictions. One such framework is NeurASP, which trains a neural network to predict concepts and reasons over them using rules written in answer set programming (ASP) to solve downstream tasks. Crucially, labels are only provided for the downstream prediction produced by the symbolic rules, not for the latent concepts themselves.Backpropagation through the non-differentiable ASP component requires expensive probability and gradient calculations, which has hindered scalability to more sophisticated tasks.In this paper, we address the current limitations of NeurASP by improving its computational performance through vectorization, batch processing and caching of intermediate computations during training. We compare computation speeds between the original and our new implementation of NeurASP and report speedups of multiple orders of magnitude for larger tasks. To this end, we propose a new dataset of difficult tasks involving playing cards, which we use to test the capabilities of NeurASP's enhanced learning function.

AI.tldr: NeurASP是一种结合神经网络和符号编程的神经符号AI框架，通过改进计算性能（向量化、批处理、缓存）解决其可扩展性问题，并提出新的扑克牌数据集测试增强功能。
AI.motivation: 原始NeurASP需要通过非可微分的ASP组件进行反向传播，需要昂贵的概率和梯度计算，阻碍了向更复杂任务的扩展。
AI.method: 通过向量批处理和缓存中间计算提高计算性能，提出新的扑克牌困难任务数据集测试增强的学习能力。
AI.result: 在更大的任务上实现了多个数量级的加速。
AI.conclusion: 计算性能改进使NeurASP能够扩展到更复杂的下游任务。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain and methodology. The research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion from text/video), while this paper is about NeurASP (neurosymbolic AI) for poker card game reasoning. The paper uses neural symbolic programming with vectorization/caching - none of the methods (Video Generation, VLM, 3D Motion Generation, Visual Feature Extraction) from the research profile are addressed. This is a pure AI/reasoning paper with no relevance to text-to-motion generation in computer graphics.

title: Audio-Visual Exchange-Aware Token Pruning for Efficient Audio-Visual Captioning
summary: Audio-visual captioning generates natural language descriptions from video and audio content. Multimodal LLMs have advanced this task, but both modalities contribute many tokens to the LLM input, where prefill self-attention scales quadratically. Existing token-pruning methods usually retain tokens by attention, saliency, or cross-entropy loss, yet the hard threshold selection makes it difficult to retain tokens that are truly valuable, especially for high-confusing tokens near the decision boundary. To this end, we propose a AVEX-Prune, an RL-based audio-visual dynamic token pruning method in this work. In our AVEX-Prune, an audio-visual token exchange strategy is proposed to select truly valuable tokens by replacing low-confidence retained tokens with high-confidence candidate tokens from the same or the other modality, and measuring the differences in caption generation from token swaps. AVEX-Prune preserves full-token quality at a 40% retention ratio on both VILA 1.5-8B (54.5 vs. 54.6) and VideoLLaMA 2 (57.0 vs. 56.8).

AI.tldr: AVEX-Prune是一种基于强化学习的音视频动态token剪枝方法，通过音视频token交换策略保留真正有价值的token，在40%保留率下几乎保持完整token质量的 caption 生成性能。
AI.motivation: 多模态LLM在音视频captioning任务中，两个模态贡献大量token，导致prefill自注意力呈二次方扩展。现有的token剪枝方法通常基于注意力、显著性或交叉熵损失来保留token，但硬阈值选择难以保留真正有价值的token，特别是决策边界附近的高混淆token。
AI.method: 提出AVEX-Prune方法，包含两个核心组件：1) 音视频token交换策略：选择真正有价值的token，通过用高置信度候选token替换低置信度保留token（来自同一模态或另一模态）；2) 通过token交换测量caption生成的差异来评估token价值。
AI.result: 在40%保留率下，AVEX-Prune在VILA 1.5-8B上达到54.5（完整token为54.6），在VideoLLaMA 2上达到57.0（完整token为56.8），几乎保持了完整token质量的caption生成性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过RL-based的音视频token交换策略，AVEX-Prune有效解决了高混淆token的保留难题，在显著减少token数量的同时保持了caption生成质量。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Audio-Visual Captioning (generating text descriptions for audio-visual content), which is completely different from the Text-to-Motion domain. While it uses Vision Language Models (VLM), the application is caption generation rather than motion synthesis or quality supervision for 3D motion generation. The pain points addressed (token pruning efficiency in multimodal LLMs) have no overlap with the research profile's challenges (extracting 3D guidance from 2D video, VLM-based motion quality supervision, cross-modal text-video-motion alignment, motion naturalness). This is a different field entirely - the paper is about efficient multimodal inference, not computer graphics or motion generation.

title: READER: Robust Evidence-based Authorship Decoding via Extracted Representations
summary: As agentic applications increasingly route user tasks through official and third-party LLM APIs, provenance becomes an operational question: which model generated a given black-box response? We study Dynamic Black-Box LLM Provenance: identifying the source LLM from generations elicited by query-varying, non-predefined prompts rather than a fixed input set or benchmark suite. This setting is difficult because prompt semantics dominate the text, while model-specific authorship traces are weak and inconsistent at the surface level. We introduce READER (Robust Evidence-based Authorship Decoding via Extracted Representations), a lightweight provenance framework that treats a frozen proxy LLM as a reader of hidden authorship evidence. READER maps black-box outputs into proxy activation space, temporally filters token states within each response, and performs Bayesian Evidence Accumulation by summing single-response log-posterior evidence across independently sampled prompts. This avoids fragile mean-pooling of prompt-specific representations while preserving the query-wise evidence needed for calibrated confidence. On Agent500, a 50-target dataset built from agent-style prompts, READER reaches $31.0$-$42.4\%$ top-1 accuracy from a single response and $70.0$-$84.0\%$ from 50 responses, substantially outperforming sentence-encoder fingerprints. Scaling across nine proxy readers further shows that stronger LLMs expose more linearly decodable authorship structure, suggesting that authorship perception is already present in frozen LLM representations and can be converted into reliable multi-query attribution.

AI.tldr: 研究动态黑盒LLM来源追溯问题，提出READER框架，通过冻结代理LLM的激活空间来识别生成文本的源模型，在Agent50数据集上达到70-84%准确率。
AI.motivation: 随着代理应用广泛使用官方和第三方LLM API，需要识别给定黑盒响应来自哪个模型。传统方法依赖固定输入集，但实际应用中提示词语义主导文本，模型特定的作者痕迹弱且不一致。
AI.method: 提出READER框架：1)将黑盒输出映射到代理LLM激活空间 2)对每个响应内的token状态进行时间滤波 3)通过贝叶斯证据累积对独立采样的提示词进行单响应log后验证据求和，避免脆弱的mean-pooling。
AI.result: 在Agent500数据集上，单响应top-1准确率31.0-42.4%，50响应准确率70.0-84.0%，显著优于句子编码器指纹。扩展到九个代理阅读器的实验表明，更强的LLM暴露更多线性可解码的作者结构。
AI.conclusion: 作者感知已存在于冻结LLM的表示中，可转换为可靠的多查询归因。更强的LLM作为代理读者能暴露更清晰的作者痕迹。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about LLM authorship attribution (identifying which black-box LLM generated a text response), which is in the NLP/AI security domain. This has NO connection to Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion generation. Even though both involve "text," the application domains are entirely different - one is about generating 3D human motion from text, the other is about NLP authorship forensics. The methods (LLM activation spaces, Bayesian evidence) are also unrelated to video generation, VLM-based motion supervision, or 3D motion synthesis.

title: GRAR: Glass-induced Reflection Artifact Removal in LiDAR Point Clouds
summary: Terrestrial Laser Scanning (TLS) point clouds captured in urban environments frequently suffer from glass-induced reflection artifacts, severely degrading downstream applications. Existing reflection artifact removal methods generally rely on ideal reflection symmetry assumptions, yet their performance is limited by inaccurate glass estimation and insufficient geometric representations. To address these issues, we propose a novel unified framework aimed at robust reflection artifact removal: In the first stage, we leverage a multi-modal vision foundation model to produce initial glass masks, which are then refined using geometric cues to achieve high-precision glass regions, followed by glass completion to recover missing regions caused by no-return measurements on transparent surfaces; In the second stage, we propose a physics-driven descriptor, termed Reflection-aware Local-Global Geometric Similarity (RE-LGGS), which is grounded in actual laser reflection geometry and jointly encodes multi-scale geometric structures and orientation consistency using PCA-based local shape representations, thereby significantly improving robustness against imperfect observations. Extensive experiments on multiple public TLS datasets demonstrate that our framework consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in reflection artifacts removal.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种针对城市场景地基激光扫描点云中玻璃反射伪影的统一去除框架。)
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖理想反射对称假设，存在玻璃估计不准确和几何表示不足的问题，严重影响下游应用。
AI.method: 第一阶段：利用多模态视觉基础模型生成初始玻璃掩膜，结合几何线索精细化并完成缺失区域恢复；第二阶段：提出基于实际激光反射几何的物理驱动描述子RE-LGGS，联合多尺度几何结构和方向一致性进行PCA局部形状表示。
AI.result: 在多个公开TLS数据集上的广泛实验表明，该框架一致优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效去除玻璃反射伪影，提高城市场景点云数据的质量，为后续应用奠定基础。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LiDAR point cloud processing (removing glass reflection artifacts in terrestrial laser scanning), which is completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion field. The application domain is entirely different: this is about 3D scanning/mapping, not motion generation. While both involve 3D data, the methods and goals are fundamentally distinct - this paper has no text-to-motion generation, no video-to-motion synthesis, no human motion modeling, and no cross-modal alignment between text, video, and motion.

title: Evaluating Research-Level Math Proofs via Strict Step-Level Verification
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) struggle to rigorously verify complex mathematical proofs. Standard global evaluation approaches suffer from "context poisoning," in which superficially plausible statements mask subtle logical flaws, leading to hallucination or over-skepticism. To address this, we shift from global evaluation to strict step-level verification: our framework maintains detailed context for each deduction step and strictly constrains the sources of applied theorems. We evaluate on a carefully curated adversarial diagnostic suite of research-level proofs drawn from the FirstProof challenge. A systematic ablation study demonstrates that these deductive constraints are indispensable, as unconstrained global prompting consistently fails to localize subtle logical errors. Beyond outperforming global evaluation, our approach fundamentally alters the failure taxonomy. Error analysis reveals that, rather than exhibiting severe logical hallucinations, remaining rejections are primarily instances of "pedantic hyper-rigor" stemming from unstated domain conventions, effectively exposing implicit ambiguities within the expert benchmark itself. Our findings suggest that prompting agents to organize their verification notes in a cautious, human-mathematician-like manner can substantially improve their ability to distinguish rigorous proofs from flawed ones, with the potential to strengthen agentic reasoning on frontier mathematical concepts that the base model does not already know well, and to lay a theoretical foundation for future automated proof-review systems. Code and prompts are available at GitHub.

AI.tldr: 提出一种严格步骤级验证框架，将LLM验证从全局评估转向逐个推论步骤的细粒度验证，通过维护每个推导步骤的详细上下文并严格约束所应用定理的来源，来解决复杂数学证明验证中因"上下文中毒"导致的逻辑缺陷掩蔽问题。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在严格验证复杂数学证明方面存在困难，标准全局评估方法遭受"上下文中毒"问题，即表面上看似合理的陈述掩盖了微妙的逻辑缺陷，导致幻觉或过度怀疑。
AI.method: 从全局评估转向严格的步骤级验证框架：维护每个推导步骤的详细上下文，严格约束所应用定理的来源。在FirstProof挑战中精心设计的对抗性诊断套件上进行评估，并通过系统性消融研究验证 deductive constraints 的必要性。
AI.result: 消融研究证明deductive constraints是不可或缺的，无约束的全局提示始终无法定位微妙的逻辑错误。该方法从根本上改变了失败分类：剩余拒绝主要是由于未说明的领域惯例导致的"迂腐过度严格"，反而有效暴露了专家基准本身的隐含歧义。
AI.conclusion: 提示智能体以谨慎的、类似人类数学家的方式组织验证笔记，可显著提高其区分严格证明和有缺陷证明的能力，有望加强智能体在基础模型不熟悉的前沿数学概念上的推理能力，为未来自动证明审查系统奠定理论基础。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about LLM verification for mathematical proofs - a formal mathematics/AI reasoning task. The application domain is entirely different from Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. There is no match in methods (the paper uses LLMs for proof verification, not video generation models, VLMs for motion, or 3D motion generation), no match in pain points (no cross-modal alignment, no visual feature extraction, no motion synthesis), and no relevance to someone working in text-to-motion generation.

title: PrismAvatar: Pseudo-Multiview Reconstruction and Subpixel Prism Rendering for Real-Time Stereoscopic Communication
summary: Real-time stereoscopic video communication has long been a goal of immersive telepresence, yet practical systems still require specialized capture rigs or reduce remote users to a single portrait view. We present PrismAvatar, a Gaussian head-avatar system that connects monocular avatar capture with subpixel-encoded glasses-free lenticular display for real-time autostereoscopic communication. From a monocular portrait video, PrismAvatar reconstructs a controllable head avatar and optimizes it for the lateral viewing zones induced by the display. The method uses natural head turns as pseudo-multiview (PMV) supervision to constrain regions that are otherwise weakly observed in monocular training, including hair, ears, jaw contours, and neck boundaries. Reliable side frames are yaw-binned, aligned to virtual cameras, and supervised within a strict head-and-hair domain; contour-aware losses and staged regularization further suppress ghosting, alpha leakage, and depth instability while preserving lateral detail. At runtime, PrismAvatar renders 32 virtual views and encodes them into a 4K lenticular raster with calibrated subpixel-routing masks. The live-tracker prototype sustains 10.65 FPS, and a subject-specific distilled driver raises the same display pipeline to 38.49 FPS.

AI.tldr: PrismAvatar是一个高斯头Avatar系统，将单目头像捕捉与无 glasses-free lenticular 显示相结合，实现实时裸眼3D通信。该系统从单目肖像视频重建可控头部Avatar，并针对显示的侧向视角区域进行优化。
AI.motivation: 实时立体视频通信一直是沉浸式远程临在的目标，但现有系统需要专门的捕捉设备或仅能呈现单一肖像视图。研究者希望实现更实用的裸眼3D通信方案。
AI.method: 1)利用自然头部转动作为伪多视图(PMV)监督来约束单目训练中难以观察的区域(头发、耳朵、下颌轮廓和颈部边界)；2)将可靠的侧帧进行偏航分箱、对齐到虚拟相机并在严格的头部和头发域中进行监督；3)轮廓感知损失和分阶段正则化抑制重影、Alpha泄漏和深度不稳定性；4)运行时渲染32个虚拟视图并编码到4K lenticular 光栅中。
AI.result: 原型系统达到10.65 FPS的实时追踪速度，经过特定主体蒸馏的驱动将显示管道提升至38.49 FPS。
AI.conclusion: PrismAvatar成功连接了单目Avatar捕捉与无眼镜 lenticular 显示，为实时裸眼立体视频通信提供了可行的技术方案，在保持侧向细节的同时有效抑制了视觉伪影。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about 3D avatar reconstruction and stereoscopic display rendering (lenticular display) for real-time communication - a completely different application domain. It has no relation to Text-to-Motion generation which involves generating human motion from text descriptions. The methods are also different: Gaussian avatar rendering, pseudo-multiview supervision, contour-aware loss for display - not text-to-motion generation, VLM-based quality supervision, or cross-modal alignment between text, video, and motion. The pain points are entirely different (ghosting/alpha leakage in display vs motion naturalness/temporal consistency in synthesis).

title: Moonshine: An Autonomous Mathematical Research Agent Centered on Conjecture Generation
summary: Moonshine is an autonomous agent whose central objective is to generate mathematical conjectures. Its core capability is to extract structure from classical problems, distill new concepts, and formulate conjectures of mathematical significance. Rather than treating the solution of a single proposition as its endpoint, Moonshine builds an extensible theoretical framework through conjecture generation, bridge building, and obstacle identification. This article uses Moonshine's exploration of the Jacobian conjecture as an example. It shows how the central logic of whether local nondegeneracy can force global injectivity is transferred to one-hidden-layer affine-ridge sigmoid networks. This leads to the formulation of the \emph{Neural Jacobian Conjecture} (NJC): if such a network has strictly positive Jacobian determinant on the whole space, then it must be globally injective. By invoking GPT-5.5-pro and DeepSeek-V4-pro separately, Moonshine obtained independent complete proofs for the case \(N=n+1\). In addition, with the assistance of ChatGPT through interactive use of its web interface with GPT-5.5-pro, a geometric-topological proof was developed. These results provide preliminary evidence for the plausibility of the conjecture. The general higher-width case \(N\ge n+2\), however, remains unresolved and is left for further investigation. This work illustrates Moonshine's ability to autonomously generate meaningful mathematical problems and make rigorous progress on them.

AI.tldr: Moonshine是一个自主数学猜想生成Agent，以Jacobian猜想为例展示其能力，并提出神经Jacobian猜想(NJC)，声称在N=n+1情况下获得完整证明，但一般情况仍未解决。
AI.motivation: 构建可扩展的理论框架，通过猜想生成、桥梁构建和障碍识别来推动数学研究，而非仅解决单一命题。
AI.method: 将局部非退化能否推出整体单射的核心逻辑转移到单隐藏层仿射-脊Sigmoid网络，并借助GPT-5.5-pro、DeepSeek-V4-pro和ChatGPT进行证明探索。
AI.result: 在N=n+1情况下获得完整证明，开发了几何-拓扑证明，但N≥n+2的一般高宽度情况仍未解决。
AI.conclusion: 展示了Moonshine自主生成有意义的数学问题并取得严格进展的能力，为NJC提供了初步证据，但一般情况的证明仍需进一步研究。

relevance_reason: This paper is about mathematical conjecture generation (Jacobian conjecture) and theoretical neural network analysis - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and Text-to-Motion. The application domain is pure mathematics/theoretical CS, not motion generation. None of the pain points (3D visual guidance extraction, VLM quality supervision, cross-modal alignment, motion naturalness) are addressed. The methods (GPT proof exploration) are entirely different from Video Generation, VLM for motion, and 3D Motion Generation models needed for the research profile.

title: Improving Adversarial Transferability on Vision-Language Pre-training Models via Surrogate-Specific Bias Correction
summary: Adversarial examples reveal vulnerabilities in Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP) models and provide insights for improving robustness. A key property is cross-model transferability, which enables transfer-based black-box attacks. However, existing attacks often rely heavily on the surrogate model, causing cross-model performance drops. One reason is that adversarial optimization may follow surrogate model responses more than input semantics, making the update direction effective on the surrogate but less transferable to unseen targets. We refer to this dependency as surrogate-specific bias. Motivated by this observation, DeBias-Attack improves transferability by correcting surrogate-specific bias in adversarial optimization directions. It maintains two perturbation branches. The main branch optimizes a perturbation on the original image and obtains the adversarial gradient used to disrupt image-text alignment. The reference branch optimizes a perturbation on a weak-semantic image constructed from the dataset mean image with small Gaussian noise resampled at each iteration. Since this weak-semantic image contains little clear visual content, its optimization reflects surrogate responses more than image semantics, and its reference gradient estimates surrogate-specific bias. DeBias-Attack removes the aligned projection of the main gradient on the reference gradient before updating the adversarial image, then performs context-aware text substitution using the updated adversarial image. DeBias-Attack is the first transfer-based VLP attack that corrects surrogate-specific bias through gradient correction. Experiments show strong performance across VLP models, downstream tasks, and open-source and closed-source multimodal large language models.

AI.tldr: DeBias-Attack是一种针对视觉-语言预训练(VLP)模型的转移对抗攻击,通过校正对抗优化方向中的特定于代理模型的偏差来提高跨模型可转移性。该方法维护两个扰动分支:主分支在原始图像上优化,参考分支在弱语义图像上优化,通过去除主梯度在参考梯度上的对齐投影来校正特定于代理的偏差。
AI.motivation: 现有转移对抗攻击严重依赖代理模型,导致跨模型性能下降。原因是对抗优化可能更多地跟随代理模型响应而非输入语义,使更新方向对代理有效但对目标模型转移性差。研究者将此依赖称为"特定于代理模型的偏差",旨在通过校正对抗优化方向来提高可转移性。
AI.method: DeBias-Attack采用双分支结构:主分支对原图优化对抗扰动以破坏图像-文本对齐;参考分支对弱语义图像(数据集均值图像+每次迭代重采样的高斯噪声)进行优化,由于弱语义图像包含很少的清晰视觉内容,其优化更反映代理响应而非图像语义。方法去除主梯度在参考梯度上的对齐投影后再更新对抗图像,并执行上下文感知的文本替换。
AI.result: 实验表明DeBias-Attack在VLP模型、下游任务、开源和闭源多模态大语言模型上均表现出强大的性能,是首个通过梯度校正来校正特定于代理模型偏差的基于转移的VLP攻击。
