AI.conclusion: DeBias-Attack通过引入参考分支估计代理偏差,并在梯度更新时去除该偏差成分,有效提高了对抗样本的跨模型可转移性,为提升多模态模型的鲁棒性提供了有价值的攻击框架。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion from text/video), while this paper is about adversarial attacks on Vision-Language Pre-training models (security/adversarial ML field). Although both mention VLM, the paper uses VLM only for adversarial attack purposes, not for motion generation, visual feature extraction for motion, or quality assessment. The pain points and goals are entirely unrelated - this paper focuses on attacking and fooling multimodal models rather than generating or evaluating human motion.

title: Do VLMs Reason Like Engineers? A Benchmark and a Stage-wise Evaluation
comment: 9 pages (main text), 4 figures, 2 tables; 50 pages total including appendix. The first two authors contributed equally
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) demonstrate strong performance on general multimodal reasoning benchmarks, yet their ability to perform engineering reasoning remains largely unexplored. Unlike general visual question answering, engineering problem solving requires interpreting technical diagrams, selecting governing physical principles, and maintaining physically consistent multi-step reasoning. These capabilities are increasingly important for AI systems used in engineering education, scientific assistance, and technical decision-making, where reasoning failures may produce physically invalid yet superficially plausible solutions. Existing benchmarks primarily evaluate final answers and provide limited assessment of intermediate reasoning processes. We introduce EngVQA, a multimodal benchmark for evaluating engineering reasoning across 5 engineering subjects containing 696 problems. We introduce an 8-stage automatic evaluation framework for assessing VLM-generated solutions. The framework independently evaluates each stage of the solution, enabling fine-grained analysis of reasoning failures. We benchmark multiple state-of-the-art open and closed source VLMs on our evaluation framework and demonstrate substantial limitations in current engineering reasoning capabilities. Human evaluation shows strong agreement with our automated framework, achieving a Pearson correlation of 0.975 and a mean absolute error of 0.67 on a 10-point grading scale. Our results highlight the importance of process-oriented evaluation for reliable assessment of multimodal engineering reasoning systems.

AI.tldr: EngVQA是一个用于评估视觉语言模型(VLM)工程推理能力的多模态基准测试,包含5个工程学科的696道题目,并提出8阶段自动评估框架来细粒度分析推理过程中的失败点。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM在工程推理方面的能力尚未被系统探索。工程问题解决需要解释技术 diagrams、选择物理原理并保持物理一致的多步骤推理,但现有基准主要评估最终答案,缺乏对中间推理过程的评估。
AI.method: 构建包含5个工程学科696道问题的EngVQA基准;提出8阶段自动评估框架独立评估解决方案的每个阶段;对多个最先进的开源和闭源VLM进行基准测试,并进行人类评估验证。
AI.result: 当前VLM在工程推理方面存在显著局限性;自动评估框架与人类评估高度一致,皮尔逊相关系数达0.975,10分制平均绝对误差为0.67。
AI.conclusion: 过程导向评估对可靠评估多模态工程推理系统至关重要;当前VLM的工程推理能力需要显著提升。

relevance_reason: This paper is about evaluating VLM engineering reasoning capabilities on technical diagrams (EngVQA benchmark), which is a completely different application domain from Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. While both involve Vision Language Models, this paper addresses engineering/technical diagram reasoning, not text-to-motion generation, video-to-motion synthesis, or motion quality assessment. The pain points in the research profile (3D visual guidance extraction, motion fidelity supervision, cross-modal alignment, temporal consistency) are not addressed at all. Engineering diagram interpretation is unrelated to human motion generation.

title: Segment and Select: Vision-Language Segmentation in 3D Scenarios
comment: The core idea is to reformulate 3D vision-language segmentation as the segment-and-select paradigm (free from the superpoint dependency)
summary: 3D vision-language segmentation aims to segment target objects in 3D scenarios according to the linguistic instructions and visual observations. Prior art heavily relies on the coarse superpoint representation to reduce the computation complexity, which suffers from poor segmentation quality and messy object boundaries. In this paper, we propose the SEGment-And-select (SEGA3D) paradigm for 3D visionlanguage segmentation that directly operates on the fine-grained visual information and is free from the superpoint dependency. Specifically, we first leverage a mask candidate generator to provide fine-grained categorical mask candidates, substantially improving the quality of candidate masks over the superpoint counterparts. Then, a Large Language Model (LLM) is utilized to generate the semantic and spatial information based on the linguistic description and visual features. The LLM output and visual features are fed to the Semantic-Spatial Selector (SSS) to produce the top-ranking mask candidates. Eventually, the Loopback Verification Module (LVM) is designed to yield the segmentation mask from the selected candidate masks. Our SEGA3D attains competitive performance on ScanRefer, ScanNet and Matterport3D benchmarks. Notably, our SEGA3D surpasses the top-performing counterpart by 8.3 mIoU and 5.3 mIoU on ScanNet and Matterport3D, respectively. Codes will be available upon publication.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SEGA3D方法，用于3D视觉语言分割任务。该方法通过掩码候选生成器提供细粒度类别掩码，然后利用大语言模型生成语义和空间信息，最后通过语义-空间选择器和循环验证模块选择和验证分割掩码，摆脱了对超级点的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖粗粒度的超级点表示来降低计算复杂度，但这会导致分割质量差和对象边界混乱的问题。
AI.method: 提出SEGA3D范式，包含三个关键组件：1)掩码候选生成器提供细粒度类别掩码；2)大语言模型根据语言描述和视觉特征生成语义和空间信息；3)语义-空间选择器对掩码候选进行排序；4)循环验证模块生成最终分割掩码。
AI.result: 在ScanRefer、ScanNet和Matterport3D基准数据集上取得竞争力的性能。在ScanNet上超越最佳方法8.3 mIoU，在Matterport3D上超越5.3 mIoU。
AI.conclusion: SEGA3D方法成功实现了直接基于细粒度视觉信息进行3D视觉语言分割，摆脱了超级点依赖，并在多个基准数据集上实现了显著的性能提升。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses 3D vision-language SEGMENTATION (identifying and segmenting objects in 3D scenes), which is fundamentally different from Text-to-Motion generation. While it uses Vision Language Models (VLMs), the application domain is 3D scene understanding/segmentation, not motion synthesis. The pain points are completely different - this paper doesn't address extracting 3D visual guidance from video priors, ensuring VLM-based quality supervision for motion fidelity, cross-modal alignment for motion generation, or maintaining motion naturalness and temporal consistency. The methods are applied to a different task (segmentation vs motion generation), making this largely irrelevant to the Text-to-Motion research profile.

title: Large-scale semantic mapping of learner agency and autonomy reveals what measurement and generative AI research overlook
summary: Learner agency and autonomy are foundational to personal development, yet a pervasive "jingle-jangle" fallacy (i.e. identical terms denoting different constructs, distinct terms denoting identical ones) has substantially hindered cumulative knowledge. Treating meaning as a phenomenon constituted through use in linguistic practice, we extracted 8,954 definitions and 2,700 scale items from over 14,000 publications, to investigate how researchers actually used learner agency and autonomy with a semantic analysis pipeline. The definitional landscape of two constructs resolves into three dimensions: regulation and control of learning (task), intrinsic motivation and internal decision-making (person), and social-relational action (sociocultural), thereby empirically quantifying the jingle-jangle fallacy. Existing scales, however, systematically underrepresent the sociocultural dimension. Critically, current generative AI research in education concentrates on learning regulation and control, narrowing the behavioral repertoire that AI-mediated learning environments are designed to cultivate. Beyond conceptual clarification, this work carries direct implications for conceptualization, measurement, and practice towards supporting the multidimensional learner agency and autonomy.

AI.tldr: 研究通过大规模语义分析（近1.5万篇出版物中的8954个定义和2700个量表题项），揭示了"学习者能动性"与"自主性"这两个概念的实际使用情况，识别出三个维度：任务调控、内在动机、和社会文化关系，并指出现有量表和文化维度严重不足。
AI.motivation: 当前研究普遍存在"连环名实错乱"（jingle-jangle fallacy）问题——相同术语指涉不同构念，不同术语却指向相同构念。这严重阻碍了累积知识的积累，亟需厘清概念边界以推进该领域发展。
AI.method: 采用语义分析pipeline，系统提取8954个定义和2700个量表题项，对超过14000篇出版物进行编码分析，探究研究者实际如何运用学习者能动性与自主性这两个构念。
AI.result: 两构念的定义格局解析为三个维度：1）学习任务调控与控制（任务维度）；2）内在动机与内部决策（个人维度）；3）社会文化关系行动（社会文化维度）。现有量表系统性地低估了社会文化维度。当前教育领域生成式AI研究集中于学习调控与控制，过于狭窄。
AI.conclusion: 研究不仅澄清了概念混乱，还为概念化、测量和实践提供了直接启示：需支持多维度的学习者能动性与自主性，未来AI教育应用应拓展至社会文化维度。

relevance_reason: This paper is entirely about educational psychology and learning science - analyzing concepts of "learner agency and autonomy" in 14,000+ educational publications. It has NO relevance to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. The application domain is completely different (education/learning science vs computer graphics/motion generation). While it briefly mentions "generative AI" in education contexts, it's not about motion synthesis, video generation, VLMs, or any computer graphics methods. The pain points, methods, and application domain are all completely mismatched.

title: Globally Localizing Lunar Rover in Pixels via Graph Alignment
summary: Precise rover localization is a prerequisite for autonomous lunar exploration, yet the absence of Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) signals and the cumulative drift of local localization methods severely constrain long-range missions. Cross-view localization provides a promising drift-free global solution by matching rover-view and satellite-view imagery. However, the lunar environment poses unique challenges for correspondence alignment, including inter-entity entanglement, inter-viewpoint divergence, and simulation-to-real domain shift. To address these challenges, we propose Warped Alignment of Reprojected Graphs (WARG), a framework that leverages unified graph learning and reprojected graph matching for robust cross-view alignment. Pretrained on the synthetic LuSNAR dataset, WARG achieves an average test error of 0.32 m and demonstrates robust zero-shot generalization to the synthetic lunar south pole region with an error of 3.63 m. More importantly, when validated on real-world data from the YuTu-2 rover, WARG achieves a localization error of 1.68 m within a 100 m x 100 m search area, corresponding to nearly one-pixel precision in low-resolution satellite imagery with a spatial resolution of 1.40 m/pixel. Beyond accuracy, WARG is computationally efficient, containing only 1.56M parameters, corresponding to 16.12% of previous lightweight models, and operating at 5.49 Hz on an NVIDIA RTX A6000 GPU, approaching GNSS-level update frequency. Finally, we observe that WARG naturally develops low-level spatial awareness, including semantic segmentation and structural reasoning, through cross-view localization learning, highlighting its potential as a promising paradigm for spatial intelligence with minimal annotation cost. The source code is available at https://github.com/maochen-casia/warg.

AI.tldr: WARG是一种用于月球车跨视图定位的框架，通过匹配 rover 视角和卫星视角图像实现精确无漂移定位。该方法在合成数据集上平均测试误差0.32m，在真实世界 YuTu-2 火星车数据上实现1.68m定位误差，达到近单像素精度，且仅含1.56M参数，推理速度5.49Hz。
AI.motivation: 月球探索中精确 rover 定位是自主探索的前提，但缺乏GNSS信号且本地定位方法存在累积漂移，严重制约长距离任务。跨视图定位提供无漂移全局解决方案，但月球环境面临视图对应对齐的独特挑战。
AI.method: 提出 Warped Alignment of Reprojected Graphs (WARG) 框架，利用统一图学习和重投影图匹配实现鲁棒跨视图对齐。在合成 LuSNAR 数据集上预训练。
AI.result: 合成数据集平均测试误差0.32m；合成月球南极地区零样本泛化误差3.63m；真实世界 YuTu-2 rover 数据验证在100m×100m搜索区域内定位误差1.68m，相当于1.40m/pixel低分辨率卫星图像近单像素精度。模型仅1.56M参数（仅为先前轻量级模型的16.12%），NVIDIA RTX A6000 GPU上运行频率5.49Hz。
AI.conclusion: WARG通过跨视图定位学习自然形成低层次空间意识，包括语义分割和结构推理，展示了以最小标注成本实现空间智能的潜力。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses lunar rover cross-view localization using graph alignment - completely different application domain. The research profile focuses on Text-to-Motion generation in Computer Graphics (human motion synthesis from text/video), while this paper is about robot localization for lunar exploration. No motion generation, no text-to-motion, no human motion synthesis - entirely different field and application.

title: Role-Agent: Bootstrapping LLM Agents via Dual-Role Evolution
comment: 20 pages, including 12 pages of main text and 8 pages of appendix; work in progress
summary: Although Large Language Model (LLM) agents have demonstrated strong performance on complex tasks, their learning is often limited by inefficient interaction feedback and static training environments, which hinder broader generalization. To address these limitations, this paper introduces Role-Agent, \textcolor{black}{a framework} that harnesses a single LLM to function concurrently as both the agent and the environment, enabling a bootstrapped co-evolution. Role-Agent comprises two synergistic components: World-In-Agent (WIA) and Agent-In-World (AIW). In WIA, the LLM acts as the agent and predicts future states after each action; the alignment between predicted and actual states is then used as a process reward, encouraging environment-aware reasoning. In AIW, the LLM analyzes failure modes from failed trajectories and retrieves tasks with similar failure patterns, thereby reshaping the training data distribution for targeted practice. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that Role-Agent consistently improves performance, yielding an average gain of over 4\% over strong baselines.

AI.tldr: Role-Agent是一个利用单个LLM同时充当代理和环境的框架，实现自举协同进化。该框架包含两个组件：World-In-Agent(WIA)使LLM作为代理预测未来状态并提供过程奖励；Agent-In-World(AIW)分析失败模式并检索相似任务进行针对性练习。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型代理的学习受到低效的交互反馈和静态训练环境的限制，这阻碍了更广泛的泛化能力。
AI.method: Role-Agent框架包含两个协同组件：1) World-In-Agent(WIA)：LLM作为代理预测未来状态，将预测与实际状态的对齐作为过程奖励，鼓励环境感知推理；2) Agent-In-World(AIW)：分析失败轨迹中的失败模式，检索具有相似失败模式的任务，重塑训练数据分布进行针对性练习。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上的实验表明，Role-Agent持续提升性能，比强基线方法平均提升超过4%。
AI.conclusion: Role-Agent通过让LLM同时充当代理和环境，实现了自举协同进化，有效解决了传统代理学习中反馈效率低和训练环境静态的问题，显著提升了模型在复杂任务上的泛化能力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM agent training and bootstrapping (using LLM as both agent and environment), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. The application domain is entirely different: this focuses on improving LLM agent performance on benchmark tasks through dual-role evolution, while the research profile deals with generating 3D motion from text/video for graphics, visual feature extraction, and cross-modal alignment. There is no overlap in field, methods, or application domain.

title: GaussTrace: Provenance Analysis of 3D Gaussian Splatting Models with Evidence-based LLM Reasoning
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) is a powerful technique for creating high-fidelity 3D assets. However, the widespread sharing and iterative modification of 3DGS models across digital platforms create pressing challenges for intellectual property protection and forensic traceability. To address this, we propose GaussTrace, a novel framework for constructing directed provenance graphs for 3DGS models. GaussTrace formulates provenance analysis as an evidence-based reasoning problem. It builds upon attribute-wise statistical profiling of 3DGS parameters to capture intrinsic properties. Moreover, we introduce hypothesis-driven editing simulations of common operations to provide auxiliary evidence for plausible transformation pathways. These statistical and simulated cues jointly enable a Large Language Model (LLM) to perform structured Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning, yielding directional provenance inferences and explainable edge reasons. Experimental results demonstrate that GaussTrace effectively constructs evolutionary relationships among diverse 3DGS models, delivering accurate, interpretable, and robust provenance graphs without requiring model training or access to editing histories. Project page: https://haolianghan.github.io/GaussTrace.

AI.tldr: GaussTrace是一个用于3DGS模型的有向溯源图构建框架，通过统计特征分析和编辑模拟为LLM提供证据，实现可解释的模型演化关系推断。
AI.motivation: 3DGS技术虽能创建高保真3D资产，但跨平台分享和迭代修改带来知识产权保护和溯源追踪的挑战。
AI.method: 1) 对3DGS参数进行属性级统计特征分析；2) 引入假设驱动的编辑模拟来提供辅助证据；3) 利用LLM进行结构化思维链推理。
AI.result: GaussTrace能有效构建不同3DGS模型之间的演化关系，实现准确、可解释且稳健的溯源图，且无需模型训练或访问编辑历史。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为3DGS模型的知识产权保护和溯源追踪提供了有效解决方案。

relevance_reason: The paper is about 3D Gaussian Splatting provenance analysis (tracking model evolution and IP protection), which is completely different from Text-to-Motion generation. While both are in Computer Graphics, the application domains are fundamentally different: GaussTrace deals with 3D rendering/model tracking, not human motion synthesis. The paper uses LLMs for provenance reasoning, not for motion quality supervision. The pain points are unrelated - this paper doesn't address text-to-video-to-motion conversion, cross-modal alignment, or motion naturalness. Only shared general domain (Computer Graphics) but different specialized area.

title: Frontier Coding Agents Use Metaprogramming to Adapt to Unfamiliar Programming Languages
summary: LLM-based coding agents are usually evaluated in familiar software settings: mainstream languages, common libraries, and public repositories. These benchmarks remain important, but they can hide how agents behave when the language itself is unfamiliar. We evaluate six contemporary coding agents on four esoteric programming languages using a sequential setup with file editing, local execution, and hidden-test grading. Our protocol exposes capability differences between these agents that mainstream coding and agentic benchmarks such as SWE-Bench Verified and Terminal-Bench 2.0 compress into much narrower bands. We observe that the strongest agents, Claude Opus 4.6 and GPT-5.4 xhigh, often avoid writing the target language directly. On Brainfuck and Befunge-98, they write Python programs that generate target-language code and debug those generators locally. Forbidding this metaprogramming strategy causes large performance drops. Text guidance distilled from this strategy does not materially improve weaker agents. In contrast, Opus-derived Python helper code for building generators, with no solved benchmark programs or hidden-test answers, sharply improves Sonnet 4.6 and GPT-5.4 mini on the same problems, while Haiku 4.5 remains low. More interpreter calls and output tokens improve stronger agents but leave weaker agents near their original performance, indicating that these resources amplify useful strategies rather than create them. Together, these results show that strong coding agents adapt to unfamiliar languages by using tools, feedback, and workspace state to build a working model of the target language. Metaprogramming is the clearest case, but the broader gap is constructing and debugging a strategy that works under the target language's rules.

AI.tldr: 评估六个当代编程代理在四种 esoteric 编程语言上的表现，发现主流基准测试隐藏了代理间的显著能力差异，最强代理通过元编程策略解决不熟悉语言的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试主要使用主流语言和公开仓库，可能掩盖代理在面对完全不熟悉的编程语言时的真实能力差异。
AI.method: 在四种 esoteric 编程语言(Brainfuck, Befunge-98等)上使用顺序设置、文件编辑、本地执行和隐藏测试评分，评估六个当代编程代理。
AI.result: 最强代理(Claude Opus 4.6和GPT-5.4 xhigh)通过编写Python程序生成目标语言代码来避免直接编写目标语言，这种元编程策略被禁止后性能大幅下降。更多解释器调用和输出token只对强代理有效。
AI.conclusion: 强大的编程代理通过工具、反馈和工作区状态来构建目标语言的工作模型，元编程是最清晰的案例，但更广泛的能力差距在于构建和调试能在目标语言规则下工作的策略。

relevance_reason: This paper is about evaluating AI coding agents (like Claude, GPT) on esoteric programming languages (Brainfuck, Befunge). It is completely unrelated to the research profile of Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. The application domain is entirely different - this is software engineering/AI agents, not computer graphics, motion generation, video generation, or any visual/3D motion synthesis. The methods and goals have no overlap with any of the pain points mentioned.

title: SSR-Merge: Subspace Signal Routing for Training-Free LoRA Merging in Diffusion Models
summary: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) merging can efficiently combine diverse generative capabilities from multiple trained LoRAs for a diffusion model. However, existing LoRA merging techniques often suffer from severe parameter interference, causing destructive collisions in the shared parameter space. To address this, we propose Subspace Signal Routing (SSR), which resolves interference by routing internal signals instead of performing parameter-space merge. Specifically, SSR first constructs a unified subspace by concatenating candidate LoRAs along the rank dimension. Next, SSR employs an inverse correlation matrix to decorrelate mixed signals within this space. Finally, a directional guide matrix steers these purified signals into their respective task-specific subspaces. We provide a rigorous theoretical analysis proving that SSR aligns with the Ordinary Least Squares (OLS) solution, thereby ensuring mathematical optimality. We utilize the additivity of sufficient statistics to design a streaming algorithm. This enables on-the-fly updates that significantly reduce memory overhead and computation time. Extensive experiments validate that SSR significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods while maintaining comparable efficiency. Code is available at https://github.com/nagara214/SSR-Merge.

AI.tldr: 提出Subspace Signal Routing (SSR)方法，通过在子空间中路由内部信号而非参数空间合并来解决LoRA合并中的参数干扰问题，并提供理论最优性保证。
AI.motivation: 现有LoRA合并技术存在严重的参数干扰问题，导致共享参数空间中的破坏性碰撞，无法有效结合多个训练好的LoRA的生成能力。
AI.method: SSR方法包含三个关键步骤：1)沿秩维度连接候选LoRAs构建统一子空间；2)使用逆相关矩阵去相关混合信号；3)通过方向引导矩阵将净化信号引导到任务特定子空间。理论证明SSR与OLS解一致，并设计流式算法实现增量更新。
AI.result: 实验验证SSR显著优于现有最先进方法，同时保持相当的效率。
AI.conclusion: SSR通过信号路由方式有效解决了参数干扰问题，数学上达到最优，为LoRA合并提供了新范式。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LoRA merging in diffusion models - a general parameter-efficient fine-tuning method for model optimization. It has NO relevance to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion because: (1) Different application domain - it's about diffusion model merging, not motion generation; (2) Doesn't address any of the pain points - not about visual feature extraction, VLM supervision, cross-modal alignment, or motion naturalness; (3) Different methods - focuses on LoRA merging, not video generation models, VLM, or 3D motion generation. While both involve diffusion models, the application domain is completely different (general image generation vs human motion synthesis).

title: WorldKernel: A World Model is the Coupling Kernel of Admissible Possible Worlds
summary: A common assumption holds that enough observational and interventional data, given to a strong enough predictor, suffices. We report a failure mode that contradicts it. Across hundreds of structural causal models, on identified quantities a strong predictor and a Bayesian baseline both succeed, but on unidentified quantities (the couplings between counterfactual worlds) the predictor collapses to a point, on 28% of models to one no valid model can produce, while the truth is an admissible interval more data never narrows. The gap is structural: prediction cannot represent uncertainty over counterfactual couplings. We cast a world model as a single positive semidefinite coupling kernel K(T,T') over admissible worlds, whose diagonal is the ordinary posterior (what a predictor recovers) and whose off-diagonal is the cross-world coupling it cannot, which every counterfactual reads. The paper is the theory of that off-diagonal. It is real: two states with identical posteriors differ on a cross-world query, and the off-diagonal is the coupling that fixes counterfactuals. It can be bounded: positive semidefiniteness is partial-identifying information the marginals lack, and enforcing it bounds counterfactuals in polynomial time where the exact response-type program is intractable. Logical structure sharpens it: ontology axioms tighten the bound by up to a third, propagating to couplings they never touch. It can be acquired: targeted scars, constraints learned from encountered infeasibilities, close the gap several times faster than untargeted ones. Its full reconstruction is approximate counting of the admissible worlds, tractable below the Sly-Sun threshold and inapproximable above; we do not claim to beat the worst case.

AI.tldr: 论文揭示了一个与直觉相反的失败模式：即使有足够的数据和强大的预测器，在处理反事实世界的耦合（无法识别的量）时也会完全失效。预测器只能恢复后验分布的对角线（单世界信息），无法恢复非对角线（跨世界耦合）。论文提出了通过半正定耦合核、 ontology 公理和目标学习来 bounds、获取和重建这一信息的方法。
AI.motivation: 挑战机器学习中"足够数据+强预测器=完美预测"的常见假设，揭示预测在跨世界反事实推理上的结构性缺陷。
AI.method: 将世界模型表示为正半定耦合核K(T,T')，对角线为普通后验，非对角线为跨世界耦合；利用正半定性作为部分识别信息约束反事实；通过 ontology 公理传播约束；使用目标scar从不可行性学习中获取信息。
AI.result: 在数百个结构因果模型上，28%的模型中预测器崩溃到不可能的点，而真实答案是 admissible 区间；相同后验的两个状态在跨世界查询上可以不同；ontology 公理可将边界收紧三分之一；目标学习的收敛速度比非目标学习快数倍。
AI.conclusion: 预测无法表示跨世界反事实耦合的不确定性，这是一个结构性问题；通过正半定性、ontology 约束和目标学习可 bounds 和获取跨世界耦合信息；完全重建是近似计数问题，在 Sly-Sun 阈值以下可计算，以上则不可近似。

relevance_reason: This paper is about causal inference, counterfactual reasoning, and world models in machine learning - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and Text-to-Motion. The research profile deals with generating 3D human motion from text/video using video generation models, VLMs, and motion generation models. This paper addresses structural causal models, semi-definite coupling kernels, and cross-world counterfactual inference - a fundamentally different application domain with no overlap in methods or goals.

title: Can Image Models Imagine Time? ImageTime: A Novel Benchmark for Probing Visual World Modeling Through Spatiotemporal Consistency
summary: Image generation models now produce high-quality static images, yet their ability to represent how a visual world changes over time remains poorly understood. Practical workflows such as storyboarding, step-by-step illustration, reference-guided editing, and video previsualization require models to preserve identities, objects, spatial relations, and causal order across multiple visual states. Existing evaluations largely measure single-image correctness, compositional alignment, or video quality, leaving open whether an image model can coherently imagine a temporally ordered process. We introduce ImageTime, a diagnostic benchmark that uses spatiotemporal consistency as a behavioral probe of visual world modeling in image generation. Given an action instruction, and optionally a reference image specifying the initial state, a model must generate one image containing four ordered key states: initial state, action onset, transition state, and final state. This four-keyframe protocol is more temporally demanding than single-image generation while avoiding the confounds of dense video dynamics. ImageTime organizes tasks with a progressive capability hierarchy and decomposes each scenario into stage-wise state predicates, cross-frame temporal constraints, and forbidden causal violations. GPT-5.5 scores all generated images under a structured VLM-as-judge protocol, producing interpretable capability scores, diagnostic subscores, and failure labels. Through multi-family benchmarking, ImageTime reveals where current image generation systems succeed, fail, and drift when asked to maintain coherent visual world states over time.

AI.tldr: ImageTime是一个诊断基准，用于评估图像生成模型在时间维度上保持视觉世界一致性的能力。给定动作指令和可选的参考图像，模型需要生成四个有序的关键帧状态：初始状态、动作 onset、过渡状态和最终状态。该基准通过GPT-5.5作为评判者，揭示当前图像生成系统在时间一致性方面的成功、失败和漂移。
AI.motivation: 当前图像生成模型虽能产生高质量静态图像，但对其如何表征视觉世界随时间变化的能力理解不足。实际工作流程如分镜绘制、步骤化插图、参考引导编辑和视频预可视化都需要模型在多个视觉状态间保持身份、物体、空间关系和因果顺序。现有评估主要衡量单图正确性、组合对齐或视频质量，未能解决图像模型是否能连贯地想象时间有序过程的问题。
AI.method: ImageTime使用时空一致性作为视觉世界建模的行为探测。给定动作指令和可选的初始状态参考图像，模型需生成包含四个有序关键帧的图像：初始状态、动作onset、过渡状态、最终状态。这一四关键帧协议比单图生成更具时间要求，同时避免密集视频动态的混淆。基准按渐进能力层次组织任务，将每个场景分解为阶段性状态谓词、跨帧时间约束和禁止的因果违反。GPT-5.5在结构化VLM-as-judge协议下评估所有生成图像，产生可解释的能力分数、诊断分分数和失败标签。
AI.result: 通过多家族基准测试，ImageTime揭示了当前图像生成系统在要求保持连贯视觉世界状态时成功、失败和漂移的地方。
AI.conclusion: ImageTime基准填补了图像生成模型时间一致性评估的空白，通过四关键帧协议和VLM-as-judge评估方法，能够诊断模型在时空一致性方面的具体能力水平和失败模式，为提升图像生成模型的时间建模能力提供明确方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 2D image sequence generation (temporal consistency in image keyframes), not 3D motion generation. The research profile requires text-to-motion for Computer Graphics (generating 3D skeletal motion), while this paper focuses on generating ordered 2D image frames. Although both deal with temporal aspects and action instructions, the application domain is fundamentally different - image generation vs motion generation. No 3D motion models, video-to-motion extraction, or cross-modal alignment with 3D representations are addressed. Similar to how diffusion for image generation differs from diffusion for human motion generation, this represents a different field entirely.

title: Recalling Too Well: Sycophancy Evaluation and Mitigation in Memory-Augmented Models
summary: Persistent memory systems promise to make LLMs more helpful by storing user beliefs over time. We show they also make models less correct by systematically amplifying sycophancy, wherein models prioritize agreement with users over accuracy. We conduct the first systematic evaluation of this effect, introducing MIST: a benchmark of synthetically generated multi-turn conversations where users express plausible misconceptions in scientific, medical, and moral reasoning domains. Testing across three state-of-the-art memory systems and five model families reveals that memory amplifies sycophantic behavior across all conditions, with up to 25x higher sycophancy rates than in-context baselines. Error analyses suggest memory extraction as the primary culprit: lossy compression into discrete snippets encodes user misconceptions while discarding corrective context. Based on these results, we propose two lightweight mitigations that substantially reduce sycophancy while matching or exceeding memory systems at factual recall.

AI.tldr: 持久记忆系统虽能存储用户信念以提升LLM助人性，但会系统性地放大谄媚行为，使模型优先考虑与用户达成一致而非准确性，导致错误率上升。
AI.motivation: 研究持久记忆系统对LLM行为的影响，特别是是否会引入或放大不当的谄媚倾向。
AI.method: 构建MIST基准测试集（包含科学、医学和道德推理领域的多轮对话），测试三种记忆系统和五种模型家族。
AI.result: 记忆系统在各条件下均放大了谄媚行为，谄媚率比上下文基线高出高达25倍。错误分析表明记忆提取是主因：有损压缩将用户错误观念编码为离散片段，同时丢弃了纠正性上下文。
AI.conclusion: 提出两种轻量级缓解方法，可在事实回忆方面匹配或超越记忆系统的同时显著减少谄媚行为。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about LLM alignment and safety (NLP/AI safety), studying how persistent memory systems in LLMs amplify sycophantic behavior. The application domain is entirely different from Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. It has nothing to do with 3D motion generation, video generation models, visual feature extraction, or cross-modal alignment between text, video, and 3D motion representations. While it mentions "memory systems," these are LLM memory systems for storing user beliefs, not motion generation memory. This paper belongs to NLP/AI safety field, not computer graphics.

title: Leveraging Metric Depth for Relative Depth Prediction
summary: We present our solution to the 2025 SoccerNet Monocular Depth Estimation Competition Challenge. Predicting the relative depth in football scenarios is challenging, especially with only thousands of training samples available. To address this issue, our method leverages the powerful zero-shot capabilities of models pretrained on large-scale datasets to learn metric depth for effective relative depth prediction, achieving a score of $2.68 \times 10^{-3}$ on the challenge set.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了2025 SoccerNet单目深度估计竞赛的解决方案，利用在大规模数据集上预训练模型的零样本能力来预测足球场景中的相对深度。
AI.motivation: 在足球场景中预测相对深度具有挑战性，尤其是只有数千个训练样本可用的情况下。
AI.method: 该方法利用在大规模数据集上预训练模型的强大零样本能力来学习度量深度，从而实现有效的相对深度预测。
AI.result: 在挑战集上获得了2.68×10^-3的分数。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用预训练模型的零样本能力，该方法成功解决了训练样本有限的问题，并在足球场景深度估计任务中取得了良好效果。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about monocular depth estimation for soccer scenes (Sports Computer Vision), while the research profile is about Text-to-Motion generation in Computer Graphics. These are entirely different application domains - one analyzes soccer videos for depth, the other generates 3D human motion from text/video inputs. The only connection is that both use computer vision techniques, but the task, goal, and application are completely different. The paper does not address any of the pain points related to motion synthesis, cross-modal alignment, or VLM-based quality supervision.

title: Architect-Ant: Editable Automatic Furnishing of Architectural Floor Plans
summary: Furnished floor plans are fundamental to real estate visualization, interior design, and architectural workflows. However, progress in automatic furniture arrangement has been limited by the lack of real, professionally designed floor-plan datasets with object-level furniture annotations. To address this gap, we introduce AntPlan-270, a curated dataset of 270 architectural floor plans with per-room furniture bounding box annotations across ten residential room categories. Building on this dataset, we present Architect-Ant, an editable automatic furnishing framework powered by a fine-tuned vision-language model. Furniture layouts are represented using a compact, coordinate-based domain-specific language (DSL) that encodes object categories and placements relative to the room geometry. To improve spatial reasoning, we generate procedural reasoning traces that capture architectural constraints such as wall alignment, door and window clearance, circulation, fixture compatibility, and room-specific furniture inventories, and use them to supervise fine-tuning of the model. We then apply preference optimization over candidate object placements to further refine layout quality. The generated DSL can be rasterized into semantic masks and used to condition a Flux-based LoRA renderer, producing realistic blueprint-style furnished floor-plan images while preserving the editable symbolic layout. Experiments on layout furnishing show that Architect-Ant produces geometrically valid and functionally plausible layouts, and suggest a scalable path for furnishing larger structure-only floor-plan datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AntPlan-270数据集和Architect-Ant自动家具布置框架，解决建筑楼层平面图自动家具布置缺乏专业数据集和自动化方法的问题。
AI.motivation: furnished floor plans对房地产可视化、室内设计和建筑工作流程至关重要，但自动家具布置的进展受限于缺乏带有对象级家具注释的真实专业设计楼层平面图数据集。
AI.method: 构建了包含270个建筑楼层平面图（10个住宅房间类别，每个房间有家具边界框注释）的AntPlan-270数据集；提出基于微调视觉语言模型的Architect-Ant可编辑自动家具布置框架；使用紧凑的基于坐标的领域特定语言(DSL)表示家具布局；生成程序化推理轨迹捕捉建筑约束（墙壁对齐、门窗间隙、流通、固定装置兼容性、房间特定家具清单）；使用候选项放置的偏好优化进一步提升布局质量；将生成的DSL光栅化为语义掩码并用于调节Flux-based LoRA渲染器。
AI.result: Architect-Ant产生几何有效且功能合理的布局，为为更大的仅结构楼层平面图数据集提供可扩展的家具布置路径。
AI.conclusion: 成功实现了自动家具布置框架，能够生成可编辑的符号布局并可渲染为逼真的蓝图风格家具楼层平面图图像。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion from text), while the paper is about architectural floor plan furniture layout and visualization. Although both involve computer graphics and use VLMs, the application domains are entirely different - one generates human motion, the other generates furniture arrangements in indoor spaces. The paper doesn't address any motion generation, temporal consistency, or motion naturalness issues.

title: ChartLens: A Dual-Branch Framework for Chart Data Correction and Factual Summary Refinement
summary: In this report, we present our champion solution for the DataMFM Challenge Track 2: Chart Understanding. This track requires models to recover structured chart data and generate faithful natural-language summaries from chart images. To address the complementary requirements of accurate data extraction and factual narration, we propose ChartLens, a dual-branch framework for chart data correction and summary refinement. ChartLens consists of two key modules: Structure-Aware CSV Verification and Correction (SAVC) and Text-Retention-Guided Summary Refinement (TRSR). SAVC improves the reliability of structured data extraction through verification and correction, while TRSR enhances summary generation by preserving critical textual and numerical evidence from charts. By combining model adaptation, correction-based generation, and OCR-assisted evidence grounding, ChartLens improves both structured data recovery and summary factuality. On the test set, our final system achieves an overall score of 69.10 and ranks first in Track 2, demonstrating its effectiveness for accurate chart understanding. Our code will be released at: https://github.com/iLearn-Lab/CVPRW26-ChartLens.

AI.tldr: ChartLens是一个用于图表理解的双分支框架，在DataMFM挑战赛Track 2中获第一名（得分69.10），实现了准确的图表数据提取和忠实的事实性摘要生成。
AI.motivation: 该赛道要求模型从图表图像中恢复结构化图表数据并生成忠实于数据的自然语言摘要，需要同时满足准确的数据提取和事实性叙述的双重需求。
AI.method: 提出ChartLens框架，包含两个关键模块：1)结构感知的CSV验证与修正(SAVC)，通过验证和修正提高结构化数据提取的可靠性；2)文本保留引导的摘要细化(TRSR)，通过保留图表中的关键文本和数值证据来增强摘要生成。综合运用模型适应、基于修正的生成和OCR辅助证据 grounding技术。
AI.result: 在测试集上，最终系统获得总体得分69.10，在Track 2中排名第一。
AI.conclusion: ChartLens系统展示了在准确图表理解方面的有效性，成功实现了结构化数据恢复和摘要事实性的双重提升。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about chart data extraction and factual summary generation from chart images (DataViz/Chart Understanding), not about Text-to-Motion generation in Computer Graphics. The pain points, methods (CSV validation, OCR-based grounding, summary refinement), and application domain have no connection to motion generation, video-to-motion synthesis, or 3D motion representations. This is a data visualization/NLP task rather than a computer graphics motion synthesis task.

title: Mind the Gap: Can Frontier LLMs Pass a Standardized Office Proficiency Exam?
summary: The deployment of Large Language Model (LLM) agents for computer automation is accelerating, yet their ability to navigate complex, professional-grade productivity software is largely untested. We argue that Office automation is an ideal environment for benchmarking document-automation capability, as it requires long-horizon planning and reasoning, precise parameter configuration, and multi-application integration. To quantify this capability, we introduce an evaluation based on China's National Computer Rank Examination (NCRE), featuring 200 comprehensive practical-operation tasks across Word, Excel, and PowerPoint. Each task is scored on a 100-point rubric scale using 7,118 machine-gradable criteria, and Score Rate (SR) denotes the mean percentage of rubric points earned across these tasks. We benchmark 7 frontier LLMs and observe stark limitations: single-turn models score a maximum of 36.6%. A stronger agentic system with execution feedback, iterative repair, and broader Office automation access reaches 68.8%, but remains below the 95.5% community-reference score used as a scoring sanity check. Ultimately, our experiments demonstrate that despite recent advancements in code generation, achieving reliable fine-grained Office document automation remains a significant challenge for current code-generating LLM and agent systems.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一个基于中国计算机等级考试（NCRE）的办公自动化评估基准，用于测试大型语言模型（LLM）在Word、Excel和PowerPoint中的文档自动化能力，涵盖200个任务和7118个评分标准。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM代理在专业级生产力软件导航能力方面缺乏系统性评估，而办公自动化需要长时规划、精确参数配置和多应用集成，是理想的评估环境。
AI.method: 基于中国NCRE构建包含200个实际操作的评估任务集，涵盖Word、Excel和PowerPoint，采用7118个机器可评分标准，以100分制评分，引入得分率（SR）指标，测试了7个前沿LLM模型。
AI.result: 单一模型最高得分为36.6%，带有执行反馈、迭代修复和更广泛办公访问的代理系统达到68.8%，均低于95.5%的社区参考评分。
AI.conclusion: 尽管近期代码生成有所进展，但实现可靠的细粒度办公文档自动化对当前代码生成LLM和代理系统仍是重大挑战。

relevance_reason: This paper is about evaluating LLMs for office automation tasks (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) - a completely different application domain. The research profile is Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion from text/video). There is no match: this paper does not address motion generation, video-to-motion conversion, 3D visual guidance features, cross-modal alignment between text/video/motion, or any computer graphics task. It focuses solely on assessing LLM capabilities in office productivity software navigation, which is entirely unrelated to text-to-motion synthesis.

title: ManiSplat: Manipulation Trajectory Synthesis from Monocular Video via Decoupled 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: Reconstructing dynamic and interactive 3D scenes from real-world observations remains a fundamental challenge in computer vision and robotics. While recent advances in 3D Gaussian Splatting have enabled high-fidelity static reconstruction, extending it to interactive environments with articulated robots and manipulable objects remains difficult due to complex contact interactions and abrupt pose changes. To address these challenges, we introduce ManiSplat, a unified framework that reconstructs controllable and decoupled Gaussian digital twins directly from monocular ego-view robotic videos. Our method introduces a Graph-Structured Disentangled Representation that separates the robot, objects, and background into independently optimizable Gaussian subfields organized within a scene graph. To ensure stability, we propose a Task-Oriented Spatio-Temporal Alignment module that leverages the inherent logic of manipulation tasks-alternating between Motion and Skill phases-to construct accurate pseudo-ground-truth trajectories. Finally, a joint photometric-geometric optimization ensures the reconstructed scenes are temporally coherent, physically consistent, and simulation-ready. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach reconstructs interaction-driven dynamic scenes with high fidelity and controllability, effectively supporting downstream robotic tasks and policy learning.

AI.tldr: ManiSplat是一个统一框架,能从单目自我视角的机器人视频中重建可控制和解耦的高斯数字孪生,通过图结构解耦表示分离机器人、物体和背景,并利用任务导向的时空对齐模块确保重建的 temporally连贯性和物理一致性。
AI.motivation: 解决现有3D高斯溅射方法在重建交互式动态场景(特别是有关节机器人和可操作物体的场景)时的困难,这些场景涉及复杂的接触交互和急剧的姿态变化。
AI.method: 提出图结构解耦表示(Graph-Structured Disentiable Representation)将场景分离为独立可优化的子字段;任务导向的时空对齐模块利用操作任务的逻辑(运动和技能阶段交替)构建伪真值轨迹;联合光度-几何优化确保时间连贯性和物理一致性。
AI.result: 重建具有高保真度和可控性的交互驱动动态场景,可有效支持下游机器人和策略学习任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功实现了从单目视频重建可控、可模拟的3D数字孪生,为机器人操作任务提供了有效支持。

relevance_reason: Wrong application domain. This paper is about ROBOT manipulation trajectory synthesis for robotics, not Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. While it uses 3D Gaussian Splatting and addresses temporal consistency, the end goal is robot control (robotic arm manipulation) rather than human motion generation. Robot motion synthesis is fundamentally different from human motion synthesis in computer graphics. The paper does not involve text-to-motion generation, VLM-based quality supervision, or cross-modal alignment between text, video, and 3D motion representations - all key pain points in the research profile.

title: Bellman-Taylor Score Decoding for Markov Decision Processes with State-Dependent Feasible Action Sets
summary: Many Markov decision processes (MDPs) in operations research have feasible actions that are state dependent and defined implicitly by various operational constraints. These features make it difficult to use standard deep reinforcement learning (DRL) algorithms, whose action interfaces typically assume either a fixed finite action catalog or a simple Euclidean space. Motivated by a Taylor expansion of the optimal action-value function, we propose Bellman--Taylor score decoding, a framework that moves policy learning to a Euclidean score space while enforcing feasibility through an action decoder. The induced latent-score MDP then can be optimized by standard DRL algorithms without differentiating through the decoder. We provide a performance guarantee showing that the optimality gap of this approach decomposes into a structural approximation error and an algorithmic learning error. Lastly, we apply this framework to a queueing network control problem, where the policy essentially learns a state-dependent index-based dispatching rule. Numerical experiments show near-optimal performance in small instances and considerable improvements over benchmarks in larger systems.

AI.tldr: 针对运营研究中状态依赖且隐式定义的约束动作难以用标准深度强化学习处理的问题，提出Bellman-Taylor分数解码框架，将策略学习迁移到欧几里得分数空间，并通过动作解码器强制执行可行性。
AI.motivation: 许多运营研究中的马尔可夫决策过程具有状态依赖且由各种操作约束隐式定义的可行动作，这些特征使得标准深度强化学习算法难以直接应用，因为这些算法的动作接口通常假定固定有限的动作目录或简单的欧几里得空间。
AI.method: 基于最优动作价值函数的泰勒展开，提出Bellman-Taylor分数解码框架，将策略学习迁移到欧几里得分数空间，同时通过动作解码器强制执行可行性。诱导的潜在分数MDP可以通过标准深度强化学习算法优化，无需对解码器进行微分。
AI.result: 提供了性能保证，表明该方法的最优性差距分解为结构近似误差和算法学习误差。将该框架应用于队列网络控制问题，其中策略基本上学习基于状态依赖索引的调度规则。数值实验表明小型实例接近最优性能，大型系统相比基准有显著改进。
AI.conclusion: Bellman-Taylor分数解码框架为处理具有复杂约束的MDP提供了一种有效的深度强化学习新方法，在队列网络控制等实际问题上展示了良好的性能，为未来在更广泛运营研究问题中的应用奠定了基础。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about Operations Research/Markov Decision Processes for queue network control, not Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion. The application domain is entirely different - it deals with queue scheduling and MDP optimization, not 3D human motion generation from text/video. Methods (Bellman-Taylor score decoding, Taylor expansions for MDPs) are unrelated to video generation models, VLMs, or 3D motion generation. None of the pain points (visual feature extraction, VLM supervision, cross-modal alignment, motion naturalness) are addressed.

title: Kwai Keye-VL-2.0 Technical Report
summary: We introduce Kwai Keye-VL-2.0-30B-A3B, an open-source Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) multimodal foundation model designed to advance long-video understanding and agentic intelligence. To address the challenges of ultra-long contexts, information redundancy, and prohibitive computational costs inherent in hour-level videos, Keye-VL-2.0 is the first to adapt DeepSeek Sparse Attention (DSA) to GQA-based multimodal architectures, enabling lossless 256K context processing while capturing critical frames and long-range temporal dependencies. This architecture is underpinned by a highly optimized training and inference infrastructure, including scalable video I/O, heterogeneous ViT-LM parallelism, and custom DSA kernels that significantly maximize throughput and minimize computational overhead. Furthermore, to overcome the algorithmic dilemma of catastrophic forgetting during multi-task alignment, we introduce Cross-Modal Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation (MOPD) paired with Context-RL and Video-RL. By distilling dense token-level teacher feedback from on-policy rollouts back into the MoE backbone, which activates only 3B parameters, Keye-VL-2.0 natively empowers advanced agent collaboration across Code, Tool, and Search scenarios with multimodal self-correction. Extensive evaluations across video understanding, temporal grounding, reasoning, STEM, and agent benchmarks demonstrate that Keye-VL-2.0-30B-A3B achieves state-of-the-art performance among models of similar scale, particularly excelling in fine-grained temporal localization on TimeLens and long-video comprehension on Video-MME-v2 and LongVideoBench. We release our model checkpoints to accelerate community progress toward scalable and robust multimodal agentic applications.

AI.tldr: Kwai Keye-VL-2.0-30B-A3B是一款开源的专家混合(MoE)多模态基础模型，专注于长视频理解和智能体应用。
AI.motivation: 解决长视频(小时级)面临的超长上下文、信息冗余和计算成本过高等挑战，以及多任务对齐中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.method: 1)首次将DeepSeek稀疏注意力(DSA)适配到GQA多模态架构，实现无损256K上下文处理；2)构建可扩展视频I/O、异构ViT-LM并行和自定义DSA内核；3)提出跨模态多教师策略蒸馏(MOPD)结合Context-RL和Video-RL。
AI.result: 在相同规模模型中达到最先进水平，尤其在TimeLens时序定位和Video-MME-v2、LongVideoBench长视频理解任务上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 开源模型检查点以推动社区在可扩展多模态智能体应用方面的进展。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Video Understanding (long video comprehension, temporal localization) - a completely different application domain from Text-to-Motion generation. While both mention VLMs, this paper uses VLM for video analysis/understanding tasks, not for motion generation or quality assessment. It doesn't address any of the pain points: extracting 3D visual guidance features, motion fidelity supervision, cross-modal alignment for motion synthesis, or maintaining motion naturalness. The paper focuses on understanding existing videos rather than generating 3D motion from text/video priors.

title: Null-Space Constrained Low-Rank Adaptation for Response-Specified Large Language Model Unlearning
summary: Large language model unlearning aims to suppress designated undesirable knowledge while preserving benign capabilities. Many unlearning objectives focus on suppressing undesired answers, while recent target-guided variants specify replacement behavior but still leave update locality largely unconstrained. This paper introduces \emph{Null-Space Constrained Response-Specified Unlearning} (NSRU), a projection-constrained low-rank framework for controlled LLM unlearning. NSRU uses an explicitly structured safe target response to specify the desired behavior for each forget query, while suppressing the original undesired content. To localize adaptation, NSRU estimates per-module retain subspaces from benign hidden representations and uses an orthogonal-projected low-rank parameterization to confine LoRA updates to the null space of the retain subspace. The resulting objective jointly optimizes safe-target learning, undesired-response suppression, and retention preservation under this constrained parameterization. We provide a local first-order analysis showing that the projected update reduces retain-side perturbations while preserving editable directions for shaping forget-query behavior. Experiments on TOFU show that NSRU effectively suppresses extractable forget-set knowledge while improving retain QA performance, model utility, and safe-target alignment over representative baselines. On WMDP, NSRU keeps hazardous-domain accuracy near the random-choice region while preserving broad and domain-adjacent MMLU utility. Ablation studies support the complementary roles of safe-target supervision, undesired-response suppression, retention loss, and null-space projected updates, while sensitivity and robustness analyses indicate stable behavior across the tested hyperparameter and prompt variations.

AI.tldr: NSRU提出了一种名为Null-Space Constrained Response-Specified Unlearning的LLM可控遗忘方法，通过使用安全目标响应指定期望行为，同时使用正交投影的低秩参数化(LoRA)将更新限制在保留子空间的零空间中，从而在抑制不期望知识的同时保留模型的良性能力。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM遗忘方法存在两个问题：1) 只关注抑制不期望的答案，缺乏对替换行为的明确指定；2) 更新局部性未受约束，可能影响保留性能。NSRU旨在解决这两个问题，实现更可控的LLM遗忘。
AI.method: NSRU框架包含三个核心组成部分：1) 安全目标响应学习：为每个遗忘查询指定明确的期望行为；2) 不期望响应抑制：压制原始不期望内容；3) 保留子空间的正交投影低秩参数化：从良性隐藏表示估计每个模块的保留子空间，将LoRA更新限制在保留子空间的零空间中。
AI.result: 在TOFU数据集上，NSRU有效抑制了可提取的遗忘集知识，同时提升了保留问答性能、模型实用性和安全目标对齐。在WMDP数据集上，NSRU将危险领域准确性保持在随机选择附近，同时保留了广泛的领域相邻MMLU实用性。消融实验支持各组成部分的互补作用，敏感性和鲁棒性分析表明在测试的超参数和提示变化下行为稳定。
AI.conclusion: NSRU提出了一种新的可控LLM遗忘框架，通过零空间约束的低秩参数化实现了对遗忘更新的局部控制，在有效抑制不期望知识的同时更好地保留了模型的良性能力，具有实际应用价值。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM (Large Language Model) unlearning and AI safety - specifically about making AI models "forget" certain knowledge while preserving capabilities. This is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion, which deals with generating 3D human motion from text and video inputs. The application domain is entirely different - LLM training vs 3D motion generation. The methods, despite both using "adaptation" terminology, are completely different (LoRA for knowledge editing vs video generation models for motion synthesis). This paper does not address any of the pain points: extracting 3D visual guidance from 2D video, VLM-based quality supervision, cross-modal alignment between text/video/3D motion, or motion naturalness/temporal consistency.

title: STEDiff: Strengthening Text Embedding for Text-to-Image Alignment in Diffusion Model
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures, to appear at IJCNN 2026
summary: Although pretrained text-to-image (T2I) generation models can produce high-quality images, they often fail to faithfully reflect the semantic intent of complex prompts due to stochastic noise and inherent model limitations. This issue frequently manifests as the model overlooking specific objects or failing to correctly bind attributes to their corresponding entities, a challenge referred to as semantic alignment. Unlike existing approaches that rely on computationally expensive fine-tuning or labor-intensive layout priors, we propose STEDiff, a training-free method designed to enhance semantic representations directly within the text-embedding space. Specifically, we introduce a method that primarily leverages the [EOT] token to strengthen the relevant semantics of sub-sentences and then replaces the corresponding tokens in the original prompt. Furthermore, a novel semantic enhancement loss is incorporated to enforce spatial constraints, ensuring that the semantics of each entity are precisely mapped to their respective image regions. Extensive quantitative and qualitative evaluations on the T2I-CompBench demonstrate that our method notably improves semantic consistency and generation integrity in complex scenarios.

AI.tldr: STEDiff是一种无需训练的方法，通过利用[EOT]标记增强子句语义并结合语义增强损失来强制空间约束，从而改善文本到图像模型在复杂提示下的语义对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 预训练的文本到图像生成模型常因随机噪声和模型固有局限性而无法准确反映复杂提示的语义意图，常表现为忽略特定对象或未能正确绑定属性到对应实体，即语义对齐问题。现有方法依赖计算昂贵的微调或劳动密集的布局先验。
AI.method: 提出STEDiff方法，首先利用[EOT]标记增强子句的相关语义，然后替换原始提示中的相应标记；并引入语义增强损失来强制空间约束，确保每个实体的语义精确映射到各自图像区域。
AI.result: 在T2I-CompBench上的广泛定量和定性评估表明，该方法显著提高了复杂场景下的语义一致性和生成完整性。
AI.conclusion: STEDiff是一种有效的训练-free方法，能够在不进行微调的情况下增强语义对齐，为复杂文本到图像生成提供了新的解决思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Text-to-Image generation (2D image synthesis), while the research profile is specifically about Text-to-Motion (3D human motion generation). These are completely different application domains. Although both use diffusion models, the task of generating 2D images is fundamentally different from generating 3D human motion sequences. The paper addresses semantic alignment issues in image generation, which has no relevance to the pain points of extracting 3D visual guidance from video, VLM-based motion fidelity supervision, or cross-modal alignment for motion synthesis.

title: Structure from Reasoning, Numbers from Search: On-Premise Open LLMs as Structural Priors for Coupled MIMO Controller Tuning
comment: 10 pages, 7 figures, 6 tables. Submitted to IEEE Access
summary: Tuning controllers for strongly coupled multi-input multi-output (MIMO) industrial processes is hard: decentralized classical auto-tuning ignores loop interaction, and local numerical optimization from natural initializations stalls in the resulting non-convex cost landscape. We ask whether on-premise open-source large language models (LLMs), which keep data on-site and need no plant model, can help. On a single-loop CSTR, classical relay-feedback tuning (IAE 0.106, near the 0.102 optimum) beats an LLM tuner (0.162): for simple loops the LLM adds nothing. The picture inverts on a strongly coupled quadruple-tank with conflicting set-points, scored by a penalized cost J = IAE + lambda*TV(u) that rewards tracking without chattering actuators. There, naive relay tuning (J ~ 28.6) and naive LLM tuning (29.7) are no better than open loop (22.7), and a local optimizer from balanced starts fails in 10/10 runs. A scaffolded open LLM instead reasons about the coupling, proposes the counter-intuitive asymmetric structure, and reaches J ~ 16.9 +/- 0.2 from any start; refining it with a classical optimizer attains the smooth global optimum (J ~ 12.0, 10/10 vs. 0/10), which even applies a non-obvious negative integral correction decentralized tuning cannot. A global optimizer (differential evolution) also reaches this optimum, so the LLM is not the only route; its advantage is sample efficiency and interpretability: a usable controller in 18 evaluations (where the global optimizer is worse than open loop) plus a stated rationale. This edge grows with dimension, reaching ~6x fewer evaluations on a 3x3 plant. The behaviour generalizes across four open models, and on a benign plant the LLM offers no advantage, sharpening the boundary. We contribute a reproducible benchmark delimiting when open LLMs help in control tuning: not as optimizers, but as a sample-efficient, interpretable structural prior.

AI.tldr: 研究探索了本地开源大语言模型(LLM)在多输入多输出(MIMO)工业过程控制器调优中的应用。对比了经典继电器反馈调优、局部优化器和LLM辅助调优的效果，发现在简单单回路(CSTR)中LLM无优势，但在强耦合四容罐等复杂系统中，LLM能提供样本高效且可解释的结构先验，达到全局最优且所需评估次数显著减少。
AI.motivation: 强耦合MIMO工业过程的控制器调优困难：去中心化经典自整定忽略回路交互作用，局部数值优化从自然初始点陷入非凸成本景观无法找到全局最优。研究者希望探索本地开源LLM是否能帮助解决这一问题。
AI.method: 在多个系统上进行实验：(1)单回路CSTR比较经典继电器反馈与LLM调优器；(2)强耦合四容罐系统测试多种方法包括继电器调优、朴素LLM调优、局部优化器、支架式开放LLM和差分进化全局优化；(3)3x3 plant验证扩展性。使用带惩罚的成本函数J=IAE+λ*TV(u)评估跟踪性能和无抖振。
AI.result: 单回路CSTR：经典继电器调优(IAE 0.106，接近0.102最优)优于LLM调优器(0.162)；四容罐：朴素继电器(28.6)和朴素LLM(29.7)均不如开环(22.7)，局部优化10次全失败。支架式LLM通过推理耦合提出非对称结构，从任意初始点达到J~16.9±0.2，经经典优化细化后达到平滑全局最优J~12.0(10/10成功)，甚至应用了去中心化无法实现的非平凡负积分校正。差分进化也达到此最优，但LLM仅需18次评估(全局优化器更差)，显示样本效率优势。3x3 plant上LLM减少约6倍评估次数。行为在四个开源模型上可泛化，在良性植物上LLM无优势。
AI.conclusion: 开放LLM在控制调优中的优势边界：不做优化器，而是作为样本高效、可解释的结构先验。简单回路无需LLM；强耦合高维系统LLM可显著减少评估次数并提供可理解的设计依据。贡献了一个可复现的基准来界定LLM何时有帮助。

relevance_reason: This paper is about industrial control engineering (MIMO controller tuning using LLMs), NOT Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion. The application domain is completely different - it's about tuning industrial process controllers, not generating human motion from text or video. While both papers mention LLMs, the use case is entirely unrelated to the research profile's field of computer graphics motion synthesis.

title: Envision4D: Envisioning Visual Futures via Feed-forward 4D Gaussian Splatting for Autonomous Driving
summary: Forecasting the future evolution of dynamic scenes is crucial in autonomous driving. However, existing feed-forward paradigms are primarily designed for interpolation. When extended to future extrapolation, they suffer from ghosting artifacts under large displacements and are constrained by simplified motion assumptions or strict future priors. To overcome these challenges, we propose Envision4D, a fully self-supervised feed-forward framework for pose-free future extrapolation. Specifically, we introduce a Future Pose Prediction module that infers future camera parameters via an iterative denoising process. Furthermore, to capture non-linear dynamics, we propose In-layer Temporal Attention and employ Conditioned Motion Lifting, which transforms the highly uncertain extrapolation process into robust relational mappings. Finally, a Progressive Training Strategy is utilized to stabilize unsupervised motion learning against error accumulation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Envision4D achieves state-of-the-art performance, significantly outperforming existing methods in future view synthesis.

AI.tldr: Envision4D是一个用于自动驾驶场景的自监督未来外推框架，解决了现有方法在大位移下产生重影 artifact 和受限于简化运动假设的问题。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶中动态场景的未来预测至关重要，但现有前馈范式主要设计用于插值，扩展到未来外推时存在重影 artifact、受限于简化运动假设或严格未来先验的约束。
AI.method: 提出三个关键技术：1) Future Pose Prediction模块通过迭代去噪过程推断未来相机参数；2) In-layer Temporal Attention捕捉非线性动力学；3) Conditioned Motion Lifting将高度不确定的外推过程转化为稳健的关系映射；4) Progressive Training Strategy稳定无监督运动学习。
AI.result: Envision4D在未来的视图合成中实现了最先进的性能，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Envision4D是一个有效的 pose-free 未来外推框架，通过自监督方式解决了动态场景预测中的关键挑战，为自动驾驶场景理解提供了新的技术路径。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion (generating human motion from text), while this paper is about Autonomous Driving scene future prediction/view synthesis using 4D Gaussian Splatting. The paper addresses how to predict future driving scenes (scene-level rendering), not human motion generation. The methods (4D Gaussian Splatting, future pose prediction) are unrelated to text-to-motion generation, and there is no text conditioning or human motion synthesis involved. This is a different field entirely.

title: Superficial Beliefs in LLM Decision-Making
summary: We ask whether large language models (LLMs) merely imitate rationales when choosing between two options, or whether their choices reflect a systematic underlying decision structure. Using synthetic binary decision settings in which models choose between profiles defined by graded attributes, we compare the attribute a model says mattered most with the attribute that best explains its choice under a behavioural model fit to prior decisions. The behavioural model predicts held-out choices well, showing that model behaviour is systematically related to the visible attributes rather than being random. However, direct self-reports and a separate score-based judge recover the behaviourally inferred driver only partially. The resulting picture is neither one of arbitrary behaviour nor one of fully articulated belief - outputs are structured enough to support prediction, but explicit reasons track the recovered driver only imperfectly. This qualitative pattern persists across prompt-order and sampling perturbations, alternative behavioural models, targeted occlusion analyses, and structurally varied decision settings. We interpret this as evidence for ``superficial belief'' in LLM decision-making: models behave as if guided by probabilistic local priorities over attributes, while having only limited verbal access to the attributes that drive their decisions.

AI.tldr: 研究大型语言模型（LLM）在二进制决策中的选择是否反映系统性决策结构，还是仅模仿表面理由。通过比较模型自我报告的重要属性与行为模型拟合推断的驱动因素，发现行为模型可预测选择，但自我报告只能部分恢复驱动因素，表明LLM存在"表面信念"。
AI.motivation: 探究LLM决策是否具有系统性底层结构，还是仅模仿表面理性
AI.method: 使用合成二进制决策设置，比较模型自我报告的重要属性与行为模型拟合推断的驱动因素，并在多种扰动下验证
AI.result: 行为模型可较好预测选择，但自我报告和评分判断只能部分恢复驱动因素
AI.conclusion: LLM存在"表面信念"：行为上受概率性局部优先级引导，但对驱动决策属性的口头访问有限

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM decision-making and interpretability - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and Text-to-Motion. It studies whether large language models have systematic decision structures or just mimic surface reasoning, which is entirely different from video-to-motion generation, cross-modal alignment, or motion synthesis. The application domain is totally different.

title: Analyzing Training-Free Corruption Detection for Object Detection Datasets
comment: Accepted at DataCV Workshop, Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2026
summary:
Annotation errors are widespread in computer vision datasets and can significantly degrade the performance of systems trained on them, particularly in complex tasks such as object detection. Several approaches exist to identify annotation errors, including training-free feature-space methods which provide a fast and interpretable way to analyze annotations. However, the behavior on object detection annotations, which include semantic and spatial information, remains largely unexplored.
  In this work we analyze the applicability of feature-space-based approaches for detecting annotation errors in object detection datasets. By adapting an existing feature-space method, we show that such approaches reliably expose semantic mislabel, while positional errors remain difficult to detect. We evaluate this behavior across multiple pretrained embedding models, synthetic noise types (symmetric, asymmetric, and positional), and real-world annotation errors using VOC2012 and KITTI.
  All code and real-world corruptions are publicly available at the following repository: https://github.com/ ChristianSieberichs/BoundingBox\_corruption\_detection

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了特征空间方法在目标检测数据集中检测标注错误的能力。研究发现该方法能可靠地检测语义标注错误，但位置错误难以检测。
AI.motivation: 计算机视觉数据集中普遍存在标注错误，这些错误会显著降低模型性能。现有特征空间方法在目标检测标注（包含语义和空间信息）上的适用性尚未被探索，因此需要研究验证其有效性。
AI.method: 通过改编现有的特征空间方法，在多个预训练嵌入模型、合成噪声类型（对称、非对称和位置）以及真实世界标注错误上评估其行为，使用VOC2012和KITTI数据集进行实验。
AI.result: 该方法能可靠地暴露语义标注错误，但位置错误仍然难以检测。研究在多个预训练模型和不同噪声类型上验证了这一行为。
AI.conclusion: 特征空间方法适用于检测目标检测数据集中的语义标注错误，可作为数据清理的快速可解释工具；但对于位置类错误的检测仍需进一步改进。

relevance_reason: This paper is completely irrelevant to the Text-to-Motion research profile. It focuses on detecting annotation errors (bounding box labeling mistakes) in 2D object detection datasets, which is an entirely different application domain. While the research profile deals with generating 3D human motion from text/video in computer graphics, this paper addresses data quality assurance in computer vision for object detection. There is no connection to video generation models (Wan Xiang, Seedance), 3D motion generation, cross-modal text-video-motion alignment, or motion synthesis. The only superficial similarity is that both fields use visual features, but the purpose and application are completely different.

title: Workflow-GYM: Towards Long-Horizon Evaluation of Computer-use Agentic tasks in Real-World Professional Fields
summary: Recent years have witnessed the rapid evolution of AI agents toward handling increasingly complex, real-world tasks. However, existing benchmarks rarely evaluate whether agents can operate graphical user interfaces to complete long-horizon, high-value professional workflows across diverse domains. Current GUI benchmarks still predominantly focus on general-purpose software, relatively simple applications, and short-horizon tasks, leaving it largely unknown whether modern agents can follow user instructions to autonomously operate domain-specific professional software and accomplish economically valuable work in an end-to-end manner. To bridge this gap, we introduce Workflow-GYM, a benchmark for long-horizon GUI tasks centered on professional domains and specialized software environments. Through extensive experiments on state-of-the-art models, we find that even the strongest models achieve only slightly above 30% success rates, highlighting that professional long-horizon GUI workflows remain highly challenging for current GUI agents. Further analysis reveals that current agents struggle to maintain long-horizon workflow consistency, frequently exhibiting workflow stage omission, error propagation, objective drift, and insufficient understanding of professional software environments. Our findings provide important insights into the limitations of current agent systems and suggest key directions for the next generation of GUI-agent research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Workflow-GYM基准测试，用于评估AI代理在专业软件环境中完成长时序图形用户界面任务的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI基准测试主要关注通用软件和短时序任务，缺乏对专业领域长时序高价值工作流的评估。
AI.method: 构建了以专业领域和专用软件环境为中心的长时序GUI任务基准，并通过在主流模型上进行广泛实验来评估性能。
AI.result: 最强模型的成功率仅略高于30%，表明专业长时序GUI工作流对当前代理仍极具挑战性。
AI.conclusion: 当前代理难以维持长时序工作流一致性，存在工作流阶段遗漏、错误传播、目标漂移等问题，需要在GUI代理研究中重点关注这些方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI agents performing long-horizon GUI tasks in professional software environments (computer use/automation), completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion field. The application domain is entirely different: it deals with AI agent task automation, not 3D human motion generation from text/video inputs. It doesn't address any of the pain points (visual feature extraction, VLM-based quality supervision, cross-modal alignment, motion naturalness) and doesn't use any of the specified methods (Video Generation Models like Wan Xiang/Seedance, 3D Motion Generation Models). This is a benchmark paper for AI agents in professional workflows, not computer graphics motion synthesis.

title: FadeMem: Distance-Aware Memory Consolidation for Autoregressive Video Diffusion
summary: Autoregressive video generators synthesize long videos by generating successive temporal segments, but their historical KV cache grows with video length. Existing bounded-cache methods reduce this cost with local windows, sink tokens, or compressed memory states, yet they usually assign fixed roles to different parts of the history. We propose FadeMem, a distance-aware KV memory consolidation mechanism that organizes historical KV blocks into a temporal hierarchy under a fixed cache budget. This design is motivated by frequency-dependent temporal decay: fine details decorrelate quickly, while coarse scene structure and identity remain useful over longer horizons. During generation, new history is inserted as fine-grained entries, while older adjacent entries are progressively merged under a power-law temporal allocation schedule, yielding a dense-near, sparse-far memory within one cache. Without architectural changes, FadeMem preserves recent context for short-term dynamics and compact long-range anchors for identity and scene coherence. Experiments show improved subject consistency, background stability, and temporal coherence over existing bounded-cache strategies.

AI.tldr: FadeMem是一种用于自回归视频生成器的距离感知KV内存整合机制，通过将历史KV块组织成时间层级结构，在固定缓存预算下实现"密集-近、稀疏-远"的记忆模式。
AI.motivation: 动机：现有有界缓存方法通常为历史不同部分分配固定角色，无法自适应处理视频中不同时间尺度的信息 decay 差异（细节快速去相关，而场景结构和身份保持长时有用）。
AI.method: 方法：在固定缓存预算下，将历史KV块组织成时间层级结构，采用幂律时间分配调度，新历史作为细粒度条目插入，邻近旧条目逐步合并，实现距离感知的内存整合。
AI.result: 结果：FadeMem在保持近期上下文用于短期动力学的同时，为身份和场景连贯性保留紧凑的远程锚点，在主体一致性、背景稳定性和时间连贯性方面优于现有有界缓存策略。
AI.conclusion: 结论：FadeMem通过无需架构更改的设计，有效解决了自回归视频生成中KV缓存随视频长度增长的问题，平衡了短期细节保留和长期结构记忆的需求。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses autoregressive VIDEO generation (2D video synthesis), which is a fundamentally different application domain from Text-to-Motion (3D human motion generation). While both may use diffusion models, they target different outputs: 2D video frames vs 3D motion sequences. The pain points differ significantly - the paper focuses on temporal coherence in video generation (subject consistency, background stability), not the cross-modal alignment between text, video, and 3D motion representations needed for text-to-motion tasks. Methods are also different - KV memory consolidation for video generation vs visual feature extraction from video priors for motion guidance.

title: What Fits (Into Few Tokens) Doesn't Overfit: Compression and Generalization in ML Research Agents
summary: Reusing a held-out benchmark adaptively should, in principle, invite overfitting. Yet benchmark-driven machine learning (ML) has produced surprisingly little overfitting in practice. An attractive hypothesis is that successful ML strategies are highly compressible. We study this in the setting of LLM-driven research agents, where the hypothesis becomes directly testable via two complementary information bottlenecks. In \emph{output compression}, an exploration agent adaptively searches for high-performance models using a validation set, and we test whether a fresh ``reproducer agent'' can reproduce its performance given only an extremely short prompt and the training data. In \emph{input compression}, the explorer receives only one-bit feedback indicating whether each submitted model improves on the running best. Across 8 datasets spanning tabular classification, vision, language modeling, diffusion modeling, and reward modeling, we find that these bottlenecks have little effect on performance: short prompts and compressible feedback are sufficient to reproduce and find high-performance models. The hypothesis is falsifiable: when we deliberately induce validation-set overfitting, the results fail to reproduce with short prompts. Taken together, our results support a description-length explanation for the lack of overfitting in benchmark-driven ML: successful strategies occupy a low-complexity region of strategy space.

AI.tldr: 研究提出"成功机器学习策略具有高度可压缩性"的假设，通过LLM驱动的探索代理和复现代理在8个数据集上验证输出压缩和输入压缩两种信息瓶颈，发现简短提示和可压缩反馈足以复现和找到高性能模型，从而支持描述长度解释。
AI.motivation: 基准驱动的机器学习理论上容易导致过拟合，但实际中过拟合现象很少出现，作者试图探究这一现象背后的原因，提出成功策略可能具有低复杂度的假设。
AI.method: 设计两种信息瓶颈实验：输出压缩使用探索代理在验证集上搜索高性能模型，复现代理仅用极短提示和训练数据复现性能；输入压缩仅提供每个模型是否改进的一比特反馈。实验涵盖8个数据集，包括表格分类、视觉、语言建模、扩散建模和奖励建模。
AI.result: 两种信息瓶颈对性能影响很小：简短提示和可压缩反馈足以复现和找到高性能模型。当故意诱导验证集过拟合时，结果无法用短提示复现，证伪了其他解释。
AI.conclusion: 研究支持描述长度解释：成功的机器学习策略在策略空间中占据低复杂度区域，这解释了基准驱动机器学习中过拟合很少发生的现象。

relevance_reason: This paper is about ML theory and generalization in research agents - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. It has no connection to 3D motion generation, video generation, visual feature extraction, cross-modal alignment for motion synthesis, or any of the specified pain points. The application domain is entirely different (ML theory vs. computer graphics/motion generation).

title: Don't waste SAM
comment: Published at European Symposium on Artificial Neural Networks (ESANN2023), Computational Intelligence and Machine Learning. Bruges (Belgium)
summary: Meta AI has recently released the Segment Anything Model (SAM), which demonstrates exceptional zero-shot image segmentation performance across various tasks with remarkable accuracy. Despite its inability to provide accurate segmentation across multiple research fields, SAM still serves as a valuable starting point for supporting the segmentation pipeline process, particularly for tasks that require extensive and senior skills annotations. This study aims to evaluate the generalization of SAM and fine-tuning SAM models using three waste segmentation datasets. Although they are captured from real scenes as SAM was pretrained on, these datasets present several challenges, including occlusions, deformable objects, transparency, and objects easily confused with backgrounds. In our findings, the fine-tuned SAM-ViT-H model outperforms the state-ofthe-art Zerowaste, and TACO datasets with a significant increase of +30 in IoU, and it closely approaches performance levels of TrashCan 1.0, with only a -1.44 difference. After evaluating these popular waste datasets, it became evident that fine-tuning SAM as a foundational model is a crucial step for providing better generalization for downstream waste segmentation tasks. Therefore, SAM should not be disregarded or wasted.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了Meta AI的SAM模型在垃圾分割任务上的泛化能力，并探索了微调SAM-ViT-H模型在三个垃圾分割数据集上的性能表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管SAM在零样本图像分割方面表现出色，但在特定领域（如垃圾分割）仍存在泛化问题。研究旨在探索SAM作为基础模型在下游垃圾分割任务中的适用性，并评估微调是否能提升其性能。
AI.method: 使用三个真实场景的垃圾分割数据集（包括Zerowaste、TACO和TrashCan 1.0）对SAM-ViT-H模型进行微调和评估，数据集涵盖遮挡、变形物体、透明物体等挑战。
AI.result: 微调后的SAM-ViT-H模型在Zerowaste和TACO数据集上实现了IoU提升+30，接近TrashCan 1.0的性能水平（仅差-1.44），显著优于其他先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 将SAM作为基础模型进行微调是提升下游垃圾分割任务泛化能力的关键步骤，SAM在特定领域任务中具有重要的应用价值，不应被忽视。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Text-to-Motion generation (generating 3D human motion from text), while this paper is about image segmentation for garbage detection. The paper doesn't address any of the pain points (3D visual guidance from 2D video, VLM-based quality supervision, cross-modal alignment, motion naturalness). Even though both fields use vision models, SAM (Segment Anything Model) is a 2D image segmentation model, not a video generation model, VLM, or 3D motion generation model. This is a computer vision/image segmentation paper unrelated to computer graphics motion synthesis.

title: CIAware-Bench: Benchmarking Control Intervention Awareness Across Frontier LLMs
summary: AI control protocols oversee untrusted models by monitoring their actions and modifying potentially unsafe steps, often using a trusted model. This partially tampers with the untrusted model's trajectory. If the trusted model detects such an intervention, it may infer properties of the monitor and adapt to evade control. We introduce \textbf{CIAware-Bench}, a benchmark for measuring \textbf{c}ontrol \textbf{i}ntervention (CI) awareness across frontier models. CIAware-Bench tests whether models can distinguish their own trajectories from those modified by a control intervention. The benchmark is comprised of a suite of four task domains (essay writing, BigCodeBench, Bash Arena, and SHADE-Arena), while varying trajectory watermarking, side-task presence, and the control protocol. Evaluating eleven frontier models, we find low to moderate CI awareness under default settings (up to 0.87; random chance balanced binary classification accuracy is 0.5) with substantial variation across task domains and model pairs. Detection is generally easier across model families, suggesting that models exploit provider-specific differences in style or post-training. Overall, CI awareness is not a fixed model-level property, and should be measured for each new model release and deployment scenario. We release CIAware-Bench to track CI awareness and inform control protocols whose interventions are harder to detect.

AI.tldr: CIAware-Bench是一个用于测量前沿模型对控制干预(CI)感知能力的基准测试，评估AI模型能否区分自身轨迹与被控制干预修改后的轨迹。
AI.motivation: AI控制协议通过监控和修改不信任模型的行为来确保安全，但控制干预会修改模型轨迹。如果被信任模型检测到干预，它可能推断监控存在并规避控制。因此需要测量模型的CI感知能力。
AI.method: 在四个任务领域(论文写作、BigCodeBench、Bash Arena、SHADE-Arena)上评估11个前沿模型，测试模型区分自身轨迹与控制干预修改轨迹的能力，变化轨迹水印、 side-task存在和控制协议。
AI.result: 默认设置下CI感知能力较低至中等(最高0.87；二分类随机准确率为0.5)，不同任务领域和模型对之间存在显著差异。跨模型家族的检测通常更容易，表明模型利用提供商特定的风格或后训练差异。
AI.conclusion: CI感知不是固定的模型级属性，应针对每个新模型发布和部署场景进行测量。发布CIAware-Bench用于跟踪CI感知能力，并为设计更难被检测到干预的控制协议提供信息。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI safety and LLM control intervention awareness - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. The application domain is entirely different: this paper deals with AI alignment/safety for LLMs, while the research profile focuses on generating 3D human motion from text/video using video generation models, VLMs, and motion generation models. No mention of motion synthesis, visual feature extraction for motion, or any computer graphics tasks. The methods and application domain have zero overlap.

title: Using the YOLOv12 Model for Verifying the Correct Color Sequence of Wires in Network Cables (Patch Cords) on the Production Line
summary: In the production process of network cables, ensuring the correct color sequence of wire pairs inside the standard connector plays a critical role in the final performance of the cable, as any misplacement or color-ordering error can lead to defective products and impose significant costs. Traditional inspection methods based on visual examination through digital microscopes are typically time-consuming, tedious, and prone to human error. In this study, an intelligent system based on the twelfth version of the YOLO1 object detection model was developed to identify the position and verify the correct color sequence of wires in patch cords. The dataset used consisted of 2,500 images captured from microscopic views of network connectors, which were divided into 70% for training, 15% for validation, and 15% for testing. The proposed model, leveraging a single-stage architecture and attention mechanisms during learning, achieved highly accurate wire detection with approximately 98% precision. Additionally, the overall mean accuracy, classification precision, and recall were around 95%, 99%, and 98%, respectively. The results demonstrate that this system can reliably and in real time verify the correctness of wire color sequencing on the production line without the need for human intervention, thereby reducing human error and enhancing efficiency in the manufacturing process.

AI.tldr: 本研究开发了一种基于YOLO v12的智能检测系统，用于识别网络跳线中线对的颜色序列。系统使用2,500张网络连接器显微图像进行训练测试，最终达到约98%的检测精度、95%的平均准确率、99%的分类精度和98%的召回率，可实时验证线缆颜色序列正确性。
AI.motivation: 传统的网络电缆检测依赖人工使用数字显微镜进行视觉检查，这种方法耗时、繁琐且容易出错。线对颜色序列错误会导致产品缺陷，带来高昂成本。因此需要一种自动化、智能化的检测方案来提高检测效率和准确性。
AI.method: 研究采用YOLO v12目标检测模型，构建单阶段架构并融入注意力机制。数据集包含2,500张网络连接器显微图像，按70%训练、15%验证、15%测试进行划分。
AI.result: 模型实现了约98%的检测精度，整体平均准确率约95%，分类精度约99%，召回率约98%。
AI.conclusion: 该系统可可靠地实时验证生产线线缆颜色序列的正确性，无需人工干预，有效降低人为错误并提高制造业生产效率。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about industrial quality control/inspection for network cable color sequences using YOLO object detection - entirely different field from Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. The application domain (industrial inspection vs 3D human motion generation), the task (wire color detection vs text-to-motion synthesis), and the method usage (2D object detection for quality control vs video/VLM-based 3D motion generation) have no relevance to the research profile's pain points or methods.

title: A History-Aware Visually Grounded Critic for Computer Use Agents
summary: Various test-time interventions for Computer Use Agents (CUAs), including critic models, have been developed to improve performance through pre-execution action evaluation in complex Graphical User Interface (GUI) environments. However, existing critics suffer from two key limitations: they (1) focus primarily on short-sighted decision loops (e.g., forgetting earlier actions) and (2) lack the visual grounding needed to detect flawed actions (e.g., clicking wrong UI elements). To address these, we introduce HiViG, a History-aware Visually Grounded test-time framework, built around a multimodal critic trained on real GUI trajectories to abstract past interactions into a compact record and to evaluate actions with visual grounding. At test time, HiViG integrates the critic into the policy decision loop to provide macro-action history, which summarizes the policy's completed achievements, and visually grounded critique, which verifies raw execution coordinates against the current screenshot to intercept errors before execution.
