Across web, mobile, and desktop benchmarks, HiViG consistently outperforms existing scalar and verbal critics, improving average success rates over the strongest baseline by 5.8% for Qwen3-VL-32B and 9.0% for Gemini-3-Flash, and demonstrates strong cross-platform generalization. Ablations show that macro-action history mitigates short-sighted planning and visually grounded critique reduces execution errors, with both components being critical for test-time scaling in long-horizon GUI tasks.

AI.tldr: HiViG是一个针对计算机使用代理(CUA)的具有历史感知和视觉 grounding的测试时间框架，通过多模态批评器来改进复杂GUI环境中的动作评估。
AI.motivation: 现有批评器存在两个关键局限：1)聚焦短视决策循环(遗忘早期动作)；2)缺乏检测错误动作所需的视觉 grounding(如点击错误的UI元素)。
AI.method: HiViG框架包含：1)宏动作历史模块——将策略的已完成成就总结为紧凑记录；2)视觉 grounded批评模块——验证原始执行坐标与当前截图以拦截错误。在测试时将批评器集成到策略决策循环中，提供宏观动作历史和视觉 grounded批评。
AI.result: 在web、移动和桌面基准测试中，HiViG始终优于现有标量和 verbal批评器。相比最强基线，Qwen3-VL-32B平均成功率提升5.8%，Gemini-3-Flash提升9.0%，并展示强跨平台泛化能力。消融实验表明两个组件对长周期GUI任务的测试时间扩展都至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 宏动作历史缓解短视规划，视觉grounded批评减少执行错误，两者结合可显著提升CUA在复杂GUI任务中的性能。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Computer Use Agents (CUA) for GUI automation, which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. Although it uses VLMs and visual grounding, these methods are applied to a totally different application domain (UI/clicking error detection in GUI environments) vs the target domain (3D human motion generation from text/video). The pain points are entirely different - this paper addresses evaluating agent actions in GUI tasks, not extracting 3D visual guidance from video priors or cross-modal alignment for motion synthesis. This is a case of using similar methods (VLM) in a completely different application domain.

title: Vector Map as Language: Toward Unified Remote Sensing Vector Mapping
summary: Remote sensing vector mapping aims to generate structured maps of geospatial entities, such as buildings, roads, and water bodies, from remote sensing imagery. In practice, vector maps usually contain multiple category layers and heterogeneous entity structures, requiring a unified model for diverse mapping needs. However, existing methods typically represent vector objects as polygons or graphs, making them suitable only for specific categories: polygons poorly capture topological relations, while graphs often blur instance boundaries. We observe that language, as a natural medium for human communication, offers a flexible and expressive representation that can accommodate heterogeneous map elements, including geometry, semantics, and topolog. Motivated by this insight, we propose Vector Map as Language (VecLang), a unified paradigm that reformulates multiclass vector mapping as structured text generation. VecLang encodes the common elements of different geospatial entities into a GeoJSON-like vector language, enabling cross-category modeling within a shared textual format. To generate this language reliably, we design a progressive vision-language mapping framework that first localizes vectorization units and then generates structured map elements. We further introduce Hierarchical Vector Language Optimization, which uses reinforcement learning to improve syntax validity, content fidelity, and map executability. We also build VecMap-Bench with 54K images and 800K instances, supporting training and evaluation across standard and generalization settings. Extensive experiments demonstrate that VecLang handles both single-class and multiclass vector mapping while achieving strong cross-dataset and open-vocabulary generalization. The model and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/yyyyll0ss/VecLang.

AI.tldr: VecLang是一个统一的遥感矢量地图生成范式，将多类别矢量映射重新表述为结构化文本生成任务。该方法将不同地理空间实体的共同元素编码为类似GeoJSON的矢量语言，并设计渐进式视觉-语言映射框架进行生成。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感矢量映射方法存在局限性：多边形难以捕捉拓扑关系，图中实例边界模糊。不同类别的地图要素（建筑、道路、水体）具有异构结构，需要一个统一的模型来满足多样化的制图需求。
AI.method: 提出VecLang范式：1）将地理空间实体编码为GeoJSON-like矢量语言；2）设计渐进式视觉-语言映射框架，先定位矢量化单元，再生成结构化地图要素；3）引入层级矢量语言优化（HVLO），使用强化学习提升语法有效性、内容保真度和地图可执行性。
AI.result: VecMap-Bench数据集包含54K图像和800K实例。实验表明VecLang能同时处理单类别和多类别矢量映射，并实现强跨数据集和开放词汇泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 语言作为灵活的表达媒介，可以有效统一异构地图要素的表示。该方法为遥感矢量映射提供了新的统一范式，在多类别映射和泛化任务上展现出显著优势。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about remote sensing vector mapping (geospatial maps from satellite imagery), not computer graphics or text-to-motion. While it uses visual-language mapping concepts, the application domain is entirely different - geographic information systems, not human motion synthesis. The pain points (extracting 3D visual guidance from video, motion fidelity, cross-modal alignment for motion) are not addressed at all.

title: Monte Carlo Pass Search: Using Trajectory Generation for 3D Counterfactual Pass Evaluation in Football
summary: We recast pass evaluation in football (soccer) as a Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS)-like evaluation problem whose components mostly exist in the literature under different names: a value model (possession value), a world model (multi-agent trajectories with ball interactions), and a policy over counterfactual actions (sampling pass variants with noise). Building on the first public high-fidelity tracking dataset with 3D ball trajectories from the Bundesliga, we introduce Monte Carlo Pass Search (MCPS), which infers kick parameters for each observed pass, samples execution variants and option variants, rolls each candidate forward with a ball-conditioned world model until the next ball interaction, and scores outcomes with a learned value model to obtain a distribution over gained value. This distribution enables distribution-aware attribution with two complementary execution-surplus scores used for analysis and ranking: mean-based and percentile-based scores. To make the world model sample-efficient under limited public data, we adapt a discrete-token, autoregressive trajectory generator from autonomous driving (SMART) and show it yields strong best-of-20 forecasting accuracy compared to baselines, while supporting fully hypothetical rollouts for downstream evaluation. We have released model checkpoints and code.

AI.tldr: 本文提出蒙特卡洛传球搜索(MCPS)方法，将足球传球评估重新定义为类似蒙特卡洛树搜索的问题，利用基于Bundesliga首个公开的3D球轨迹高保真追踪数据集，构建包含价值模型、 world模型和反事实动作策略的评估框架，并提出分布感知的归因方法。
AI.motivation: 现有传球评估方法缺乏对传球执行变体和选项变体的系统性采样，且缺乏能够支持完全假设性推演的世界模型。作者旨在通过MCTS-like方法对传球进行更全面的评估，解决现有方法在数据有限情况下采样效率低的问题。
AI.method: MCPS方法包含三个核心组件：1)价值模型(possess value)用于评估球权价值；2)world模型(多智能体轨迹与球交互)用于前向推演；3)反事实动作策略(带噪声的传球变体采样)。为提高采样效率，作者适配了自动驾驶领域的离散token自回归轨迹生成器SMART。评估采用两种分布感知归因分数：均值基和百分位基分数。
AI.result: SMART模型在best-of-20预测任务上相比基线方法展现出较强的预测精度，能够支持完全假设性推演用于下游评估。两种分布感知归因分数可用于分析和排名。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功将MCTS框架应用于足球传球评估，创建了首个基于Bundesliga 3D球轨迹数据的公开数据集和评估方法。MCPS方法为足球传球分析提供了新的思路，释放的模型检查点和代码有助于后续研究。

relevance_reason: This paper is about football pass evaluation using trajectory generation - completely outside the Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion domain. While it uses trajectory generation (SMART), the application is sports analytics (football) not human motion synthesis. It doesn't address any of the profile's pain points: no VLM-based quality supervision, no cross-modal text-video-motion alignment, no 2D video to 3D feature extraction, and no motion naturalness synthesis. The paper deals with ball trajectories in soccer, not human motion generation required for text-to-motion tasks.

title: Patient-Level Diagnosis of Acute Myeloid Leukemia via Deep Learning Analysis of Bone Marrow Smear
summary: Bone marrow smear review remains important for acute myeloid leukemia (AML) assessment, but manual single-cell interpretation is labor-intensive and patient-level diagnosis requires aggregation of many cellular observations. We present a cell-to-patient deep learning pipeline for AML-assisted diagnosis from bone marrow smear images. The study included 258 patients from six anonymized centers, including a main cohort of 169 patients from Centers 1-3 and an external validation cohort of 89 patients from Centers 4-6. A 16-category cell annotation vocabulary was used to describe the global cellular composition, including granulocytic, monocytic, erythroid, lymphoid, eosinophilic, and other cells. Rather than identifying strict AML blasts or leukemic blasts, the model targets an expert-defined composite category termed Composite Blast-like Cells (CBLC), comprising N, N1, M, M1, R, R1, J, and J1 according to the project-wide morphological standard. A fixed YOLO-based segmentation module detected cells, predicted contours were matched to expert polygon annotations by contour IoU, and standardized single-cell crops were generated. An EfficientNet-B0 classifier was trained through a two-stage GT-to-YOLO and YOLO-to-YOLO strategy with class-imbalance correction, center-border regularization, and morphology-assisted supervision. Cell-level predictions were aggregated into patient-level CBLC ratios for AML-oriented diagnostic support. The pipeline achieved stable internal validation and maintained external generalization, with ensemble weighted F1-scores of 0.9076, 0.8696, and 0.9124 on Centers 4, 5, and 6, respectively.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种从骨髓涂片图像进行急性 myeloid 白血病（AML）辅助诊断的深度学习 pipeline，包含细胞分割、分类和患者级诊断 aggregation。
AI.motivation: 手动单细胞解读劳动密集型，需要将许多细胞观察 aggregation 到患者级诊断，亟需自动化辅助工具。
AI.method: 使用 YOLO 进行细胞分割，EfficientNet-B0 分类器进行分类，采用两阶段训练策略、类不平衡校正、中心边界正则化和形态学辅助监督，将细胞级预测 aggregation 为患者级 CBLC 比率。
AI.result: 在内部验证和外部泛化中表现稳定， Centers 4-6 的集成加权 F1 分数分别达到 0.9076、0.8696 和 0.9124。
AI.conclusion: 该 pipeline 可为 AML 导向的诊断支持提供稳定可靠的辅助工具，具有良好的跨中心泛化能力。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about medical image analysis for leukemia diagnosis from bone marrow smears, using YOLO and EfficientNet. It has no connection to Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion. The application domain is entirely different - medical diagnosis vs. human motion generation/synthesis. Even though it uses image segmentation (YOLO), this is used for cell detection in medical images, not for extracting visual guidance features for motion synthesis.

title: ABC-Bench: An Agentic Bio-Capabilities Benchmark for Biosecurity
comment: 18 pages. To be published in ICML 2026
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are rapidly acquiring capabilities relevant to biological research, from literature synthesis to interpretation of experimental data. Increasingly, LLM agents can also perform in silico biology tasks that previously required experienced human biologists. These emerging AI capabilities offer new opportunities for scientific discovery and biomedical advances, but they also shift the landscape of biosecurity risks. To address this, we introduce the Agentic Bio-Capabilities Benchmark (ABC-Bench), a suite of tasks to measure agentic biosecurity-relevant capabilities. ABC-Bench evaluates LLM agents on both benign and dual-use biology tasks: writing code to operate liquid handling robots, designing DNA fragments for in vitro assembly, and evading DNA synthesis screening. These tasks require a combination of biology and software expertise. All tested LLM agents outperformed the median expert human baseliner on all three tasks. Agents performed highly on tasks drawing on published knowledge and well-documented protocols, and more weakly on a task requiring novel bioinformatics reasoning. In three wet-lab validation experiments, we found that OpenAI's o4-mini-high produced scripts that, when run on an OpenTrons liquid handling robot, successfully assembled DNA with expected sequences.

AI.tldr: ABC-Bench是一个评估大语言模型(LLM)代理在生物安全相关任务中能力的基准测试套件，涵盖液体处理机器人操作、DNA片段设计和合成筛选规避等任务，所有测试的LLM代理均超过人类专家基准线。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM在生物研究领域的能力迅速增强，从文献综合到实验数据解释，这些AI能力为科学发现提供了新机遇，但也转移了生物安全风险的前景，因此需要系统性地评估这些代理的生物安全相关能力。
AI.method: 构建了包含三项任务的ABC-Bench基准测试套件，评估LLM代理执行良性及双重用途生物学任务的能力，并在OpenTrons液体处理机器人上进行了三项湿实验室验证实验。
AI.result: 所有测试的LLM代理在三项任务上都超过了人类专家的中位数基准线；代理在基于已发表知识和详细协议的任务上表现较高，而在需要新型生物信息学推理的任务上表现较弱；o4-mini-high生成的脚本成功组装了预期序列的DNA。
AI.conclusion: LLM代理已经具备了执行曾需要经验丰富的生物学家完成的实验室任务的能力，这既带来了科学发现的机遇，也带来了生物安全风险，需要持续关注和评估。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about evaluating LLM agents for biosecurity tasks (DNA design, liquid handling robots, synthetic screening evasion) - an entirely different field from Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. The application domain is biosecurity/biological research automation, not motion generation. Despite mentioning VLMs in the research profile, this paper focuses on Large Language Models for biological tasks, not vision-language models for video-to-motion or text-to-motion generation.

title: DD-INR: Dynamics-Driven Implicit Neural Representation for Accelerated Whole-Brain Functional MRI Reconstruction
summary: Accelerated acquisition of fMRI enables enhanced detection of neurovascular (BOLD) activity in the brain, but image reconstruction becomes challenging with high k-space undersampling: Task-evoked BOLD signals are small in magnitude, which traditional anatomical MRI reconstruction methods fail to recover, as they favor spatial accuracy over temporal fidelity. We present DD-INR, a Dynamics-Driven Implicit Neural Representation framework tailored for accelerated fMRI that benefits from incoherent time-varying sampling and a tailored spatiotemporal prior, outperforming traditional methods, demonstrated in simulation and in-vivo acquisition, both in terms of image quality and retrieval of activation patterns. DD-INR achieves this by splitting the fMRI data into a static background and a temporally varying dynamic component, representing only the dynamics with a dedicated INR, thereby focusing the model's capacity on activation-relevant changes while remaining compact. In general, DD-INR provides a promising framework for accelerated fMRI reconstruction, with the potential to improve the sensitivity and robustness of fMRI studies within practical scan time limits. The source code is available at https://github.com/JoosenLi/DD-INR.

AI.tldr: DD-INR是一种用于加速fMRI重建的隐式神经表示框架，通过将fMRI数据分离为静态背景和动态成分，仅对动态部分进行建模，从而在小信号恢复和激活模式检测上优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 加速fMRI采集会导致高k空间欠采样，传统解剖MRI重建方法重视空间精度而忽视时间 fidelity，无法有效恢复微小的任务诱发BOLD信号。
AI.method: DD-INR采用不连贯的时变采样和定制的时空先验，将fMRI数据分解为静态背景和动态变化两部分，仅用专门的INR表示动态成分，使模型容量集中于激活相关的变化。
AI.result: 在模拟和活体采集实验中，DD-INR在图像质量和激活模式检索方面均优于传统方法，提升了加速fMRI重建的性能。
AI.conclusion: DD-INR为加速fMRI重建提供了有前景的框架，有望在实际扫描时间内提高fMRI研究的敏感性和鲁棒性。源代码已公开。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. Paper is about fMRI medical imaging reconstruction for neuroscience, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion generation. The methods (INR for medical signals) and goals (BOLD signal recovery) have no relevance to generating human motion from text/video inputs.

title: ReasonAlloc: Hierarchical Decoding-Time KV Cache Budget Allocation for Reasoning Models
summary: Long chain-of-thought (CoT) trajectories in large language model (LLM) reasoning cause severe inference bottlenecks due to rapid key-value (KV) cache growth. Current decoding-time compression methods mitigate this issue via token eviction, but typically assume a uniform budget distribution across all layers and heads. In contrast, existing non-uniform budget allocation methods are predominantly designed for the static prompt prefill phase, and they do not capture the stepwise context demands of autoregressive reasoning. To bridge this gap, we propose ReasonAlloc, a training-free framework that recasts decoding-time KV compression as a hierarchical budget allocation problem. ReasonAlloc operates at two complementary levels: an offline layer-wise preallocation strategy captures an architecture-driven demand pattern which we call ``\textit{Reasoning Wave}'', while an online head-wise strategy reallocates resources during decoding to information-rich heads based on real-time utility. Evaluations on mathematical reasoning benchmarks (MATH-500, AIME~2024) using DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B, DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-14B, and AceReason-14B show that ReasonAlloc outperforms uniform-budget R-KV, SnapKV, and Pyramid-RKV (a baseline enforcing a static, monotonically decreasing layer budget), with the largest gains at small budgets (128-512 tokens). ReasonAlloc is plug-and-play with existing token-eviction policies and introduces negligible inference-time overhead.

AI.tldr: ReasonAlloc是一个无需训练的框架，通过分层预算分配解决LLM推理中CoT轨迹导致的KV缓存快速膨胀问题。
AI.motivation: 当前解码时压缩方法假设预算在各层和各头均匀分布，而现有非均匀分配方法仅适用于静态提示填充阶段，无法捕捉自回归推理的逐步上下文需求。
AI.method: 提出ReasonAlloc框架，包含两个层次：1) 离线层-wise预分配策略，捕捉"推理波"架构驱动需求模式；2) 在线head-wise策略，基于实时效用在解码期间重新分配资源到信息丰富的头。
AI.result: 在MATH-500和AIME2024基准上，使用DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B等模型，ReasonAlloc优于uniform-budget R-KV、SnapKV和Pyramid-RKV，在小预算(128-512 tokens)下提升最大。
AI.conclusion: ReasonAlloc可即插即用现有token驱逐策略，引入极低推理开销，为LLM推理的KV缓存压缩提供了新的分层预算分配思路。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about LLM/NLP optimization (KV cache compression for reasoning models), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion generation. The methods (KV cache allocation for LLMs vs video/VLM-based motion generation) are unrelated. No overlap in pain points or methodology.

title: ZODS-RS -- Zero-training Oriented Detection & Segmentation for Remote Sensing
summary: Remote-sensing and UAV applications need models that generalize across platforms and viewpoints without task-specific training. Yet training-free pipelines often falter on oriented geometry, scale/rotation variation, and crowded ports or airfields, and rarely unify detection and segmentation. We introduce ZODS-RS, a training-free, closed-form pipeline that outputs horizontal boxes (HBB) and instance masks. Built on DINOv3 dense features and SAM-style proposals, ZODS-RS chains: PP (prototype purification via Tyler covariance), R-SEM (rotation-scale equivariant matching with separable kernels and global Hungarian assignment), and UAM (uncertainty-aware pixelwise merging with adaptive priors and optional negative prototypes). A lightweight CWLA fuses multiple DINOv3 layers. On FAIR1M (HBB) we obtain $\mathrm{mAP}_{0.50:0.95}=\mathbf{13.06}$ and $\mathrm{AP}_S=\mathbf{2.93}$ \emph{(class-averaged over ship/airplane)}; on xView (HBB) we report $\mathrm{mAP}=\mathbf{16.69}$. On our UAV dataset, ZODS-RS achieves mask $\mathrm{mIoU}=\mathbf{31.10}$ and improves small-object AP by $\mathbf{+30.70}$ over Grounded-SAM on a single 5090. This work offers a unified, \emph{no-training} solution for horizontal-box detection plus instance segmentation in aerial imagery; provides explicit closed-form formulations for PP/R-SEM/UAM tightly coupled with DINOv3; and demonstrates \emph{consistent} gains on small and crowded targets and under cross-domain shifts while keeping deployment simple.

AI.tldr: 提出了ZODS-RS，一个无需训练的闭式管道，用于航空图像中的水平框检测和实例分割。该方法基于DINOv3密集特征和SAM风格提议，通过原型提纯(PP)、旋转-尺度等变匹配(R-SEM)和不确定性感知像素级合并(UAM)三个级联模块实现统一检测与分割。
AI.motivation: 现有训练-free管道在定向几何、尺度/旋转变化和密集场景(港口/机场)中表现不佳，缺乏统一的检测和分割解决方案。遥感与无人机应用需要跨平台、跨视角泛化且无需任务特定训练的模型。
AI.method: ZODS-RS管道包含四个核心组件：1) CWLA轻量级跨加权层聚合融合多层DINOv3特征；2) PP原型提纯模块使用Tyler协方差净化特征；3) R-SEM旋转-尺度等变匹配采用可分离核和全局匈牙利分配；4) UAM不确定性感知像素级合并结合自适应先验和可选负原型。最终输出水平框(HBB)和实例掩膜。
AI.result: 在FAIR1M上获得mAP_0.50:0.95=13.06和AP_S=2.93(船/飞机类别平均)；xView上mAP=16.69；UAV数据集上掩膜mIoU=31.10，小目标AP比Grounded-SAM提升+30.70。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了航空图像中无需训练的的水平框检测+实例分割统一解决方案，展示了小目标和密集场景以及跨域迁移的持续增益，同时保持部署简单。明确给出了PP/R-SEM/UAM的闭式公式并与DINOv3紧密耦合。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion from text/video), while the paper is about Remote Sensing - Detection & Segmentation (object detection in aerial images). No overlap in application domain, pain points, or methods. The paper uses DINOv3 and SAM for image detection, not video generation, VLM, or motion generation models. These are entirely unrelated research areas.

title: The Role of Feedback Alignment in Self-Distillation
comment: Accepted to the ICML 2026 Workshop on RL from World Feedback (RLxF)
summary:
Conditioning a language model on additional context, such as feedback on a previous attempt, typically improves its response. Self-distillation trains the model to retain this improvement when the context is not present. The method works by matching the model's output distribution under two settings: a student that sees only the question, and a self-teacher that also sees the context. What the model learns therefore depends on what context the self-teacher receives, yet the design of this context remains largely unexplored.
  We study context design for self-distillation by training a solver on feedback from a frozen critic. We compare three conditions: (i) a binary reward (GRPO), (ii) the reference solution, and (iii) a step-by-step critique aligned to the solver's reasoning trace.
  Step-aligned critique yields the largest gains, outperforming GRPO by 16.11 points and reference-solution-conditioned self-distillation by 5.27 points (Avg@12). Per-token advantage analysis reveals why: step-aligned feedback targets only the tokens where reasoning fails, leaving correct behavior intact. Conditioning on the reference solution, by contrast, pressures the model to change its behavior at every token (even correct steps) because an alternative derivation inevitably differs in phrasing and approach. This suggests that structural alignment between feedback and the solver's reasoning is a key driver of self-distillation effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了自蒸馏（self-distillation）方法中上下文（context）的设计问题。自蒸馏通过让模型学习"学生模式"（仅看问题）和"自教师模式"（同时看上下文）的输出分布匹配来保留上下文增强能力。研究对比了三种上下文条件：二元奖励（GRPO）、参考解答、以及与解题推理步骤对齐的分步批判。结果显示，分步批判对齐效果最好，比GRPO高16.11分，比参考解答条件高5.27分。原因是分步批判只针对推理失败的 token 进行反馈，而参考解答会迫使模型改变所有 token 的行为即使推理正确。
AI.motivation: 自蒸馏方法虽然有效，但上下文（context）的设计选择尚未被充分探索。之前的研究主要关注如何训练，而忽视了给自教师提供什么样的上下文这一关键设计问题。
AI.method: 作者训练了一个solver（解题模型），使用冻结的critic（批判模型）提供的反馈进行自蒸馏训练。对比了三种上下文条件：(i) GRPO二元奖励；(ii) 参考解答；(iii) 与solver推理轨迹对齐的分步批判。并使用per-token advantage分析来理解不同上下文的效果差异。
AI.result: 分步批判对齐（step-aligned critique）取得了最大收益，在Avg@12指标上比GRPO高16.11分，比参考解答条件高5.27分。Per-token advantage分析揭示了原因：分步批判只针对推理失败的token进行反馈，而参考解答条件会迫使模型改变所有token的行为，因为替代推导过程在措辞和方法上必然不同。
AI.conclusion: 反馈与模型推理之间的结构对齐（structural alignment）是自蒸馏效果的关键驱动因素。设计上下文时应该让反馈针对推理中具体的错误点，而非提供完整的替代方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about self-distillation in language models for mathematical reasoning tasks - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and Text-to-Motion. The application domain is entirely different: NLP/LLM training vs 3D motion generation. While both involve "training" and "models," the methods and goals are in fundamentally different research fields with no overlap in application domains.

title: Spatially Selective Self-Training for Unsupervised Building Change Detection
summary:
Unsupervised building change detection aims to learn building-change masks from unlabeled bi-temporal remote sensing images. Existing label-free methods often follow a discrepancy-to-mask paradigm, directly using temporal differences, frozen foundation-model responses, prompt-based outputs, or post-processing results as final change maps. Although these strategies provide annotation-free cues, they do not learn a task-specific building-change detector and remain vulnerable to the gap between generic temporal discrepancies and building-defined structural changes. In practice, such discrepancies are often noisy and task-irrelevant, as appearance shifts, registration errors, and non-building modifications can produce strong but misleading responses. To address this problem, we propose SST-CD, a spatially selective self-training framework that reformulates fully label-free building change detection as end-to-end detector learning under noisy pseudo supervision.
  SST-CD uses temporal discrepancies as candidate pseudo labels and trains the detector only on spatially reliable pixels, whose reliability is estimated by a local consistency criterion that filters inconsistent regions from supervision. To further stabilize noisy self-training, a lightweight feature adapter recalibrates bi-temporal features, while a prototype-based decoder produces compact change and no-change representations. Experiments on LEVIR-CD, WHU-CD, and DSIFN-CD show that SST-CD achieves F1 scores of 83.08\%, 91.69\%, and 86.60\%, respectively, outperforming existing unsupervised and label-free baselines. Code will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: SST-CD是一种新型的无监督建筑变化检测框架，通过空间选择自训练机制，利用时态差异作为伪标签，仅在空间可靠的像素上训练检测器，并引入特征适配器和原型解码器提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督建筑变化检测方法存在两个关键问题：1）直接使用时态差异、冻结模型响应或后处理结果作为变化图，未学习任务特定的检测器；2）通用时态差异与建筑结构变化之间存在较大差距，噪声（如外观变化、注册误差、非建筑修改）会产生误导性响应。
AI.method: 提出SST-CD框架，包含三个核心组件：1）时态差异作为候选伪标签；2）局部一致性标准估计像素可靠性，过滤不一致区域；3）轻量级特征适配器重新校准双时态特征；4）基于原型的解码器产生紧凑的变化和无变化表示。框架将无标签建筑变化检测重新表述为端到端的噪声自训练问题。
AI.result: 在LEVIR-CD、WHU-CD和DSIFN-CD三个标准数据集上验证，F1分数分别达到83.08%、91.69%和86.60%，优于现有的无监督和label-free方法。
AI.conclusion: SST-CD通过空间选择自训练范式有效解决了无监督建筑变化检测中噪声伪标签的问题，显著提升了检测精度，为无标注遥感图像的建筑变化检测提供了新的有效方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about unsupervised building change detection in remote sensing imagery, which is completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion field. The application domain is entirely different: building change detection from satellite images vs. generating human motion from text/video. While both use computer vision techniques, the goals and contexts are fundamentally different - this paper addresses remote sensing/urban monitoring problems, not motion synthesis or cross-modal alignment for character animation.

title: From Patches to Patients: A study of the tile-to-slide performance transferability in Digital Pathology
summary: Foundation Models (FMs) have recently redefined the state-of-the-art in histopathology by providing robust representations for whole-slide image (WSI) analysis. However, selecting the optimal foundation model (FM) for a specific clinical cohort currently requires multiple preprocessing steps, followed by computationally expensive feature extraction and the training of a Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) aggregator for every model. In this work, we investigate whether efficient tile-level linear probing can serve as a reliable proxy for slide-level performance, reducing the need to run full slide-level pipelines for every candidate encoder. We benchmark 19 state-of-the-art FMs on 42 slide-level and 16 tile-level tasks, comparing tile probing metrics against slide-level outcomes using ABMIL and Mean Pooling aggregations. We observe a high correlation between tile and slide performance across varying task difficulties, indicating that encoder representation quality is the primary determinant of WSI success. Sensitivity analyses show that transferability is stable across models and is more influenced by cohort sizes and numbers of tiles per slide than by average task difficulty. We also measure the agreement in best performing models between tile and slide-level tasks, showing tile benchmarks reliably shortlist strong candidates. Overall, our study indicates that tile-level benchmarking provides an efficient and practical first step for narrowing down candidate models, while slide-level evaluation remains essential for final validation on clinical tasks.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了 tile-level 线性探测是否能作为 slide-level 性能的可靠代理，以减少在选择最佳基础模型时的计算成本。研究对19个最先进的基础模型在42个 slide-level 任务和16个 tile-level 任务上进行了基准测试。
AI.motivation: 当前选择最佳基础模型需要多个预处理步骤、计算昂贵的特征提取以及为每个模型训练完整的 MIL 聚合器。研究旨在确定高效的 tile-level 线性探测是否可以作为 slide-level 性能的可靠代理，从而减少全流程运行的需要。
AI.method: 研究对19个 SOTA 基础模型在42个 slide-level 任务和16个 tile-level 任务上进行了基准测试，使用 ABMIL 和 Mean Pooling 聚合方法比较 tile 探测指标与 slide-level 性能之间的相关性。
AI.result: 研究观察到 tile 和 slide 性能之间存在高度相关性，表明编码器表示质量是 WSI 成功的决定性因素。敏感性分析显示迁移性在不同模型间稳定，更受队列大小和每张幻灯片 tile 数量的影响。tile 基准测试能够可靠地筛选出最佳模型候选。
AI.conclusion: Tile-level 基准测试为缩小候选模型范围提供了高效实用的第一步，而 slide-level 评估仍是临床任务最终验证的必要步骤。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about Digital Pathology/Medical Imaging - benchmarking tile-level vs slide-level performance for whole slide images in cancer detection. The application domain is entirely different from Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. While both may use machine learning, the medical pathology domain has no connection to motion generation, video priors, cross-modal alignment for motion synthesis, or any of the methods mentioned in the research profile (Video Generation Models, VLM, 3D Motion Generation). This is a medical computing paper with no relevance to text-to-motion generation.

title: A Multimodal RGB and Events Dataset for Hand Detection in First-Person View
summary: Existing hand detection algorithms work on images and the detection rate is restricted by the frame rate of the camera. In hand detection applications for moving robotic systems, conventional cameras cause motion blur, especially in darker lighting conditions. We can leverage the use of event-based cameras which possess a high dynamic range, high temporal resolution, and low power consumption. Recent work has shown that using a stereo setup of an event-based and a frame-based camera improves detection accuracy and the bandwidth-latency tradeoff. The main bottleneck in using event-based cameras in object detection and recognition tasks is a relatively low amount of training data. In this work, we propose a methodology and an exemplary synthetic event-based hand dataset from an egocentric, first-person view perspective. The data is synthesized from the existing RGB Egohands dataset with the v2e toolbox. Parameters of the v2e toolbox are varied to provide versions of the dataset with different lighting conditions and scales. Ground truth detections are generated with a fine-tuned YOLOv8 model which is applied to the RGB images in the Egohands dataset and interpolated on the high-temporal resolution events. We use the multi-modal dataset to perform hand detection with existing object detection algorithms which use a multi-modal setup of event and RGB cameras and demonstrate performance comparable to the state-of-the-art.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于事件相机的合成手势检测数据集生成方法，解决了事件相机在目标检测任务中训练数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有手势检测算法受限于相机帧率，在移动机器人系统中传统相机尤其在低光环境下会产生运动模糊。事件相机具有高动态范围、高时间分辨率和低功耗优点，但用于目标检测时面临训练数据相对不足的主要瓶颈。
AI.method: 从现有RGB Egohands数据集使用v2e工具箱合成事件数据，通过变化参数提供不同光照条件和尺度的数据集版本。使用微调的YOLOv8模型在RGB图像上生成真实标注并插值到高时间分辨率事件上，采用事件相机和RGB相机的多模态设置进行手势检测。
AI.result: 使用多模态数据集进行手势检测，实现了与最先进方法相当的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可有效用于手势检测任务，为事件相机在机器人视觉系统中的应用提供了新的数据生成途径。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses hand detection in first-person view using event cameras, which is completely different from the Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion field. While both involve visual processing, this paper focuses on object detection (hand detection) for robotics applications, not motion generation, synthesis, or any text-to-motion/ video-to-motion tasks. The methods (YOLOv8, event camera data) and application domain (robotics perception) have no overlap with the research profile's pain points about cross-modal alignment between text, video, and 3D motion representations, or methods like video generation models and VLM for motion synthesis.

title: SCAIL-2: Unifying Controlled Character Animation with End-to-end In-Context Conditioning
summary: Controlled character animation requires transferring motion from a driving sequence to a reference character. Prior works heavily rely on intermediate representations, including pose skeletons to represent motion or masked background to represent environment, which inevitably leads to information loss. To address this, we present SCAIL-2, an framework that bypasses those intermediates and achieves \textbf{end-to-end} character animation. By directly concatenating driving videos to the sequence, the model can obtain all the required visual information from the input video. To address lack of end-to-end data, we unify sub-tasks of character animation with decoupled conditions and then curate a pipeline to synthesize MotionPair-60K, an end-to-end motion transfer dataset containing heterogeneous tasks of character animation. To archive the unification, we utilize in-context mask conditioning and mode-specific RoPE as soft guidance beyond textual instructions and raw visual information. To address synthetic discrepancy in detailed regions, we propose Bias-Aware DPO to construct preference items to mitigate the errors. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method substantially outperforms existing state-of-the-art approaches in various character animation tasks. A large subset of synthetic data as well as model weights will be released at our project page: https://teal024.github.io/SCAIL-2/.

AI.tldr: SCAIL-2是一个端到端的角色动画框架,直接使用驱动视频作为输入,无需中间表示(如姿态骨架或遮罩背景),避免信息丢失。为解决端到端训练数据不足的问题,构建了MotionPair-60K数据集,并提出偏置感知DPO方法减少合成数据差异。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖于中间表示(姿态骨架、遮罩背景等)来表征运动或环境,这不可避免地导致信息丢失。作者希望实现真正的端到端角色动画,直接从输入视频获取所有需要的视觉信息。
AI.method: 1) 端到端框架:直接将驱动视频与参考角色序列连接获取视觉信息;2) 构建MotionPair-60K数据集:统一角色动画子任务,使用上下文遮罩条件和特定模式RoPE作为软指导;3) 偏置感知DPO:构造偏好数据缓解合成数据与真实数据的差异。
AI.result: 在各种角色动画任务上显著优于现有的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SCAIL-2成功实现了端到端角色动画,通过合成数据集和偏置感知DPO有效解决了训练数据不足和域差异问题,为角色动画领域提供了新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: The paper is about Video-to-Motion/Character Animation (using driving video to animate reference character), while the research profile is about Text-to-Motion (generating 3D motion from text). These are different application domains. SCAIL-2 addresses video-driven character animation, not text-based motion generation. The pain points and methods also don't align - the profile focuses on VLM-based quality supervision and cross-modal text-video-motion alignment, while SCAIL-2 uses bias-aware DPO without text or VLM components. Both involve video and motion but serve fundamentally different purposes.

title: Deep learning for echo sounder data
summary: There is no doubt that over the last decade, techniques from the field of machine learning have revolutionized how we process and interpret data, especially images and text. For underwater observations acoustics is a primary source of information, and naturally, deep learning methods have been applied to echograms and other acoustics data, but so far with rather modest results. Here, we argue that due to intrinsic properties of acoustic data, substantial advances will likely require research into deep learning methods beyond mere recycling of models and techniques from image processing. Currently, the potential for breakthroughs in method development is hindered by the lack of standard data formats and organization, and even more by the lack of readily available, high quality data sets with established performance goals. To advance the field, these shortcomings should be remedied

AI.tldr: 本文是一篇关于深度学习在水声学数据处理中应用的观点论文，指出当前该领域进展缓慢的原因，并呼吁建立标准数据格式和高质量数据集以推动技术突破。
AI.motivation: 过去十年机器学习在图像和文本处理领域取得革命性进展，但深度学习方法应用于声学数据（如回声图）时效果却不尽如人意。作者认为这并非技术本身的问题，而是需要针对声学数据的独特性质开发专门的深度学习方法。
AI.method: 本文采用观点论述和现状分析的方法，论证了为什么现有图像处理模型和技术不能简单迁移到声学数据处理领域，并指出了当前研究面临的主要障碍。
AI.result: 本文指出当前深度学习在水声学领域进展受限的两个关键问题：一是缺乏标准数据格式和组织结构；二是缺乏高质量、可用的标注数据集以及明确的性能评估目标。
AI.conclusion: 作者呼吁学界优先解决数据标准化和数据集建设这两个基础问题，认为这是实现深度学习在水声学领域取得突破性进展的必要前提。

relevance_reason: This paper is about deep learning for echo sounder data in underwater acoustics - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics Text-to-Motion. The application domain is entirely different (acoustic signal processing vs motion generation), the methods are unrelated (general acoustic data processing vs video/VLM-based motion generation), and it addresses none of the pain points (cross-modal alignment, motion naturalness, visual guidance extraction). This is a position paper about data standardization in underwater acoustics, not computer graphics or motion synthesis.

title: Earth-OneVision: Extending Remote Sensing Multimodal Large Language Models to More Sensor Modalities and Tasks
summary: RS-MLLMs enable natural-language understanding and spatial reasoning over earth observation imagery. However, existing models support only a narrow range of sensor types and tasks, yielding a fragmented view of the earth and leaving cross-modal geoscientific knowledge largely unexploited. This work presents Earth-OneVision, a 2B RS-MLLM that unifies six sensor modalities (i.e., optical, SAR, infrared, multispectral, temporal, and video) and cross-sensor fusion across 9 task categories within a single autoregressive framework. Three dedicated mechanisms address three bottlenecks. Full-Granularity Vision-Language Alignment (FGVLA) aligns multi-level visual features with the multi-dimensional language space. Spatial-Linguistic Isomorphic Serialization (SLIS) unifies heterogeneous spatial outputs as autoregressive tokens. Progressive Cross-Modality Adaptation (PCMA) decomposes the compound domain gap into sequential stages, tackling the viewpoint and imaging physics gaps in turn. To support joint training, MMRS-OneVision is constructed with ~34M QA pairs spanning all six sensor modalities and cross-sensor fusion across 9 task categories, substantially exceeding existing RS multimodal instruction datasets. With only 2B parameters, Earth-OneVision achieves competitive or state-of-the-art results across extensive benchmarks, consistently matching or outperforming 4B-72B RS-MLLMs. It achieves 87.52% P@0.5 on the OPT-RSVG testset for optical visual grounding and 80.68% on the SAR VQA benchmark SARLANG-Bench, exceeding 7B models by over 7%. It further achieves 75.74% recall on the BigEarthNet-MS testset for multispectral classification, and 81.94% MCQ accuracy on EarthMind-Bench for cross-modality reasoning.

AI.tldr: Earth-OneVision是一个2B参数的遥感多模态语言模型(RS-MLLM)，统一了6种传感器模态和9个任务类别，通过全粒度视觉语言对齐(FGVLA)、空间语言同构序列化(SLIS)和渐进跨模态适应(PCMA)三种机制解决跨模态融合难题。
AI.motivation: 现有RS-MLLMs仅支持狭窄范围的传感器类型和任务，导致对地球的视图碎片化，跨模态地球科学知识未得到充分利用。
AI.method: 提出三种专用机制：(1)FGVLA将多级视觉特征与多维语言空间对齐；(2)SLIS将异构空间输出统一为自回归token；(3)PCMA将复合域差距分解为顺序阶段解决视角和成像物理差距。构建MMRS-OneVision数据集，包含约34M QA对。
AI.result: 仅用2B参数在多项基准测试中达到竞争力或最先进结果：在OPT-RSVG光学视觉 grounding达到87.52% P@0.5；在SARLANG-Bench SAR VQA达到80.68%，超过7B模型7%+；在BigEarthNet-MS多光谱分类达到75.74%召回率；在EarthMind-Bench跨模态推理达到81.94% MCQ准确率。
AI.conclusion: Earth-OneVision成功统一了多种传感器模态和任务，在仅2B参数规模下实现了与4B-72B模型相当或更优的性能，证明了轻量级模型通过有效设计可在遥感领域取得先进水平。

relevance_reason: Complete application domain mismatch. This paper is about Remote Sensing Multimodal LLMs for satellite image analysis (SAR, optical, multispectral), not Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion generation. While both papers involve VLMs, the application domains are entirely different - remote sensing image classification/understanding vs 3D human motion synthesis from text. The paper addresses earth observation tasks like visual grounding and VQA for satellite imagery, which has no relevance to text-to-motion generation, video-to-motion extraction, or motion naturalness in synthesis.

title: HarmoView: Harmonizing Multi-View Constraints for Identity-Consistent Video Generation
summary: Current identity-consistent video generation methods struggle to preserve appearance fidelity under large viewpoint changes. While introducing multi-view reference input offers a natural solution, progress remains constrained by the lack of effective frameworks for multi-view inputs and the scarcity of multi-view data. We address these challenges by proposing HarmoView, a robust framework for identity-consistent video generation that effectively integrates multi-view cues through three architectural refinements complemented by a staged training curriculum. Specifically, we first introduce Multi-level Feature Injection to anchor identity fidelity; by injecting raw ViT features from frontal references alongside text tokens via cross-attention, MFI provides persistent low-level appearance anchors that complement the high-level identity features within DiT blocks, leading to enhanced identity preservation. Then, we employ learnable proxy tokens to unify heterogeneous reference layouts across single-/multi-view settings while simultaneously resolving the reference-view mismatch problem. Jump-RoPE is further developed for identity-wise feature isolation to reduce identity crosstalk. To activate these structural capabilities while preserving the original generative priors, we propose the Progressive View Curriculum. This four-stage training strategy employs view dropout to facilitate a stable transition from vanilla T2V generation to high-fidelity, identity-persistent spatial reasoning. Furthermore, we construct a large-scale multi-view dataset to address the issue of data scarcity. Extensive evaluation on our multi-view benchmark, comprising 100 manually-curated cases spanning 52 unique identities, demonstrates that HarmoView significantly outperforms open-source baselines and matches leading closed-source engines, achieving state-of-the-art performance in identity-consistent video generation.

AI.tldr: HarmoView是一个用于身份一致视频生成的新型框架，通过多级特征注入、可学习代理token和Jump-RoPE等架构改进，结合渐进式视角课程训练策略，有效解决大视角变化下身份保真度保持的难题。
AI.motivation: 当前身份一致视频生成方法在大视角变化下难以保持外观保真度，多视角输入虽为自然解决方案，但缺乏有效框架和多视角数据，导致研究进展受限。
AI.method: 提出三项架构改进：1)多级特征注入(MFI)通过交叉注意力将原始ViT特征与文本token注入DiT块；2)可学习代理token统一单/多视角参考布局并解决视角不匹配问题；3)Jump-RoPE实现身份特征隔离。采用四阶段渐进式视角课程训练策略配合视角dropout，并构建大规模多视角数据集。
AI.result: 在包含100个案例(52个独特身份)的多视角基准测试上，HarmoView显著优于开源基线方法，达到与领先闭源引擎相当的性能，实现身份一致视频生成的最新最优性能。
AI.conclusion: HarmoView通过创新的架构设计和训练策略成功解决了大视角变化下的身份保真度保持问题，为身份一致视频生成领域树立了新的技术标杆。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion from text), while this paper is about Identity-Consistent Video Generation (generating 2D videos of people with consistent appearance across viewpoints). Video generation and motion generation are fundamentally different applications in computer graphics - one creates visual content, the other creates movement/animation. Despite both potentially using diffusion models, the target output and evaluation criteria are entirely different. This paper addresses identity preservation in video generation, not motion synthesis, temporal consistency, or cross-modal alignment between text-video-motion.

title: LIBERO-Occ: Evaluating and Improving Vision-Language-Action Models under Scene-Induced Occlusion via Viewpoint Imagination
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models achieve strong performance on standard manipulation benchmarks, but most evaluations assume that task-relevant objects are fully visible. This assumption often fails in realistic settings, where occlusion makes manipulation partially observable. In this paper, we study \textit{scene-induced occlusion} as a fundamental challenge for VLA models and introduce \textbf{LIBERO-Occ}, an occlusion-oriented extension of LIBERO. Experiments show that state-of-the-art VLAs suffer substantial performance degradation under occlusion. To address this issue, we propose \textbf{Viewpoint Imagination (VIM)}, which generates a complementary view from an occluded primary observation and conditions action prediction on both observed and imagined evidence. VIM improves robustness across task suites, occlusion types, and severity levels without requiring additional cameras at deployment time, suggesting that viewpoint imagination is an promising mechanism for perception completion in partially observable manipulation. Our benchmark and corresponding code are available at: \href{https://github.com/litsh/Libero-Occ}{https://github.com/litsh/Libero-Occ}.

AI.tldr: 研究视觉-语言-动作(VLA)模型在物体遮挡下的manipulation表现。引入LIBERO-Occ基准测试集，提出Viewpoint Imagination (VIM)方法，通过生成互补视角图像来增强模型在部分可观察环境下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型评估假设任务相关物体完全可见，但实际场景中存在遮挡问题，导致模型性能显著下降。现有基准测试缺乏针对遮挡场景的系统性评估。
AI.method: 提出Viewpoint Imagination (VIM)方法：从被遮挡的主视角生成互补视图，将观察到的证据和想象的证据同时用于动作预测，无需在部署时添加额外摄像头。
AI.result: 实验表明：1) 最先进的VLA模型在遮挡条件下性能大幅下降；2) VIM方法在多种任务套件、遮挡类型和严重程度下均提升了鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 视角想象力是实现部分可观察manipulation中感知完成的有前景机制，VIM无需额外硬件即可提升模型在遮挡场景下的表现。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for ROBOTIC MANIPULATION, which is a completely different application domain from Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion (human motion generation). While both involve VLMs, the paper addresses robot control tasks (moving robot arms to manipulate objects), not generating human motion from text/video. The pain points are different: robotics manipulation under occlusion vs. cross-modal text-video-to-motion synthesis. This is not the same as human motion generation - robot motion and human motion are fundamentally different application domains.

title: Schmidt Decomposition-Based Methods for Efficient Quantum Image Encoding
summary: In quantum image processing, a fundamental step is encoding classical image data into quantum states. This can be achieved using methods such as Flexible Representation of Quantum Images (FRQI), Quantum Probability Image Encoding (QPIE), and Novel Enhanced Quantum Representation (NEQR). However, on real quantum hardware, these encodings can quickly lead to circuits with many gates, large circuit depth, and high qubit usage, which is a problem for Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) devices. In this work, we investigate whether low-rank state approximation, formulated via Schmidt decomposition, can help reduce this complexity. The method keeps only the most significant parts of a quantum state's entanglement structure, making state preparation more efficient while preserving most of the image information. We compare the three encoding techniques in their original form and with low-rank approximation, evaluating metrics such as circuit depth, CNOT count, MSE, and visual quality of reconstructed images. The results reveal meaningful trade-offs between accuracy and resource efficiency, with the FRQI model achieving a 97 percent reduction in circuit depth while maintaining a near-perfect reconstruction (MSE of about 0.27). This demonstrates the potential of low-rank techniques for advancing practical quantum image processing on near-term hardware.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨低秩状态近似（基于Schmidt分解）能否降低量子图像处理在NISQ设备上的资源消耗。实验表明FRQI结合低秩近似可实现97%的电路深度削减，同时保持MSE约0.27的重建质量。
AI.motivation: 量子图像编码在真实量子硬件上面临高门数、大电路深度和高量子位使用量的挑战，需要寻找降低复杂度的有效方法。
AI.method: 采用Schmidt分解进行低秩状态近似，仅保留量子态纠缠结构中最显著的部分。比较了三种编码技术（FRQI、QPIE、NEQR）在原始形式和低秩近似下的性能。
AI.result: FRQI模型达到97%的电路深度减少，同时保持近乎完美的图像重建（MSE约0.27），揭示了准确性与资源效率之间的有意义权衡。
AI.conclusion: 低秩技术有望推动近-term硬件上的实际量子图像处理应用，为NISQ时代的量子算法优化提供了可行路径。

relevance_reason: This paper is about quantum computing (quantum image encoding using Schmidt decomposition), which is entirely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. The application domain is completely different (quantum image processing vs human motion generation), and the methods are completely different (quantum circuits/gates vs video generation models and VLMs). There is no overlap in pain points, methods, or application areas.

title: Advancing Wood Identification in the Philippines: Utilizing the Xylorix Platform for Efficient AI Model Development and Deployment for Five Key Species
summary: Illegal logging and timber trade continue to pose significant challenges in the Philippines, where accurate wood species identification is essential for enforcement but limited by the need for specialised equipment and expertise. This study aims to evaluate whether AI models for macroscopic wood identification can be developed and deployed by wood scientists without programming expertise using the Xylorix platform, focusing on five Philippine hardwood species: Mangium (Acacia mangium Willd.), Rain Tree [Samanea saman (Jacq.) Merr.], Banuyo (Wallaceodendron celebicum Koord.), Tindalo [Afzelia rhomboidea (Blanco) Vidal], and Ipil [Intsia bijuga (Colebr.) O. Kuntze]. Binary classifiers were trained on 10,663 verified cross-section images from 260 specimens and evaluated using specimen-level mean scoring to mirror operational field conditions. Area Under the ROC Curve (AUC) values ranged from 0.969 (Ipil) to 1.000 (Mangium), and Average Precision (AP) values ranged from 0.589 (Samanea) to 1.000 (Mangium). Four of five species achieved AA grade (AUC and AP both \geq 0.90); Rain Tree received AE (AUC \geq 0.90, AP < 0.60) due to AP compression from its small positive test set (3 specimens). All five classifiers rank their target specimens above non-target specimens with near-perfect fidelity. Specimen-level error analysis revealed 9 false negatives from Ipil, primarily stemming from localized image artifacts and 3 false positives for Rain Tree and 1 false positive for Tindalo caused by shared tribal-level anatomical traits. These findings demonstrate that Xylorix non-programmers can leverage the Xylorix platform to construct operationally reliable wood identification models suitable for field deployment at supply chain checkpoints.

AI.tldr: 研究开发了一款无需编程经验的木种识别AI工具Xylorix，用于菲律宾非法伐木执法，对5种当地硬木树种进行分类识别，准确率高达96.9%-100%。
AI.motivation: 菲律宾非法伐木和木材贸易问题严重，准确木种鉴定对执法至关重要，但受限于专业设备和专家稀缺的瓶颈。
AI.method: 在Xylorix平台上使用10,663张来自260个标本的横截面图像训练二元分类器，采用标本级平均评分进行评估。
AI.result: AUC值范围0.969-1.000，AP值范围0.589-1.000；4/5树种达到AA级（两项指标均≥0.90）；所有分类器均能将目标标本正确排列在非目标标本之上。
AI.conclusion: Xylorix平台可使无编程经验的木材科学家构建适用于供应链检查站现场部署的操作可靠木种识别模型。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about wood species identification (agriculture/forestry domain) using binary image classifiers, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion generation. The application domains are entirely different: wood identification vs human motion synthesis. Methods are also unrelated: image classification for wood species vs video generation, VLMs, and 3D motion generation models. No relevance to text-to-motion, cross-modal alignment, or motion synthesis.

title: Listen, Look, and Learn: Learning Without Forgetting through SAM-Audio
summary: Class-Incremental Learning (CIL) aims to continuously learn new classes without forgetting previously acquired knowledge. While recent CIL advances have spurred significant interest across various modalities, the audio-visual setting remains underexplored. Furthermore, although foundational multimodal models like SAM-Audio encapsulate rich static priors, our empirical analysis reveals that these representations struggle in incremental settings. This work bridges this gap by integrating SAM-Audio's audio-visual priors into the CIL setting. Specifically, we leverage its dense audio and visual representations and employ a novel guided attention strategy where the audio features contextually guide the visual representations. To further mitigate catastrophic forgetting, we introduce dual-level distillation objectives at both the feature and logit levels. Extensive evaluations on audio-visual CIL benchmarks demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 将SAM-Audio的视听先验知识与双层蒸馏相结合，用于解决类别增量学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，并在视听CIL基准测试中取得先进性能。
AI.motivation: 类别增量学习(CIL)旨在持续学习新类别而不遗忘旧知识，但现有视听设置研究不足，且SAM-Audio等基础多模态模型在增量设置中表现不佳。
AI.method: 利用SAM-Audio的密集视听表征，采用引导注意力策略让音频特征引导视觉表征，并引入特征级和logit级双层蒸馏目标来缓解灾难性遗忘。
AI.result: 在视听CIL基准测试中，该方法 consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法成功将视听先验知识集成到CIL设置中，为视听增量学习提供了有效框架。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about Class-Incremental Learning (CIL) in audio-visual Computer Vision, while the research profile is about Text-to-Motion generation in Computer Graphics. Although both involve visual features, the paper uses SAM-Audio for incremental learning to prevent catastrophic forgetting, not for motion synthesis. The methods (guided attention, distillation) solve a fundamentally different problem than text-to-motion generation, video-to-motion synthesis, or cross-modal alignment between text/video and 3D motion.

title: Improving Text-Instance Alignment Of Foreground Conditioned Out-Painting Via Customized Concept Embedding
summary: To showcase products, merchants often incur substantial costs creating high-quality display images. Foreground Conditioned Outpainting (FCO) meets this demand, allowing users to create desired backgrounds for foreground instances at a low cost by adjusting the text prompt. However, existing text-driven FCO methods exhibit critical flaws in their outputs, most notably the presence of artifacts, which refer to regions in the synthesized background that share the same semantics as the foreground instance. Such artifacts diminish the object's prominence and degrade image quality. We attribute the issue to the misalignment between the given instance and text-derived concept embeddings. To address this, we propose the Customized Concept Embedding Diffusion (CCE-Diffusion) framework. Its core is a CCE-Module to customize concept embeddings, bridging the gap between generic noun semantics and a specific visual instance. An Instance-Aware Loss guides the module's optimization, while a Semantic-Preserving Prompt Template prevents customized embeddings from distorting other words in the prompt. Both qualitative and quantitative evaluations demonstrate that CCE-Diffusion significantly reduces artifacts in the outputs. As a plug-and-play component, the CCE-Module can integrate with various FCO methods, enhancing their performance.

AI.tldr: 针对前景物体合成背景时产生的语义伪影问题，提出CCE-Diffusion框架，通过自定义概念嵌入弥合通用名词语义与特定视觉实例之间的差距。
AI.motivation: 商家为展示产品需要创建高质量展示图，但现有文本驱动的FCO方法在输出中产生语义伪影（合成背景中出现与前景相同的语义区域），降低物体突出度和图像质量。研究发现该问题源于给定实例与文本派生概念嵌入之间的错位。
AI.method: 提出CCE-Diffusion框架，核心是CCE-Module用于自定义概念嵌入。1)Instance-Aware Loss引导模块优化，使嵌入与特定实例对齐；2)Semantic-Preserving Prompt Template防止自定义嵌入扭曲提示词中其他词汇。CCE-Module可作为即插即用组件集成到各种FCO方法中。
AI.result: 定性和定量评估表明CCE-Diffusion显著减少输出中的语义伪影，作为即插即用组件可提升多种FCO方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过自定义概念嵌入有效解决了文本驱动FCO中的语义伪影问题，框架具有良好的通用性和可扩展性。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about 2D image generation (foreground-conditioned out-painting for e-commerce product images), while the research profile is about Text-to-Motion (3D human motion generation). Although both use diffusion models, they operate in entirely different domains: image synthesis vs. motion synthesis, 2D vs. 3D. The paper addresses semantic artifacts in image generation, not any of the pain points related to motion generation, video-to-motion extraction, or cross-modal alignment between text/video and 3D motion. This is a classic example of similar methods in wrong application domains.

title: The 1st PortraitCraft Challenge: A CVPR 2026 Workshop Competition on Portrait Composition Understanding and Generation
summary: This paper presents an overview of the inaugural PortraitCraft Challenge, held as one of the official competitions at CVPR 2026. The challenge focuses on portrait composition understanding and generation, aiming to advance AI research in portrait aesthetics analysis and controllable image synthesis. Unlike existing datasets and tasks that primarily focus on global aesthetic scoring, PortraitCraft introduces a unified evaluation framework comprising two complementary tracks. Track 1 requires models to perform structured portrait composition understanding, and Track 2 requires models to generate portrait images from structured composition descriptions under explicit compositional constraints. To support the challenge, we constructed and publicly released a large-scale portrait composition dataset consisting of approximately 50,000 curated real portrait images, providing multi-level supervision. This report describes the challenge setup, evaluation protocols, dataset composition, and final results, along with an analysis of the technical characteristics of the submitted solutions. The PortraitCraft Challenge provides a standardized and reproducible platform for research on portrait composition understanding and generation, and is expected to foster further progress in the fields of portrait aesthetics and controllable image generation.

AI.tldr: CVPR 2026首届PortraitCraft挑战赛，旨在推进肖像构图理解和生成研究，包含两个互补赛道：赛道1要求模型进行结构化肖像构图理解，赛道2要求模型根据结构化构图描述生成肖像图像。数据集包含约5万张精选真实肖像图像。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集和任务主要关注全局美学评分，缺乏针对肖像构图的结构化理解和可控生成的标准评估框架，需要推动肖像美学分析和可控图像合成的研究进展。
AI.method: 构建包含约5万张精选肖像图像的大规模数据集，提供多级监督；设置两个互补赛道：赛道1进行结构化肖像构图理解，赛道2根据结构化构图描述在显式构图约束下生成肖像图像；制定标准化评估协议。
AI.result: 挑战赛提供了标准化可复现的研究平台，收集了多个参赛方案并进行了技术分析。
AI.conclusion: PortraitCraft Challenge为肖像构图理解和生成研究提供了标准化平台，有望促进肖像美学和可控图像生成领域的进一步发展。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about 2D portrait IMAGE generation, while the research profile is about 3D human MOTION generation (text-to-motion). Even though both involve generation, generating 2D static portrait images is fundamentally different from generating 3D temporal motion sequences for character animation. The domain, data representation (2D images vs 3D skeletal motion), and task objectives are completely orthogonal. This is a portrait image synthesis competition, not a motion generation task.

title: Pose-ICL: 3D-Aware In-Context Learning for Pose-Controllable Subject Customization
summary: Subject Customization is a foundational task in modern image generation. By providing a few reference images and a text prompt, users can generate images of a specific object in any desired scene. However, existing methods still struggle to achieve effective pose control for customized subjects. In practice, they often exhibit inaccurate poses or inconsistent cross-pose appearances. These limitations suggest that understanding objects in a volumetric manner remains a significant challenge for 2D-native backbones. To address this challenge, we propose Pose-ICL, a tuning-free framework that leverages 3D-aware In-Context Learning (ICL) to directly adapt to new subjects through multiple paired image-pose references. Its core mechanism,Surface-Anchored Position Embedding (SAPE), equips the model with explicit 3D awareness by anchoring image tokens to the surface coordinates of a volumetric bounding box. Dedicated refinements ensure its seamless compatibility with existing DiT models. Extensive evaluations on both 3D assets and real-world subjects demonstrate that Pose-ICL significantly outperforms current methods in both pose accuracy and identity consistency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Pose-ICL框架，解决图像生成中定制主体的姿态控制问题，通过3D感知上下文学习实现无调优的主体适应。
AI.motivation: 现有主体定制方法在姿态控制方面存在不足，无法实现准确的姿势或保持跨姿势外观一致性，2D原生backbone难以理解物体体积信息。
AI.method: 提出Pose-ICL无调优框架，利用3D感知上下文学习(ICL)，核心机制是表面锚定位嵌入(SAPE)，将图像token锚定到体积边界框的表面坐标，赋予模型显式3D感知能力。
AI.result: 在3D资产和现实世界主体上的广泛评估表明，Pose-ICL在姿势准确性和身份一致性方面显著优于当前方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过3D感知的上下文学习方法成功实现了更好的主体姿态控制和身份保持，为图像生成中的主体定制提供了新的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about IMAGE GENERATION with pose control, not MOTION generation. The application domain is completely different - it focuses on generating customized images of subjects with controlled poses, not generating 3D human motion from text. Even though both involve "pose" conceptually, they are in entirely different domains: one generates static images, the other generates temporal motion sequences. This is a fundamental mismatch with the Text-to-Motion research profile.

title: Beyond Model Size: Probing the Gaps in Visual in-Context Learning by Training a Tiny Model
summary: Visual in-Context Learning (VICL) aims at making progress towards adaptive vision models, that can -- based on a few examples -- adapt to a new task at test-time. With the history of in-context learning in natural language processing research, where large, parameter-heavy models are in use, one pathway that current VICL methods take is model- and data-scaling as key ingredients. Yet, it is not clear, whether these ingredients are the key for in-context learning to take shape in vision models. To stress-test such large models, we challenge them with an extreme counterexample: we train a tiny visual in-context model with merely $1$ million parameters and a modest amount of $70,000$ images. We compare the results of this severely capacity capped tiny model to $7,000\times$ larger VICL models in different adaptive settings, (1) on image data with small distribution shifts, (2) on unseen task encodings and (3) on a completely new task, i.e., the setting VICL envisions. With the chasm of training resources between the tiny- and large models, our experiments showcase a lack in how adaptive capabilities are measured, with respect to how tasks are encoded, which tasks were used in pre-training and the choice of metrics. These gaps in current VICL benchmarking underscore a need for innovation in evaluation of adaptive capabilities.

AI.tldr: 研究挑战视觉上下文学习(VICL)中"规模越大越好"的假设，通过训练仅有100万参数、7万张图像的微型模型与7000倍大型模型对比，揭示当前VICL基准测试在评估自适应能力方面的缺陷。
AI.motivation: 当前VICL方法效仿NLP领域的大模型思路，依赖模型和数据规模扩展，但尚不清楚规模是否是视觉模型实现上下文学习的核心要素。研究旨在通过极端对比实验验证这一假设。
AI.method: 训练微型视觉上下文学习模型(100万参数、7万张图像)，在三种自适应设置下与7000倍大型模型对比：(1)小分布偏移的图像数据；(2)未见的任务编码；(3)全新任务。评估任务编码方式、预训练任务选择和指标选择等方面。
AI.result: 实验揭示了当前VICL基准测试的多个缺陷：自适应能力测量方式不完善、任务编码方式存在问题、预训练任务选择不当、指标选择不合理。微型模型与大型模型的对比凸显了评估体系的不足。
AI.conclusion: 研究挑战了"规模是VICL关键"的假设，揭示现有基准测试无法准确评估模型的真实自适应能力，强调需要创新评估方法以更好地衡量视觉模型的上下文学习能力。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant - this paper is about Visual In-Context Learning (VICL) fundamentals, not Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion. The application domain is fundamentally different: it's ML/CV research on model scaling, not motion generation, video-to-motion synthesis, or cross-modal alignment between text/video/3D motion. The paper doesn't address any of the specified pain points and uses methods in a completely different context.

title: PENet+: A Lightweight Residual Transformer Framework for Efficient Image Steganalysis
summary: Image steganalysis, the detection of hidden information embedded in digital images, is a core component of modern cybersecurity and digital forensics. Recent residual Transformer architectures, such as the Pixel-Difference-Convolution and Enhanced-Transformer-Network (PENet) [1], achieve strong detection accuracy, but their computational and memory demands hinder deployment in resource-constrained settings. We present PENet+, a lightweight steganalysis framework that preserves PENet's discriminative structure while substantially improving efficiency. Rather than redesigning or compressing the attention blocks, we retain PENet's self-attention topology for reproducibility and add a classifier-streamlining stage that progressively narrows the SPP-to-FC1 input channels (SPP: spatial pyramid pooling; FC1: first fully connected layer), yielding large reductions in parameters and FLOPs with negligible accuracy loss. We further refine the high-pass-filter (HPF) stem with an activation-aware mechanism that aggregates HPF responses early and selects a balanced SRM-Gabor top-K subset, and we replace PENet's backbone with a MobileNetV2-style inverted residual network. A balanced configuration with K=31 filters (16 Gabor + 15 SRM) matches or surpasses heavier settings at lower compute. Finally, we motivate PReLU from a steganalysis standpoint, arguing that preserving negative responses helps capture weak stego cues that ReLU suppresses. On a disjoint ALASKA2 JPEG QF90 protocol at 512x512 resolution (5,000 cover images for training, validation, and internal testing; a separate 19,000-cover evaluation set), PENet+ achieves up to 45.5% fewer parameters and about 97% fewer FLOPs than the re-evaluated PENet baseline, offering a computationally efficient direction for resource-constrained steganalysis. Device-level latency and power measurements remain future work.

AI.tldr: 针对资源受限场景的轻量级图像隐写分析框架PENet+，通过分类器精简、HPF优化和MobileNetV2骨干替换，在ALASKA2数据集上实现参数量减少45.5%、FLOPs减少约97%的计算效率提升。
AI.motivation: 现有PENet等残差Transformer架构虽检测精度高，但计算和内存开销大，难以部署在资源受限环境中，需要轻量化解决方案。
AI.method: 1)保留PENet自注意力拓扑以保证可复现性；2)添加分类器精简阶段，逐步缩窄SPP到FC1的输入通道；3)引入激活感知机制优化HPF stem，聚合HPF响应并选取平衡的SRM-Gabor top-K子集(K=31)；4)用MobileNetV2风格倒残差网络替换骨干；5)采用PReLU激活函数保留负响应以捕捉微弱隐写线索。
AI.result: 在ALASKA2 JPEG QF90协议(512x512分辨率，5000张训练/验证/内测，19000张独立评估)上，PENet+相比重新评估的PENet基线实现参数量减少最多45.5%，FLOPs减少约97%，精度损失可忽略。
AI.conclusion: PENet+为资源受限环境下的隐写分析提供了计算高效的新方向，设备级延迟和功耗测量为后续工作。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about image steganalysis (detecting hidden data in images for security/cryptography), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion from text and video). These are entirely different application domains - security vs computer graphics. The methods (steganalysis transformers, HPF filters) are also unrelated to motion generation, video priors, or VLM-based quality supervision. Despite both using transformer architectures, the application purpose is completely different.

title: Democratising Camera Trap AI: An Open-Source Model for Detecting UK Mammals
summary: Camera traps have become a cornerstone of biodiversity monitoring, but the artificial intelligence that turns vast quantities of images into usable ecological data is often locked behind commercial platforms or trained on fauna that does not match that of the British Isles. In an attempt to remove barriers and increase uptake, we release an open-source object detection model for 31 classes, 28 common UK mammal and bird species, plus utility classes for humans, calibration poles, and vehicles, drawn from a curated dataset of 48,165 labelled instances assembled from multiple sites over a decade of operational deployment through Conservation AI and its successor, Trap Tracker. The model, a YOLO26x detector trained and tested on an 80/10/10 class-stratified split, achieves a mean Average Precision of 0.984 at Intersection over Union (IoU) of 0.5 (0.956 at IoU 0.5-0.95) on the held-out validation set, with precision 0.988 and recall 0.965. On an unseen held-out test split, mean per-species confidence ranged from 0.96 to 0.99 across the 31 classes, with a 0.17% false-negative rate concentrated in difficult night-time, distant, or occluded images. These metrics are from data from the same pool of sites and cameras as training, so performance at entirely new sites is left to future work. We release the trained weights in ONNX format under a non-commercial licence, with local desktop and real-time camera support, aimed explicitly at ecologists with no machine-learning experience. This release is a deliberate counterweight to the multiple paid for models that have developed over the last decade.

title: Quo Vadis, Visual In-Context Learning? A Unified Benchmark Across Domains and Tasks
summary: Visual in-context learning has been proposed as a pathway towards dynamic models that can generate predictions based on a provided context and thereby can adapt to new vision tasks at test-time. Yet, the evaluation of the adaptation capabilities of these models has been limited to narrow setups that mainly mirror tasks or image domains from pre-training for which real adaptation is not required. We address this gap by constructing a broad Visual In-Context BEnchmark (VIBE) with a focus on diverse imaging domains and a wide range of tasks. With this, we are able to get a much clearer picture of the adaptive capabilities of visual in-context models when faced with new image- and task distributions. We stress test six models on $14$ datasets and $12$ tasks (in total, we explore $106$ dataset-task combinations) and compare them under a unified, reproducible evaluation protocol, in an one-shot setting. Our evaluation uncovers key insights on the state of visual in-context learning, including limitations, systematic failure modes and promising directions. To foster broader evaluation, we will openly release our VIBE toolkit.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VIBE视觉上下文学习基准测试，用于评估视觉上下文模型的真实适应能力，解决此前评估局限于与预训练相似任务的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉上下文学习模型的评估局限于与预训练相似的任务或图像领域，无法真正测试模型的适应能力。需要构建更全面、更具挑战性的基准来评估模型在新分布上的表现。
AI.method: 在一次性(one-shot)设置下，对6个模型进行压力测试，覆盖14个数据集、12个任务（共106个数据集-任务组合），采用统一可复现的评估协议。
AI.result: 揭示了视觉上下文学习的关键洞察，包括局限性、系统性失败模式和 promising 研究方向。
AI.conclusion: VIBE基准测试能更清晰地展示视觉上下文模型在面对新图像和任务分布时的适应能力，为该领域未来研究提供重要参考，并将开源VIBE工具包促进更广泛评估。
